// ============================================================ // OVERLAY ELEMENTS // ============================================================ // Vignette crVig = document.createElement('div'); crVig.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;pointer-events:none;z-index:9001;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 45% 45%, transparent 30%, rgba(0,0,0,0.6) 100%);'; crWrap.appendChild(crVig); // Film grain crGrain = document.createElement('canvas'); crGrain.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;pointer-events:none;z-index:9002;opacity:0.02;mix-blend-mode:overlay;'; crGrain.width = 256; crGrain.height = 256; crWrap.appendChild(crGrain); crGrainCtx = crGrain.getContext('2d'); crGrainFrame = 0; // Colorwash crWash = document.createElement('div'); crWash.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;pointer-events:none;z-index:9002;background:linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(10,8,25,0.3) 0%, rgba(5,5,15,0.08) 30%, rgba(5,5,15,0.08) 60%, rgba(5,3,2,0.4) 100%);'; crWrap.appendChild(crWash); // Datestamp crDate = document.createElement('div'); crDate.textContent = '23.11.73'; crDate.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:18px;right:24px;font:14px monospace;color:rgba(255,140,50,0.4);pointer-events:none;z-index:9003;'; crWrap.appendChild(crDate); // Location crLoc = document.createElement('div'); crLoc.textContent = 'DEAN STREET, SOHO'; crLoc.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;bottom:18px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);font:12px "Courier New",monospace;color:rgba(200,180,140,0.25);letter-spacing:2px;pointer-events:none;z-index:9003;white-space:nowrap;'; crWrap.appendChild(crLoc); // Button crBtn = document.createElement('div'); crBtn.textContent = 'ENTER THE COLONY ROOM'; crBtn.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;bottom:60px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);padding:14px 36px;font:16px "Courier New",monospace;color:rgba(200,170,100,0.85);border:1px solid rgba(200,170,100,0.3);letter-spacing:4px;cursor:pointer;z-index:9004;background:transparent;opacity:0;transition:opacity 2s ease;'; setTimeout(function() { crBtn.style.opacity = '1'; }, 2500); crBtn.addEventListener('mouseenter', function() { crBtn.style.color = 'rgba(230,200,120,0.95)'; crBtn.style.borderColor = 'rgba(200,170,100,0.6)'; }); crBtn.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() { crBtn.style.color = 'rgba(200,170,100,0.85)'; crBtn.style.borderColor = 'rgba(200,170,100,0.3)'; }); crBtn.addEventListener('click', function() { crWrap.style.transition = 'opacity 1.5s ease'; crWrap.style.opacity = '0'; setTimeout(function() { if (crAnimId) cancelAnimationFrame(crAnimId); crAnimId = null; if (crWrap.parentNode) crWrap.parentNode.removeChild(crWrap); var TARGET = 'The Colony Room Door'; if (window.Engine && Engine.go) { Engine.go(TARGET); } else { var links = document.querySelectorAll('tw-link, .enchantment-link'); for (var i = 0; i < links.length; i++) { if (links[i].textContent.trim() === '·') { links[i].click(); break; } } } }, 1500); }); crWrap.appendChild(crBtn); document.body.appendChild(crWrap); } setInterval(function() { var container = document.getElementById('cr-container'); if (container && !crActive) { initColonyRoom(); } else if (!container) { crActive = false; if (crAnimId) { cancelAnimationFrame(crAnimId); crAnimId = null; } var wrap = document.getElementById('cr-wrap'); if (wrap && wrap.parentNode) wrap.parentNode.removeChild(wrap); } }, 300); })(); // ====== COPPER'S LAIR SCENE — INLINE ====== (function() { var clActive = false; var clAnimId = null; function initCoppersLair() { if (clActive) return; clActive = true; if (typeof THREE === 'undefined') { var s = document.createElement('script'); s.src = 'https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/three.js/r128/three.min.js'; s.onload = function() { buildCLScene(); }; document.head.appendChild(s); } else { buildCLScene(); } } function buildCLScene() { var clWrap = document.createElement('div'); clWrap.id = 'cl-wrap'; clWrap.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;z-index:9000;background:#06060a;'; // ============================================================ // SCENE SETUP // ============================================================ var scene = new THREE.Scene(); scene.background = new THREE.Color(0x06060a); scene.fog = new THREE.Fog(0x05050a, 5, 26); var camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(54, window.innerWidth / window.innerHeight, 0.1, 200); camera.position.set(0.3, 1.5, 8.5); camera.lookAt(0, 1.4, -6); var renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ antialias: true }); renderer.setSize(window.innerWidth, window.innerHeight); renderer.setPixelRatio(Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio, 2)); renderer.shadowMap.enabled = true; renderer.shadowMap.type = THREE.PCFSoftShadowMap; renderer.toneMapping = THREE.ACESFilmicToneMapping || THREE.LinearToneMapping; renderer.toneMappingExposure = 0.45; clWrap.appendChild(renderer.domElement); window.addEventListener('resize', function() { camera.aspect = window.innerWidth / window.innerHeight; camera.updateProjectionMatrix(); renderer.setSize(window.innerWidth, window.innerHeight); }); // ============================================================ // MATERIALS // ============================================================ var concreteMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x5a5850, roughness: 0.95 }); var concreteFloor = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x3a3835, roughness: 0.95 }); var concreteDark = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x484540, roughness: 0.9 }); var ceilingMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x4a4038, roughness: 0.9 }); var woodBeam = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x6a4a2a, roughness: 0.85 }); var darkWood = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x3a2515, roughness: 0.8 }); var pipeMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x555550, roughness: 0.6, metalness: 0.3 }); var ironMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x2a2a28, roughness: 0.7, metalness: 0.4 }); var wireMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x888878, roughness: 0.7 }); var bulbGlass = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0xeeeee8, roughness: 0.2, emissive: 0xccbbaa, emissiveIntensity: 0.55, transparent: true, opacity: 0.9 }); var silhouetteMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x0a0a0a, roughness: 0.9 }); var tableMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x2a2018, roughness: 0.85 }); // ============================================================ // HELPERS // ============================================================ function box(group, w, h, d, mat, x, y, z) { var geo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(w, h, d); var m = new THREE.Mesh(geo, mat); m.position.set(x, y, z); m.castShadow = true; m.receiveShadow = true; group.add(m); return m; } function cyl(group, rTop, rBot, h, segs, mat, x, y, z) { var geo = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(rTop, rBot, h, segs); var m = new THREE.Mesh(geo, mat); m.position.set(x, y, z); m.castShadow = true; m.receiveShadow = true; group.add(m); return m; } function makeCanvasTexture(w, h, drawFunc) { var c = document.createElement('canvas'); c.width = w; c.height = h; var cx = c.getContext('2d'); drawFunc(cx, w, h); var tex = new THREE.CanvasTexture(c); tex.minFilter = THREE.LinearFilter; return tex; } // ============================================================ // ROOM DIMENSIONS // ============================================================ var roomLength = 20; var roomWidth = 6; var roomHeight = 2.8; var halfW = roomWidth / 2; var halfL = roomLength / 2; // ============================================================ // FLOOR // ============================================================ var floorGroup = new THREE.Group(); scene.add(floorGroup); var floorTex = makeCanvasTexture(512, 512, function(cx, w, h) { cx.fillStyle = '#3a3835'; cx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h); var i; for (i = 0; i < 200; i++) { var px = Math.random() * w; var py = Math.random() * h; var shade = Math.floor(Math.random() * 20) + 45; cx.fillStyle = 'rgba(' + shade + ',' + shade + ',' + (shade - 5) + ',0.4)'; cx.fillRect(px, py, Math.random() * 30 + 5, Math.random() * 30 + 5); } for (i = 0; i < 8; i++) { cx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(30,28,25,0.5)'; cx.lineWidth = 0.5 + Math.random(); cx.beginPath(); cx.moveTo(Math.random() * w, Math.random() * h); cx.lineTo(Math.random() * w, Math.random() * h); cx.stroke(); } }); var floorMatTex = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ map: floorTex, roughness: 0.95 }); var floor = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.PlaneGeometry(roomWidth, roomLength), floorMatTex); floor.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2; floor.position.set(0, 0, 0); floor.receiveShadow = true; floorGroup.add(floor); // ============================================================ // WALLS // ============================================================ var wallGroup = new THREE.Group(); scene.add(wallGroup); function makeBlockWallTex(w, h) { return makeCanvasTexture(w, h, function(cx, cw, ch) { cx.fillStyle = '#585550'; cx.fillRect(0, 0, cw, ch); var blockH = 32; var blockW = 64; var row, col, ox; for (row = 0; row < ch / blockH + 1; row++) { ox = (row % 2 === 0) ? 0 : blockW / 2; for (col = -1; col < cw / blockW + 1; col++) { var bx = col * blockW + ox; var by = row * blockH; var shade = 75 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 20); cx.fillStyle = 'rgb(' + shade + ',' + (shade - 2) + ',' + (shade - 5) + ')'; cx.fillRect(bx + 1, by + 1, blockW - 2, blockH - 2); cx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(40,38,35,0.7)'; cx.lineWidth = 1.5; cx.strokeRect(bx, by, blockW, blockH); } } var i; for (i = 0; i < 30; i++) { cx.fillStyle = 'rgba(50,45,35,' + (Math.random() * 0.3) + ')'; cx.beginPath(); cx.arc(Math.random() * cw, Math.random() * ch, Math.random() * 30 + 5, 0, Math.PI * 2); cx.fill(); } var d; for (d = 0; d < 6; d++) { var dx = 40 + Math.random() * (cw - 80); var dWidth = 3 + Math.random() * 5; var dLen = ch * (0.4 + Math.random() * 0.6); var grd = cx.createLinearGradient(dx, 0, dx, dLen); grd.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(20,18,12,0.85)'); grd.addColorStop(0.3, 'rgba(25,20,14,0.7)'); grd.addColorStop(0.7, 'rgba(20,18,12,0.4)'); grd.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(20,18,12,0)'); cx.fillStyle = grd; cx.beginPath(); cx.moveTo(dx - dWidth/2, 0); cx.quadraticCurveTo(dx + dWidth, dLen * 0.3, dx - dWidth * 0.3, dLen * 0.6); cx.quadraticCurveTo(dx + dWidth * 0.5, dLen * 0.85, dx, dLen); cx.lineTo(dx + dWidth, dLen); cx.quadraticCurveTo(dx + dWidth * 1.5, dLen * 0.85, dx + dWidth * 1.3, dLen * 0.6); cx.quadraticCurveTo(dx - dWidth * 0.5, dLen * 0.3, dx + dWidth/2, 0); cx.closePath(); cx.fill(); cx.fillStyle = 'rgba(80,75,65,0.2)'; cx.fillRect(dx - dWidth/2, 0, dWidth, 8); } }); } var leftWallTex = makeBlockWallTex(512, 256); var leftWallMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ map: leftWallTex, roughness: 0.9 }); var leftWall = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.PlaneGeometry(roomLength, roomHeight), leftWallMat); leftWall.position.set(-halfW, roomHeight / 2, 0); leftWall.rotation.y = Math.PI / 2; leftWall.receiveShadow = true; wallGroup.add(leftWall); var rightWallTex = makeBlockWallTex(512, 256); var rightWallMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ map: rightWallTex, roughness: 0.9 }); var rightWall = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.PlaneGeometry(roomLength, roomHeight), rightWallMat); rightWall.position.set(halfW, roomHeight / 2, 0); rightWall.rotation.y = -Math.PI / 2; rightWall.receiveShadow = true; wallGroup.add(rightWall); var farWallTex = makeBlockWallTex(512, 256); var farWallMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ map: farWallTex, roughness: 0.9 }); var farWall = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.PlaneGeometry(roomWidth, roomHeight), farWallMat); farWall.position.set(0, roomHeight / 2, -halfL); farWall.receiveShadow = true; wallGroup.add(farWall); var nearWall = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.PlaneGeometry(roomWidth, roomHeight), concreteMat); nearWall.position.set(0, roomHeight / 2, halfL); nearWall.rotation.y = Math.PI; nearWall.receiveShadow = true; wallGroup.add(nearWall); // ============================================================ // CEILING // ============================================================ var ceilGroup = new THREE.Group(); scene.add(ceilGroup); var ceilingTex = makeCanvasTexture(512, 256, function(cx, cw, ch) { cx.fillStyle = '#4a4038'; cx.fillRect(0, 0, cw, ch); var i; for (i = 0; i < 15; i++) { cx.fillStyle = 'rgba(60,50,35,' + (Math.random() * 0.3 + 0.1) + ')'; cx.beginPath(); cx.ellipse(Math.random() * cw, Math.random() * ch, Math.random() * 50 + 20, Math.random() * 20 + 10, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2); cx.fill(); } }); var ceilMatTex = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ map: ceilingTex, roughness: 0.9, side: THREE.DoubleSide }); var ceiling = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.PlaneGeometry(roomWidth, roomLength), ceilMatTex); ceiling.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2; ceiling.position.set(0, roomHeight, 0); ceiling.receiveShadow = true; ceilGroup.add(ceiling); // ============================================================ // JOISTS // ============================================================ var joistGroup = new THREE.Group(); scene.add(joistGroup); var jz; for (jz = -halfL + 1; jz <= halfL - 1; jz += 1.8) { box(joistGroup, roomWidth - 0.2, 0.12, 0.08, woodBeam, 0, roomHeight - 0.06, jz); } box(joistGroup, 0.15, 0.2, roomLength - 0.4, woodBeam, -1.5, roomHeight - 0.1, 0); box(joistGroup, 0.15, 0.2, roomLength - 0.4, woodBeam, 1.5, roomHeight - 0.1, 0); // ============================================================ // SUPPORT POSTS // ============================================================ var postGroup = new THREE.Group(); scene.add(postGroup); box(postGroup, 0.12, roomHeight, 0.12, woodBeam, -1.2, roomHeight / 2, 2); box(postGroup, 0.12, roomHeight, 0.12, woodBeam, 1.2, roomHeight / 2, -2); box(postGroup, 0.12, roomHeight, 0.12, darkWood, -1.2, roomHeight / 2, -5); // ============================================================ // PIPES // ============================================================ var pipeGroup = new THREE.Group(); scene.add(pipeGroup); var pipe1 = cyl(pipeGroup, 0.04, 0.04, roomLength - 2, 8, pipeMat, -halfW + 0.15, roomHeight - 0.3, 0); pipe1.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2; var pipe2 = cyl(pipeGroup, 0.05, 0.05, roomLength - 4, 8, pipeMat, halfW - 0.2, 1.0, -1); pipe2.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2; cyl(pipeGroup, 0.04, 0.04, roomHeight, 8, ironMat, halfW - 0.15, roomHeight / 2, 3); box(pipeGroup, 0.3, 0.3, 0.5, ironMat, halfW - 0.25, roomHeight - 0.5, 1); cyl(pipeGroup, 0.08, 0.08, 0.6, 8, ironMat, halfW - 0.15, roomHeight - 0.5, 0.3); var cp; for (cp = -6; cp < 7; cp += 4) { var cpipe = cyl(pipeGroup, 0.02, 0.02, roomWidth * 0.6, 6, wireMat, 0, roomHeight - 0.15, cp); cpipe.rotation.z = Math.PI / 2; } // ============================================================ // LIGHT BULB // ============================================================ var bulbGroup = new THREE.Group(); scene.add(bulbGroup); var wireGeo = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.005, 0.005, 1.0, 4); var wire = new THREE.Mesh(wireGeo, wireMat); wire.position.set(0, roomHeight - 0.5, 1.5); bulbGroup.add(wire); cyl(bulbGroup, 0.025, 0.02, 0.08, 8, ironMat, 0, roomHeight - 1.04, 1.5); var bulbSphere = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.06, 12, 8), bulbGlass); bulbSphere.position.set(0, roomHeight - 1.12, 1.5); bulbGroup.add(bulbSphere); var bulbLight = new THREE.PointLight(0xccbbaa, 2.5, 25, 1.5); bulbLight.position.set(0, roomHeight - 1.15, 1.5); bulbLight.castShadow = true; bulbLight.shadow.mapSize.set(512, 512); bulbLight.shadow.radius = 8; bulbLight.shadow.bias = -0.002; scene.add(bulbLight); var glowMat = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ color: 0xccbbaa, transparent: true, opacity: 0.1 }); var glowSphere = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.15, 16, 12), glowMat); glowSphere.position.copy(bulbSphere.position); scene.add(glowSphere); // ============================================================ // LIGHTING // ============================================================ var ambientLight = new THREE.AmbientLight(0x0a0810, 0.08); scene.add(ambientLight); var farFill = new THREE.PointLight(0x8090aa, 0.9, 10, 1.5); farFill.position.set(0, 2.2, -halfL + 0.5); scene.add(farFill); var rimLight = new THREE.PointLight(0x506080, 0.4, 8, 2); rimLight.position.set(0.3, 1.2, -halfL + 3.5); scene.add(rimLight); var floorGlow = new THREE.PointLight(0x182030, 0.2, 6, 2); floorGlow.position.set(0, 0.05, -halfL + 4); scene.add(floorGlow); // ============================================================ // TABLE // ============================================================ var tableGroup = new THREE.Group(); scene.add(tableGroup); var tableZ = -halfL + 4.5; var tableY = 0.7; box(tableGroup, 1.4, 0.06, 0.7, tableMat, 0, tableY, tableZ); box(tableGroup, 0.06, tableY, 0.06, darkWood, -0.6, tableY / 2, tableZ - 0.25); box(tableGroup, 0.06, tableY, 0.06, darkWood, 0.6, tableY / 2, tableZ - 0.25); box(tableGroup, 0.06, tableY, 0.06, darkWood, -0.6, tableY / 2, tableZ + 0.25); box(tableGroup, 0.06, tableY, 0.06, darkWood, 0.6, tableY / 2, tableZ + 0.25); // ============================================================ // FIGURES // ============================================================ var figureGroup = new THREE.Group(); scene.add(figureGroup); var womanGroup = new THREE.Group(); womanGroup.position.set(-0.4, 0, tableZ); figureGroup.add(womanGroup); var wBodyGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.26, 0.7, 0.16); var wBody = new THREE.Mesh(wBodyGeo, silhouetteMat); wBody.position.set(0, tableY + 0.12, 0); wBody.castShadow = false; womanGroup.add(wBody); var wHeadGeo = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.09, 12, 8); var wHeadMesh = new THREE.Mesh(wHeadGeo, silhouetteMat); wHeadMesh.position.set(0, tableY + 0.56, 0); wHeadMesh.scale.set(1, 1.15, 0.95); wHeadMesh.castShadow = false; womanGroup.add(wHeadMesh); var manGroup = new THREE.Group(); manGroup.position.set(0.5, 0, tableZ); figureGroup.add(manGroup); var mBodyGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.38, 0.75, 0.2); var mBody = new THREE.Mesh(mBodyGeo, silhouetteMat); mBody.position.set(0, tableY + 0.14, 0); mBody.castShadow = false; manGroup.add(mBody); var mHeadGeo = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.1, 12, 8); var mHeadMesh = new THREE.Mesh(mHeadGeo, silhouetteMat); mHeadMesh.position.set(0, tableY + 0.6, 0); mHeadMesh.scale.set(1, 0.9, 0.95); mHeadMesh.castShadow = false; manGroup.add(mHeadMesh); // ============================================================ // RUG // ============================================================ var rugGroup = new THREE.Group(); scene.add(rugGroup); var rugTex = makeCanvasTexture(512, 512, function(cx, w, h) { cx.fillStyle = '#3a0e0e'; cx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h); var i, j, a; cx.strokeStyle = '#1a0505'; cx.lineWidth = 14; cx.strokeRect(10, 10, w - 20, h - 20); cx.strokeStyle = '#7a5a20'; cx.lineWidth = 6; cx.strokeRect(22, 22, w - 44, h - 44); for (i = 35; i < w - 35; i += 18) { cx.fillStyle = '#5a3818'; cx.fillRect(i, 30, 8, 8); cx.fillRect(i, h - 38, 8, 8); } for (j = 35; j < h - 35; j += 18) { cx.fillStyle = '#5a3818'; cx.fillRect(30, j, 8, 8); cx.fillRect(w - 38, j, 8, 8); } cx.strokeStyle = '#5a1818'; cx.lineWidth = 3; cx.strokeRect(45, 45, w - 90, h - 90); cx.strokeStyle = '#8a7a50'; cx.lineWidth = 1.5; cx.strokeRect(50, 50, w - 100, h - 100); cx.save(); cx.translate(w/2, h/2); cx.rotate(Math.PI / 4); cx.fillStyle = '#4a1510'; cx.fillRect(-65, -65, 130, 130); cx.strokeStyle = '#7a5a28'; cx.lineWidth = 2; cx.strokeRect(-65, -65, 130, 130); cx.fillStyle = '#2a0a08'; cx.fillRect(-40, -40, 80, 80); cx.strokeStyle = '#6a4a20'; cx.lineWidth = 1.5; cx.strokeRect(-40, -40, 80, 80); cx.fillStyle = '#5a2015'; cx.fillRect(-18, -18, 36, 36); cx.restore(); var crnrs = [[120, 120], [w-120, 120], [120, h-120], [w-120, h-120]]; for (i = 0; i < crnrs.length; i++) { cx.save(); cx.translate(crnrs[i][0], crnrs[i][1]); cx.rotate(Math.PI / 4); cx.fillStyle = '#4a1812'; cx.fillRect(-25, -25, 50, 50); cx.strokeStyle = '#6a4a22'; cx.lineWidth = 1.5; cx.strokeRect(-25, -25, 50, 50); cx.fillStyle = '#3a0e0a'; cx.fillRect(-12, -12, 24, 24); cx.restore(); } for (i = 0; i < 8; i++) { for (j = 0; j < 8; j++) { var mx = 80 + i * 48; var my = 80 + j * 48; if (Math.sqrt(Math.pow(mx - w/2, 2) + Math.pow(my - h/2, 2)) < 60) { continue; } if (mx < 55 || mx > w - 55 || my < 55 || my > h - 55) { continue; } cx.fillStyle = '#5a2818'; cx.fillRect(mx - 3, my - 3, 6, 6); cx.strokeStyle = '#6a4020'; cx.lineWidth = 0.5; cx.strokeRect(mx - 3, my - 3, 6, 6); } } for (i = 0; i < 40; i++) { cx.fillStyle = 'rgba(20,10,5,' + (Math.random() * 0.12) + ')'; cx.fillRect(Math.random() * w, Math.random() * h, Math.random() * 30 + 5, Math.random() * 30 + 5); } }); var rugMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ map: rugTex, roughness: 0.92 }); var rug = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.PlaneGeometry(2.8, 4.0), rugMat); rug.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2; rug.position.set(halfW - 1.2, 0.003, 1.5); rug.receiveShadow = true; rugGroup.add(rug); // ============================================================ // SOFA // ============================================================ var sofaGroup = new THREE.Group(); sofaGroup.position.set(halfW - 0.55, 0, 1.5); scene.add(sofaGroup); var chesterRed = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x6a1818, roughness: 0.7 }); var chesterDark = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x4a1010, roughness: 0.75 }); box(sofaGroup, 0.7, 0.35, 1.6, chesterRed, 0, 0.175, 0); box(sofaGroup, 0.6, 0.08, 1.5, chesterRed, 0, 0.39, 0); box(sofaGroup, 0.15, 0.5, 1.6, chesterDark, 0.28, 0.6, 0); box(sofaGroup, 0.6, 0.35, 0.12, chesterDark, 0, 0.5, -0.8); box(sofaGroup, 0.6, 0.35, 0.12, chesterDark, 0, 0.5, 0.8); box(sofaGroup, 0.55, 0.06, 0.16, chesterRed, -0.05, 0.68, -0.8); box(sofaGroup, 0.55, 0.06, 0.16, chesterRed, -0.05, 0.68, 0.8); var tuftTex = makeCanvasTexture(256, 128, function(cx, cw, ch) { cx.fillStyle = '#5a1515'; cx.fillRect(0, 0, cw, ch); var row, col; for (row = 0; row < 5; row++) { for (col = 0; col < 10; col++) { var tx = col * 26 + (row % 2 === 0 ? 0 : 13); var ty = row * 26 + 5; cx.fillStyle = '#3a0a0a'; cx.beginPath(); cx.arc(tx + 13, ty + 13, 4, 0, Math.PI * 2); cx.fill(); cx.strokeStyle = '#4a1212'; cx.lineWidth = 0.8; cx.beginPath(); cx.moveTo(tx, ty + 13); cx.lineTo(tx + 13, ty); cx.lineTo(tx + 26, ty + 13); cx.lineTo(tx + 13, ty + 26); cx.closePath(); cx.stroke(); } } }); var tuftMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ map: tuftTex, roughness: 0.75 }); var tuftPanel = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.PlaneGeometry(1.5, 0.45), tuftMat); tuftPanel.position.set(0.2, 0.6, 0); tuftPanel.rotation.y = -Math.PI / 2; sofaGroup.add(tuftPanel); box(sofaGroup, 0.08, 0.04, 0.08, darkWood, -0.25, 0.02, -0.7); box(sofaGroup, 0.08, 0.04, 0.08, darkWood, -0.25, 0.02, 0.7); box(sofaGroup, 0.08, 0.04, 0.08, darkWood, 0.25, 0.02, -0.7); box(sofaGroup, 0.08, 0.04, 0.08, darkWood, 0.25, 0.02, 0.7); // ============================================================ // DEBRIS // ============================================================ var debrisGroup = new THREE.Group(); scene.add(debrisGroup); cyl(debrisGroup, 0.25, 0.28, 0.7, 10, darkWood, -2.3, 0.35, -1); box(debrisGroup, 0.3, 0.02, 0.2, concreteDark, 1.0, 0.01, 5); box(debrisGroup, 0.15, 0.08, 0.12, ironMat, -0.8, 0.04, 3); // ============================================================ // PUDDLE // ============================================================ var puddleTex = makeCanvasTexture(256, 256, function(cx, cw, ch) { cx.clearRect(0, 0, cw, ch); var grd = cx.createRadialGradient(cw/2, ch/2, 0, cw/2, ch/2, cw/2); grd.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(60,15,12,0.85)'); grd.addColorStop(0.3, 'rgba(70,20,16,0.65)'); grd.addColorStop(0.6, 'rgba(50,16,12,0.45)'); grd.addColorStop(0.85, 'rgba(40,14,10,0.2)'); grd.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(30,10,8,0)'); cx.fillStyle = grd; cx.beginPath(); cx.moveTo(cw * 0.3, ch * 0.15); cx.quadraticCurveTo(cw * 0.7, ch * 0.05, cw * 0.8, ch * 0.3); cx.quadraticCurveTo(cw * 0.9, ch * 0.6, cw * 0.7, ch * 0.8); cx.quadraticCurveTo(cw * 0.5, ch * 0.95, cw * 0.25, ch * 0.75); cx.quadraticCurveTo(cw * 0.1, ch * 0.5, cw * 0.15, ch * 0.3); cx.quadraticCurveTo(cw * 0.2, ch * 0.1, cw * 0.3, ch * 0.15); cx.closePath(); cx.fill(); cx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(50,15,12,0.35)'; cx.lineWidth = 8; cx.lineCap = 'round'; cx.beginPath(); cx.moveTo(cw * 0.6, ch * 0.4); cx.quadraticCurveTo(cw * 0.85, ch * 0.35, cw * 0.9, ch * 0.5); cx.stroke(); cx.lineWidth = 5; cx.beginPath(); cx.moveTo(cw * 0.4, ch * 0.55); cx.quadraticCurveTo(cw * 0.2, ch * 0.7, cw * 0.15, ch * 0.85); cx.stroke(); cx.fillStyle = 'rgba(35,8,6,0.4)'; cx.beginPath(); cx.ellipse(cw * 0.45, ch * 0.45, 30, 22, 0.3, 0, Math.PI * 2); cx.fill(); cx.fillStyle = 'rgba(80,40,35,0.12)'; cx.beginPath(); cx.ellipse(cw * 0.42, ch * 0.4, 18, 12, -0.2, 0, Math.PI * 2); cx.fill(); }); var puddleMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ map: puddleTex, transparent: true, roughness: 0.35, metalness: 0.15, emissive: 0x120403, emissiveIntensity: 0.1 }); var puddle = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.PlaneGeometry(1.6, 1.4), puddleMat); puddle.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2; puddle.position.set(-0.6, 0.006, 4.0); puddle.receiveShadow = true; debrisGroup.add(puddle); // ============================================================ // WIRES // ============================================================ var wireGroup = new THREE.Group(); scene.add(wireGroup); var wirePts = []; wirePts.push(new THREE.Vector3(0, roomHeight - 1.0, 1.5)); wirePts.push(new THREE.Vector3(0.8, roomHeight - 0.6, 1.5)); wirePts.push(new THREE.Vector3(1.8, roomHeight - 0.3, 1.5)); wirePts.push(new THREE.Vector3(halfW - 0.1, roomHeight - 0.2, 1.5)); var wireCurve = new THREE.CatmullRomCurve3(wirePts); var wirePathGeo = new THREE.TubeGeometry(wireCurve, 20, 0.008, 4, false); var wirePath = new THREE.Mesh(wirePathGeo, wireMat); wireGroup.add(wirePath); var wire2Pts = []; wire2Pts.push(new THREE.Vector3(-halfW + 0.1, roomHeight - 0.15, 5)); wire2Pts.push(new THREE.Vector3(-halfW + 0.15, roomHeight - 0.4, 3)); wire2Pts.push(new THREE.Vector3(-halfW + 0.1, roomHeight - 0.2, 0)); wire2Pts.push(new THREE.Vector3(-halfW + 0.12, roomHeight - 0.5, -3)); var wire2Curve = new THREE.CatmullRomCurve3(wire2Pts); var wire2Geo = new THREE.TubeGeometry(wire2Curve, 20, 0.006, 4, false); wireGroup.add(new THREE.Mesh(wire2Geo, wireMat)); // ============================================================ // ANIMATION // ============================================================ var clock = new THREE.Clock(); var baseBulbIntensity = 2.5; var baseBulbEmissive = 0.55; var baseGlowOpacity = 0.1; function clAnimate() { clAnimId = requestAnimationFrame(clAnimate); var t = clock.getElapsedTime(); // Breathing light instead of pulsing/flickering var breath = 0.97 + Math.sin(t * 0.4) * 0.03; bulbLight.intensity = baseBulbIntensity * breath; bulbGlass.emissiveIntensity = baseBulbEmissive * breath; glowSphere.material.opacity = baseGlowOpacity * breath; // Subtle sway var sway = Math.sin(t * 0.4) * 0.0015; bulbSphere.position.x = sway; bulbLight.position.x = sway; glowSphere.position.x = sway; wire.position.x = sway * 0.5; // Camera drift camera.position.x = 0.3 + Math.sin(t * 0.12) * 0.017 + Math.sin(t * 0.5) * 0.003; camera.position.y = 1.5 + Math.sin(t * 0.15) * 0.006 + Math.sin(t * 0.6) * 0.002; renderer.render(scene, camera); } clAnimate(); // ============================================================ // OVERLAYS // ============================================================ // Vignette var clVig = document.createElement('div'); clVig.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;pointer-events:none;z-index:9001;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 45% 45%, transparent 25%, rgba(0,0,0,0.65) 100%);'; clWrap.appendChild(clVig); // Colorwash var clWash = document.createElement('div'); clWash.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;pointer-events:none;z-index:9002;background:linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(8,8,20,0.35) 0%, rgba(5,5,12,0.1) 30%, rgba(5,5,12,0.1) 60%, rgba(8,5,3,0.35) 100%);'; clWrap.appendChild(clWash); // Datestamp var clDate = document.createElement('div'); clDate.textContent = '23.11.73'; clDate.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:18px;right:24px;font:14px monospace;color:rgba(255,140,50,0.4);pointer-events:none;z-index:9003;'; clWrap.appendChild(clDate); // Location var clLoc = document.createElement('div'); clLoc.textContent = 'BENEATH GREEK STREET, SOHO'; clLoc.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;bottom:18px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);font:12px "Courier New",monospace;color:rgba(200,180,140,0.25);letter-spacing:2px;pointer-events:none;z-index:9003;white-space:nowrap;'; clWrap.appendChild(clLoc); // Button var clBtn = document.createElement('div'); clBtn.textContent = "DESCEND TO COPPER'S LAIR"; clBtn.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;bottom:60px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);padding:14px 36px;font:16px "Courier New",monospace;color:rgba(180,170,150,0.85);border:1px solid rgba(180,170,150,0.3);letter-spacing:4px;cursor:pointer;z-index:9004;background:transparent;opacity:0;transition:opacity 2s ease;'; setTimeout(function() { clBtn.style.opacity = '1'; }, 2500); clBtn.addEventListener('mouseenter', function() { clBtn.style.color = 'rgba(210,200,170,0.95)'; clBtn.style.borderColor = 'rgba(180,170,150,0.6)'; }); clBtn.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() { clBtn.style.color = 'rgba(180,170,150,0.85)'; clBtn.style.borderColor = 'rgba(180,170,150,0.3)'; }); clBtn.addEventListener('click', function() { clWrap.style.transition = 'opacity 1.5s ease'; clWrap.style.opacity = '0'; setTimeout(function() { if (clAnimId) cancelAnimationFrame(clAnimId); clAnimId = null; if (clWrap.parentNode) clWrap.parentNode.removeChild(clWrap); var TARGET = "In Copper's lair"; if (window.Engine && Engine.go) { Engine.go(TARGET); } else { var links = document.querySelectorAll('tw-link, .enchantment-link'); for (var i = 0; i < links.length; i++) { if (links[i].textContent.trim() === '·') { links[i].click(); break; } } } }, 1500); }); clWrap.appendChild(clBtn); document.body.appendChild(clWrap); } setInterval(function() { var container = document.getElementById('cl-container'); if (container && !clActive) { initCoppersLair(); } else if (!container) { clActive = false; if (clAnimId) { cancelAnimationFrame(clAnimId); clAnimId = null; } var wrap = document.getElementById('cl-wrap'); if (wrap && wrap.parentNode) wrap.parentNode.removeChild(wrap); } }, 300); })(); // ====== CENTRE POINT SCENE — INLINE ====== (function() { var cpActive = false; var cpAnimId = null; function initCentrePoint() { if (cpActive) return; cpActive = true; if (typeof THREE === 'undefined') { var s = document.createElement('script'); s.src = 'https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/three.js/r128/three.min.js'; s.onload = function() { buildCPScene(); }; document.head.appendChild(s); } else { buildCPScene(); } } function buildCPScene() { var cpWrap = document.createElement('div'); cpWrap.id = 'cp-wrap'; cpWrap.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;z-index:9000;background:#060810;'; // ============================================================ // HELPERS (defined first — used by materials below) // ============================================================ function makeCanvasTexture(w, h, drawFunc) { var c = document.createElement('canvas'); c.width = w; c.height = h; var cx = c.getContext('2d'); drawFunc(cx, w, h); var tex = new THREE.CanvasTexture(c); tex.minFilter = THREE.LinearFilter; return tex; } function placeMesh(geo, mat, x, y, z) { var m = new THREE.Mesh(geo, mat); m.position.set(x, y, z); cpScene.add(m); return m; } // ============================================================ // SCENE SETUP // ============================================================ var cpScene = new THREE.Scene(); cpScene.background = new THREE.Color(0x060810); cpScene.fog = new THREE.Fog(0x060810, 45, 220); var cpCamera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(82, window.innerWidth / window.innerHeight, 0.1, 300); cpCamera.position.set(0.6, 1.2, 5.0); cpCamera.lookAt(0.3, 28, -2); var cpRenderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ antialias: true }); cpRenderer.setSize(window.innerWidth, window.innerHeight); cpRenderer.setPixelRatio(Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio, 2)); cpRenderer.shadowMap.enabled = true; cpRenderer.shadowMap.type = THREE.PCFSoftShadowMap; cpRenderer.toneMapping = THREE.ACESFilmicToneMapping; cpRenderer.toneMappingExposure = 0.55; cpWrap.appendChild(cpRenderer.domElement); window.addEventListener('resize', function() { cpCamera.aspect = window.innerWidth / window.innerHeight; cpCamera.updateProjectionMatrix(); cpRenderer.setSize(window.innerWidth, window.innerHeight); }); // ============================================================ // MATERIALS // ============================================================ // Centre Point's distinctive off-white precast concrete panels // with a slightly grainy aggregate finish — Portland stone dust mixed in var concreteTex = makeCanvasTexture(512, 512, function(cx, w, h) { // Base off-white — not pure white, slightly warm and aged cx.fillStyle = '#cdc8bc'; cx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h); // Aggregate texture — fine pebbled surface for (var i = 0; i < 3000; i++) { var gx = Math.random() * w; var gy = Math.random() * h; var gr = 0.8 + Math.random() * 1.8; var tone = 150 + Math.random() * 60; cx.fillStyle = 'rgba(' + tone + ',' + (tone-5) + ',' + (tone-10) + ',0.35)'; cx.beginPath(); cx.arc(gx, gy, gr, 0, Math.PI * 2); cx.fill(); } // Pollution staining — London grime running down from the top var soot = cx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, h); soot.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(40, 38, 32, 0.18)'); soot.addColorStop(0.2, 'rgba(40, 38, 32, 0.08)'); soot.addColorStop(0.6, 'rgba(0,0,0,0)'); soot.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(40, 38, 32, 0.06)'); cx.fillStyle = soot; cx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h); // Rain streak staining cx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(80, 75, 65, 0.05)'; cx.lineWidth = 1.5; for (var rs = 0; rs < 18; rs++) { cx.beginPath(); var rx = Math.random() * w; cx.moveTo(rx, 0); for (var ry = 0; ry < h; ry += 25) { rx += (Math.random() - 0.5) * 3; cx.lineTo(rx, ry); } cx.stroke(); } }); var concreteMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ map: concreteTex, roughness: 0.88, metalness: 0.0 }); // The dark recessed concrete between the honeycomb cells var recessMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x1a1a18, roughness: 0.92 }); // Dark glass in the honeycomb windows — slightly reflective, 1973 tinted glass var darkGlassTex = makeCanvasTexture(128, 128, function(cx, w, h) { cx.fillStyle = '#080c10'; cx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h); // Faint reflection — sky and light caught in the glass var refl = cx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, w, h); refl.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(60, 70, 90, 0.25)'); refl.addColorStop(0.4, 'rgba(20, 25, 35, 0.10)'); refl.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(5, 8, 12, 0.05)'); cx.fillStyle = refl; cx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h); }); var darkGlass = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ map: darkGlassTex, roughness: 0.15, metalness: 0.55, color: 0x0a0e14 }); // A few windows warmly lit — offices working late var warmGlass = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x1a0c02, roughness: 0.3, emissive: 0xd07020, emissiveIntensity: 0.28 }); // Very faintly lit window — fluorescent strip light, cold var coldGlass = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x080c10, roughness: 0.3, emissive: 0x8090b0, emissiveIntensity: 0.08 }); // Ground pavement var paveTex = makeCanvasTexture(512, 512, function(cx, w, h) { cx.fillStyle = '#484840'; cx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h); // Concrete paving slabs cx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(20, 18, 14, 0.55)'; cx.lineWidth = 3; for (var gx = 0; gx <= w; gx += 128) { cx.beginPath(); cx.moveTo(gx, 0); cx.lineTo(gx, h); cx.stroke(); } for (var gy = 0; gy <= h; gy += 128) { cx.beginPath(); cx.moveTo(0, gy); cx.lineTo(w, gy); cx.stroke(); } // Surface grime and oil stains cx.fillStyle = 'rgba(25, 22, 16, 0.15)'; for (var st = 0; st < 12; st++) { cx.beginPath(); cx.ellipse(Math.random()*w, Math.random()*h, 10+Math.random()*30, 6+Math.random()*18, Math.random()*Math.PI, 0, Math.PI*2); cx.fill(); } }); var paveMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ map: paveTex, roughness: 0.92 }); // ============================================================ // GROUND // ============================================================ var ground = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.PlaneGeometry(60, 60), paveMat); ground.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2; ground.receiveShadow = true; cpScene.add(ground); // ============================================================ // CENTRE POINT TOWER // ============================================================ // The building is a cylindrical-ish tower with a hexagonal/faceted // plan. Each face of the tower has the distinctive deep-set honeycomb // window grid: horizontal bands of precast concrete framing // large trapezoidal glazed bays. // // We build it as a CylinderGeometry core (the structural mass) // then tile the honeycomb facade panels onto the visible faces. var tower = new THREE.Group(); // ----- CORE SHAFT ----- // 34-storey tower. In 1973 it dominated the Tottenham Court Road skyline. // Scale: ~0.7 units per storey, so total ~24 units tall. var STOREYS = 34; var STOREY_H = 0.72; var TOWER_H = STOREYS * STOREY_H; var TOWER_R = 2.8; // Octagonal core — the structural body var coreGeo = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(TOWER_R, TOWER_R + 0.2, TOWER_H, 8, 1); var core = new THREE.Mesh(coreGeo, recessMat); core.position.set(0, TOWER_H / 2, 0); tower.add(core); // ----- HONEYCOMB FACADE PANELS ----- // Centre Point's signature: each storey has deep-set concrete ribs // forming a diamond/hexagonal grid on the facade. // We'll tile this on the front 3 faces of the octagon. // Each honeycomb cell: a concrete surround (thick, projected forward) // with a recessed glass pane inside. // Cell dimensions roughly: 0.65 wide × 0.68 tall var CELL_W = 0.62; var CELL_H = 0.66; var PANEL_DEPTH = 0.18; var GLASS_INSET = 0.12; // The angled faces of the octagon — we'll cover faces at angles: // 0° (front), ±45° (front-flanks), and partially ±90° (sides) var facadeAngles = [0, -45, 45, -90, 90]; var facadeWidths = [5.0, 3.5, 3.5, 2.2, 2.2]; // Random seed for consistent window lighting var winStates = []; for (var w = 0; w < 2000; w++) { var r = Math.random(); winStates.push(r < 0.08 ? 'warm' : r < 0.13 ? 'cold' : 'dark'); } var warmWindows = []; var winIdx = 0; facadeAngles.forEach(function(angleDeg, fi) { var angleRad = angleDeg * Math.PI / 180; var fWidth = facadeWidths[fi]; // Position of this face: on the surface of the octagon var faceDist = TOWER_R * Math.cos(Math.PI / 8); var cols = Math.floor(fWidth / CELL_W); var rows = STOREYS; for (var row = 0; row < rows; row++) { for (var col = 0; col < cols; col++) { // Local position on the face var lx = (col - (cols - 1) / 2) * CELL_W; var ly = (row + 0.5) * CELL_H + 0.5; // Odd rows offset by half a cell — the honeycomb stagger if (row % 2 === 1) lx += CELL_W * 0.5; // Concrete surround (the rib frame around each cell) var surroundGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(CELL_W - 0.04, CELL_H - 0.04, PANEL_DEPTH); var surround = new THREE.Mesh(surroundGeo, concreteMat); // Glass pane — inset behind the surround var glassState = winStates[winIdx % winStates.length]; winIdx++; var glassMat = (glassState === 'warm') ? warmGlass : (glassState === 'cold') ? coldGlass : darkGlass; var glassGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(CELL_W * 0.72, CELL_H * 0.78, 0.04); var glass = new THREE.Mesh(glassGeo, glassMat); glass.position.z = -GLASS_INSET; // The horizontal rib — a thin bar across the bottom of each cell var ribGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(CELL_W, 0.06, PANEL_DEPTH + 0.04); var rib = new THREE.Mesh(ribGeo, concreteMat); rib.position.y = -(CELL_H / 2) + 0.03; // Group the cell var cell = new THREE.Group(); cell.add(surround); cell.add(glass); cell.add(rib); // Position on the face, rotated to sit on the correct face of octagon cell.position.set(lx, ly, faceDist); cell.rotation.y = -angleRad; // Rotate so x-axis aligns with the face var worldPos = new THREE.Vector3(); var cosA = Math.cos(angleRad); var sinA = Math.sin(angleRad); cell.position.set( lx * cosA - 0 * sinA, ly, lx * sinA + faceDist * cosA ); if (glassState === 'warm') { warmWindows.push({ x: cell.position.x, y: ly, z: cell.position.z }); } tower.add(cell); } } }); // ----- PODIUM / BASE ----- // The building sits on a broad podium at street level var podiumGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(7, 2.0, 7); var podium = new THREE.Mesh(podiumGeo, concreteMat); podium.position.set(0, 1.0, 0); tower.add(podium); // Podium overhang / colonnade edge var overhangGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(8.2, 0.25, 8.2); var overhang = new THREE.Mesh(overhangGeo, concreteMat); overhang.position.set(0, 2.1, 0); tower.add(overhang); // Colonnade pillars around the base for (var pi = 0; pi < 8; pi++) { var pa = (pi / 8) * Math.PI * 2; var px = Math.sin(pa) * 3.8; var pz = Math.cos(pa) * 3.8; var pillarGeo = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.15, 0.18, 2.2, 8); var pillar = new THREE.Mesh(pillarGeo, concreteMat); pillar.position.set(px, 1.1, pz); tower.add(pillar); } // ----- ROOF / CROWN ----- // The top of Centre Point has a distinctive recessed plant-room and // a parapet with a slightly different profile var roofSlab = new THREE.Mesh( new THREE.CylinderGeometry(TOWER_R + 0.1, TOWER_R + 0.1, 0.4, 8), concreteMat ); roofSlab.position.set(0, TOWER_H + 0.2, 0); tower.add(roofSlab); // Plant room on roof var plantRoom = new THREE.Mesh( new THREE.BoxGeometry(3.5, 2.5, 3.5), recessMat ); plantRoom.position.set(0, TOWER_H + 1.65, 0); tower.add(plantRoom); // Roof parapet var parapet = new THREE.Mesh( new THREE.CylinderGeometry(TOWER_R + 0.3, TOWER_R + 0.3, 0.3, 8), concreteMat ); parapet.position.set(0, TOWER_H + 0.55, 0); tower.add(parapet); // Aviation warning light on top var warningLight = new THREE.Mesh( new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.12, 8, 6), new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x400000, roughness: 0.3, emissive: 0xff2000, emissiveIntensity: 0.6 }) ); warningLight.position.set(0, TOWER_H + 3.2, 0); tower.add(warningLight); cpScene.add(tower); // ============================================================ // LOWER BUILDING / PODIUM CONTEXT — the smaller block at the base // ============================================================ // Centre Point had a lower surrounding block — shops, service access var lowerBlock = new THREE.Mesh( new THREE.BoxGeometry(10, 5.5, 8), concreteMat ); lowerBlock.position.set(0, 2.75, -3.5); cpScene.add(lowerBlock); // A few windows on the lower block for (var lb = 0; lb < 6; lb++) { var lwx = -3.5 + lb * 1.4; var lwGlass = (Math.random() < 0.3) ? warmGlass : darkGlass; var lwin = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.8, 0.9, 0.06), lwGlass); lwin.position.set(lwx, 3.8, 0.5); cpScene.add(lwin); } // ============================================================ // SKY — night sky with a faint sodium glow on the horizon // ============================================================ // Sky dome var skyGeo = new THREE.SphereGeometry(150, 16, 8); var skyTex = makeCanvasTexture(512, 256, function(cx, w, h) { // Very dark blue-black night sky var skyGrad = cx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, h); skyGrad.addColorStop(0, '#030408'); skyGrad.addColorStop(0.5, '#060810'); skyGrad.addColorStop(0.75, '#0c0e18'); skyGrad.addColorStop(0.85, '#1a1008'); skyGrad.addColorStop(1, '#2a1a08'); cx.fillStyle = skyGrad; cx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h); // Stars — faint cx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.7)'; for (var s = 0; s < 180; s++) { var sx = Math.random() * w; var sy = Math.random() * h * 0.7; var sr = 0.4 + Math.random() * 0.8; cx.beginPath(); cx.arc(sx, sy, sr, 0, Math.PI * 2); cx.fill(); } }); var skyMat = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ map: skyTex, side: THREE.BackSide }); var sky = new THREE.Mesh(skyGeo, skyMat); cpScene.add(sky); // ============================================================ // STARS // ============================================================ var starTex = makeCanvasTexture(64, 64, function(cx, w, h) { var g = cx.createRadialGradient(w/2, h/2, 0, w/2, h/2, w/2); g.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(255,255,255,0.95)'); g.addColorStop(0.12, 'rgba(255,255,255,0.6)'); g.addColorStop(0.4, 'rgba(200,210,255,0.15)'); g.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(0,0,0,0)'); cx.fillStyle = g; cx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h); }); for (var si = 0; si < 220; si++) { var sMat = new THREE.SpriteMaterial({ map: starTex, transparent: true, opacity: 0.3 + Math.random() * 0.7, fog: false }); var sSpr = new THREE.Sprite(sMat); var sTheta = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2; var sPhi = 0.05 + Math.random() * 0.45; var sDist = 90 + Math.random() * 30; sSpr.position.set( Math.sin(sTheta) * Math.sin(sPhi) * sDist, Math.cos(sPhi) * sDist * 0.6 + 15, Math.cos(sTheta) * Math.sin(sPhi) * sDist - 20 ); var sSz = 0.4 + Math.random() * 1.1; sSpr.scale.set(sSz, sSz, 1); cpScene.add(sSpr); } // ============================================================ // TOWER UPLIGHTING — dramatic uplights on the base washing the concrete // ============================================================ var upLight1 = new THREE.SpotLight(0xfff0d0, 1.8, 35, Math.PI / 7, 0.5); upLight1.position.set(-3, 0.5, 4.5); upLight1.target.position.set(-1, 15, 0); cpScene.add(upLight1); cpScene.add(upLight1.target); var upLight2 = new THREE.SpotLight(0xfff0d0, 1.5, 35, Math.PI / 7, 0.5); upLight2.position.set(3, 0.5, 4.5); upLight2.target.position.set(1, 15, 0); cpScene.add(upLight2); cpScene.add(upLight2.target); var upLight3 = new THREE.SpotLight(0xffe8b0, 1.0, 40, Math.PI / 8, 0.6); upLight3.position.set(0, 0.5, 5.5); upLight3.target.position.set(0, 22, 0); cpScene.add(upLight3); cpScene.add(upLight3.target); // ============================================================ // WARM WINDOW GLOW LIGHTS // ============================================================ // Add a few point lights near the warmly lit windows var windowGlows = []; var glowSubset = warmWindows.slice(0, 8); glowSubset.forEach(function(ww) { var wl = new THREE.PointLight(0xd07020, 0.18, 3.5); wl.position.set(ww.x * 0.85, ww.y, ww.z * 0.85 + 0.5); cpScene.add(wl); windowGlows.push(wl); }); // ============================================================ // AVIATION WARNING LIGHT — animated red blink // ============================================================ var avLight = new THREE.PointLight(0xff2000, 0.0, 20); avLight.position.set(0, TOWER_H + 3.3, 0); cpScene.add(avLight); // ============================================================ // AMBIENT + MOON // ============================================================ cpScene.add(new THREE.AmbientLight(0x05060e, 0.12)); var moonLight = new THREE.DirectionalLight(0x1a2255, 0.06); moonLight.position.set(-8, 30, 10); cpScene.add(moonLight); // ============================================================ // FOG SPRITES — ground-level murk // ============================================================ var thickFogTex = makeCanvasTexture(128, 128, function(cx, w, h) { var grad = cx.createRadialGradient(w/2, h/2, 0, w/2, h/2, w/2); grad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(130,125,115,0.28)'); grad.addColorStop(0.5, 'rgba(100, 95, 85,0.12)'); grad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(70, 65, 55, 0)'); cx.fillStyle = grad; cx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h); }); var sodiumFogTex = makeCanvasTexture(128, 128, function(cx, w, h) { var grad = cx.createRadialGradient(w/2, h/2, 0, w/2, h/2, w/2); grad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(220,110,20,0.22)'); grad.addColorStop(0.4, 'rgba(190, 85,14,0.10)'); grad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(140, 55, 8, 0)'); cx.fillStyle = grad; cx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h); }); var fogSprites = []; for (var fi = 0; fi < 50; fi++) { var fMat = new THREE.SpriteMaterial({ map: (fi < 35) ? thickFogTex : sodiumFogTex, transparent: true, opacity: 0.2 + Math.random() * 0.2 }); var fs = new THREE.Sprite(fMat); fs.position.set(Math.random() * 40 - 18, 0.2 + Math.random() * 2.0, Math.random() * 25 - 3); var fsc = 6 + Math.random() * 14; fs.scale.set(fsc, fsc * 0.28, 1); cpScene.add(fs); fogSprites.push({ sprite: fs, baseX: fs.position.x, drift: 0.002 + Math.random() * 0.005, sway: Math.random() * Math.PI * 2, swaySpeed: 0.001 + Math.random() * 0.003, swayAmt: 0.5 + Math.random() * 1.2 }); } // ============================================================ // NEON BLUE LADDER — two rails + cross rungs up the central gap // ============================================================ var LADDER_X = 0.0; var RAIL_SEP = 0.32; var LADDER_Z = TOWER_R + 0.4; var RUNG_COUNT = STOREYS + 2; var RUNG_SPACING = STOREY_H; // Base neon material — shared by rails var neonMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x001833, emissive: new THREE.Color(0x00aaff), emissiveIntensity: 2.2, roughness: 0.15, metalness: 0.0, fog: false }); // LEFT RAIL var leftRail = new THREE.Mesh( new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.055, TOWER_H + 2, 0.055), neonMat ); leftRail.position.set(-RAIL_SEP, (TOWER_H + 2) / 2 + 0.5, LADDER_Z); cpScene.add(leftRail); // RIGHT RAIL var rightRail = new THREE.Mesh( new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.055, TOWER_H + 2, 0.055), neonMat ); rightRail.position.set(RAIL_SEP, (TOWER_H + 2) / 2 + 0.5, LADDER_Z); cpScene.add(rightRail); // RUNGS — flat boxes spanning between the rails, clearly visible face-on var rungMeshes = []; for (var rung = 0; rung < RUNG_COUNT; rung++) { var ry = 0.8 + rung * RUNG_SPACING; var rungMat = neonMat.clone(); var rungMesh = new THREE.Mesh( new THREE.BoxGeometry(RAIL_SEP * 2, 0.07, 0.07), rungMat ); rungMesh.position.set(0, ry, LADDER_Z); cpScene.add(rungMesh); rungMeshes.push(rungMesh); } // Travelling pulse light var pulseLight = new THREE.PointLight(0x00aaff, 0.0, 7); cpScene.add(pulseLight); // Soft base glow pooling at the bottom var ladderBaseGlow = new THREE.PointLight(0x0055cc, 0.5, 10); ladderBaseGlow.position.set(0, 1.5, LADDER_Z + 1); cpScene.add(ladderBaseGlow); // ============================================================ // ANIMATION // ============================================================ var cpClock = new THREE.Clock(); var avBlinkPhase = 0; function cpAnimate() { cpAnimId = requestAnimationFrame(cpAnimate); var t = cpClock.getElapsedTime(); // --- UPLIGHTING — slow breathing, like a building being dramatic --- var upBreath = 0.96 + Math.sin(t * 0.18) * 0.03; upLight1.intensity = 1.8 * upBreath; upLight2.intensity = 1.5 * upBreath; upLight3.intensity = 1.0 * upBreath; // --- AVIATION LIGHT — slow red blink, every ~4 seconds --- avBlinkPhase += 0.016; var avCycle = Math.sin(avBlinkPhase * 0.8); var avOn = avCycle > 0.85; avLight.intensity = avOn ? (avCycle - 0.85) * 12 : 0; warningLight.material.emissiveIntensity = avOn ? 0.8 + (avCycle - 0.85) * 4 : 0.08; // --- WINDOW GLOW PULSE (very slow, nearly static) --- for (var wgi = 0; wgi < windowGlows.length; wgi++) { windowGlows[wgi].intensity = 0.15 + Math.sin(t * 0.08 + wgi * 0.9) * 0.04; } // --- NEON LADDER PULSE --- // A bright pulse travels upward continuously, looping from bottom to top var PULSE_SPEED = 4.5; var pulsePos = (t * PULSE_SPEED) % (RUNG_COUNT + 4); var pulseY = 0.8 + pulsePos * RUNG_SPACING; // Move the travelling point light pulseLight.position.set(LADDER_X, pulseY, LADDER_Z + 0.8); // Each rung brightness: peak when pulse is at that rung, fades off quickly for (var ri = 0; ri < rungMeshes.length; ri++) { var dist = Math.abs(ri - pulsePos); var brightness = Math.max(0, 1.0 - dist * 0.55); // Base flicker on the neon — slow, like a real tube var neonFlicker = 0.88 + Math.sin(t * 1.4 + ri * 0.3) * 0.06 + Math.sin(t * 3.1 + ri * 0.7) * 0.03; rungMeshes[ri].material.emissiveIntensity = (0.5 + brightness * 1.8) * neonFlicker; } // Spine pulses with overall neon flicker var spineFlicker = 0.9 + Math.sin(t * 1.2) * 0.05 + Math.sin(t * 2.8) * 0.03; leftRail.material.emissiveIntensity = 1.0 * spineFlicker; rightRail.material.emissiveIntensity = 1.0 * spineFlicker; // The pulse light intensity peaks at the centre of the travel pulseLight.intensity = 1.2 + Math.sin(t * 1.8) * 0.2; // Base glow breathes slowly ladderBaseGlow.intensity = 0.35 + Math.sin(t * 0.4) * 0.12; // --- FOG DRIFT --- for (var fdi = 0; fdi < fogSprites.length; fdi++) { var f = fogSprites[fdi]; f.sway += f.swaySpeed; f.sprite.position.x = f.baseX + Math.sin(f.sway) * f.swayAmt; f.baseX += f.drift; if (f.baseX > 22) f.baseX = -18; } cpRenderer.render(cpScene, cpCamera); } cpAnimate(); // Vignette var cpVig = document.createElement('div'); cpVig.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;pointer-events:none;z-index:9001;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 45% 45%, transparent 30%, rgba(0,0,0,0.6) 100%);'; cpWrap.appendChild(cpVig); // Datestamp var cpDate = document.createElement('div'); cpDate.textContent = '23.11.73'; cpDate.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:18px;right:24px;font:14px monospace;color:rgba(232,120,24,0.55);pointer-events:none;z-index:9003;'; cpWrap.appendChild(cpDate); // Location var cpLoc = document.createElement('div'); cpLoc.textContent = 'CENTRE POINT, NEW OXFORD STREET, LONDON'; cpLoc.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;bottom:18px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);font:12px "Courier New",monospace;color:rgba(200,180,140,0.4);letter-spacing:2px;pointer-events:none;z-index:9003;white-space:nowrap;'; cpWrap.appendChild(cpLoc); // Button: "CLIMB IT" var cpBtn = document.createElement('div'); cpBtn.textContent = 'CLIMB IT'; cpBtn.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;bottom:60px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);padding:14px 36px;font:16px "Courier New",monospace;color:rgba(200,170,100,0.85);border:1px solid rgba(200,170,100,0.3);letter-spacing:4px;cursor:pointer;z-index:9004;background:transparent;opacity:0;transition:opacity 2s ease;'; setTimeout(function() { cpBtn.style.opacity = '1'; }, 2500); cpBtn.addEventListener('mouseenter', function() { cpBtn.style.color = 'rgba(230,200,120,0.95)'; cpBtn.style.borderColor = 'rgba(200,170,100,0.6)'; }); cpBtn.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() { cpBtn.style.color = 'rgba(200,170,100,0.85)'; cpBtn.style.borderColor = 'rgba(200,170,100,0.3)'; }); cpBtn.addEventListener('click', function() { cpWrap.style.transition = 'opacity 1.5s ease'; cpWrap.style.opacity = '0'; setTimeout(function() { if (cpAnimId) cancelAnimationFrame(cpAnimId); cpAnimId = null; if (cpWrap.parentNode) cpWrap.parentNode.removeChild(cpWrap); var TARGET = 'Centre Point'; if (window.Engine && Engine.go) { Engine.go(TARGET); } else { var links = document.querySelectorAll('tw-link, .enchantment-link'); for (var i = 0; i < links.length; i++) { if (links[i].textContent.trim() === '·') { links[i].click(); break; } } } }, 1500); }); cpWrap.appendChild(cpBtn); document.body.appendChild(cpWrap); } setInterval(function() { var container = document.getElementById('cp-container'); if (container && !cpActive) { initCentrePoint(); } else if (!container) { cpActive = false; if (cpAnimId) { cancelAnimationFrame(cpAnimId); cpAnimId = null; } var wrap = document.getElementById('cp-wrap'); if (wrap && wrap.parentNode) wrap.parentNode.removeChild(wrap); } }, 300); })(); // ============================================================ // OVERLAY ELEMENTS // ============================================================ // Vignette crVig = document.createElement('div'); crVig.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;pointer-events:none;z-index:9001;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 45% 45%, transparent 30%, rgba(0,0,0,0.6) 100%);'; crWrap.appendChild(crVig); // Film grain crGrain = document.createElement('canvas'); crGrain.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;pointer-events:none;z-index:9002;opacity:0.02;mix-blend-mode:overlay;'; crGrain.width = 256; crGrain.height = 256; crWrap.appendChild(crGrain); crGrainCtx = crGrain.getContext('2d'); crGrainFrame = 0; // Colorwash crWash = document.createElement('div'); crWash.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;pointer-events:none;z-index:9002;background:linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(10,8,25,0.3) 0%, rgba(5,5,15,0.08) 30%, rgba(5,5,15,0.08) 60%, rgba(5,3,2,0.4) 100%);'; crWrap.appendChild(crWash); // Datestamp crDate = document.createElement('div'); crDate.textContent = '23.11.73'; crDate.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:18px;right:24px;font:14px monospace;color:rgba(255,140,50,0.4);pointer-events:none;z-index:9003;'; crWrap.appendChild(crDate); // Location crLoc = document.createElement('div'); crLoc.textContent = 'DEAN STREET, SOHO'; crLoc.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;bottom:18px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);font:12px "Courier New",monospace;color:rgba(200,180,140,0.25);letter-spacing:2px;pointer-events:none;z-index:9003;white-space:nowrap;'; crWrap.appendChild(crLoc); // Button crBtn = document.createElement('div'); crBtn.textContent = 'ENTER THE COLONY ROOM'; crBtn.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;bottom:60px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);padding:14px 36px;font:16px "Courier New",monospace;color:rgba(200,170,100,0.85);border:1px solid rgba(200,170,100,0.3);letter-spacing:4px;cursor:pointer;z-index:9004;background:transparent;opacity:0;transition:opacity 2s ease;'; setTimeout(function() { crBtn.style.opacity = '1'; }, 2500); crBtn.addEventListener('mouseenter', function() { crBtn.style.color = 'rgba(230,200,120,0.95)'; crBtn.style.borderColor = 'rgba(200,170,100,0.6)'; }); crBtn.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() { crBtn.style.color = 'rgba(200,170,100,0.85)'; crBtn.style.borderColor = 'rgba(200,170,100,0.3)'; }); crBtn.addEventListener('click', function() { crWrap.style.transition = 'opacity 1.5s ease'; crWrap.style.opacity = '0'; setTimeout(function() { if (crAnimId) cancelAnimationFrame(crAnimId); crAnimId = null; if (crWrap.parentNode) crWrap.parentNode.removeChild(crWrap); var TARGET = 'The Colony Room Door'; if (window.Engine && Engine.go) { Engine.go(TARGET); } else { var links = document.querySelectorAll('tw-link, .enchantment-link'); for (var i = 0; i < links.length; i++) { if (links[i].textContent.trim() === '·') { links[i].click(); break; } } } }, 1500); }); crWrap.appendChild(crBtn); document.body.appendChild(crWrap); } setInterval(function() { var container = document.getElementById('cr-container'); if (container && !crActive) { initColonyRoom(); } else if (!container) { crActive = false; if (crAnimId) { cancelAnimationFrame(crAnimId); crAnimId = null; } var wrap = document.getElementById('cr-wrap'); if (wrap && wrap.parentNode) wrap.parentNode.removeChild(wrap); } }, 300); })(); // ====== COPPER'S LAIR SCENE — INLINE ====== (function() { var clActive = false; var clAnimId = null; function initCoppersLair() { if (clActive) return; clActive = true; if (typeof THREE === 'undefined') { var s = document.createElement('script'); s.src = 'https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/three.js/r128/three.min.js'; s.onload = function() { buildCLScene(); }; document.head.appendChild(s); } else { buildCLScene(); } } function buildCLScene() { var clWrap = document.createElement('div'); clWrap.id = 'cl-wrap'; clWrap.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;z-index:9000;background:#06060a;'; // ============================================================ // SCENE SETUP // ============================================================ var scene = new THREE.Scene(); scene.background = new THREE.Color(0x06060a); scene.fog = new THREE.Fog(0x05050a, 5, 26); var camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(54, window.innerWidth / window.innerHeight, 0.1, 200); camera.position.set(0.3, 1.5, 8.5); camera.lookAt(0, 1.4, -6); var renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ antialias: true }); renderer.setSize(window.innerWidth, window.innerHeight); renderer.setPixelRatio(Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio, 2)); renderer.shadowMap.enabled = true; renderer.shadowMap.type = THREE.PCFSoftShadowMap; renderer.toneMapping = THREE.ACESFilmicToneMapping || THREE.LinearToneMapping; renderer.toneMappingExposure = 0.45; clWrap.appendChild(renderer.domElement); window.addEventListener('resize', function() { camera.aspect = window.innerWidth / window.innerHeight; camera.updateProjectionMatrix(); renderer.setSize(window.innerWidth, window.innerHeight); }); // ============================================================ // MATERIALS // ============================================================ var concreteMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x5a5850, roughness: 0.95 }); var concreteFloor = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x3a3835, roughness: 0.95 }); var concreteDark = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x484540, roughness: 0.9 }); var ceilingMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x4a4038, roughness: 0.9 }); var woodBeam = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x6a4a2a, roughness: 0.85 }); var darkWood = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x3a2515, roughness: 0.8 }); var pipeMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x555550, roughness: 0.6, metalness: 0.3 }); var ironMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x2a2a28, roughness: 0.7, metalness: 0.4 }); var wireMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x888878, roughness: 0.7 }); var bulbGlass = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0xeeeee8, roughness: 0.2, emissive: 0xccbbaa, emissiveIntensity: 0.55, transparent: true, opacity: 0.9 }); var silhouetteMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x0a0a0a, roughness: 0.9 }); var tableMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x2a2018, roughness: 0.85 }); // ============================================================ // HELPERS // ============================================================ function box(group, w, h, d, mat, x, y, z) { var geo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(w, h, d); var m = new THREE.Mesh(geo, mat); m.position.set(x, y, z); m.castShadow = true; m.receiveShadow = true; group.add(m); return m; } function cyl(group, rTop, rBot, h, segs, mat, x, y, z) { var geo = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(rTop, rBot, h, segs); var m = new THREE.Mesh(geo, mat); m.position.set(x, y, z); m.castShadow = true; m.receiveShadow = true; group.add(m); return m; } function makeCanvasTexture(w, h, drawFunc) { var c = document.createElement('canvas'); c.width = w; c.height = h; var cx = c.getContext('2d'); drawFunc(cx, w, h); var tex = new THREE.CanvasTexture(c); tex.minFilter = THREE.LinearFilter; return tex; } // ============================================================ // ROOM DIMENSIONS // ============================================================ var roomLength = 20; var roomWidth = 6; var roomHeight = 2.8; var halfW = roomWidth / 2; var halfL = roomLength / 2; // ============================================================ // FLOOR // ============================================================ var floorGroup = new THREE.Group(); scene.add(floorGroup); var floorTex = makeCanvasTexture(512, 512, function(cx, w, h) { cx.fillStyle = '#3a3835'; cx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h); var i; for (i = 0; i < 200; i++) { var px = Math.random() * w; var py = Math.random() * h; var shade = Math.floor(Math.random() * 20) + 45; cx.fillStyle = 'rgba(' + shade + ',' + shade + ',' + (shade - 5) + ',0.4)'; cx.fillRect(px, py, Math.random() * 30 + 5, Math.random() * 30 + 5); } for (i = 0; i < 8; i++) { cx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(30,28,25,0.5)'; cx.lineWidth = 0.5 + Math.random(); cx.beginPath(); cx.moveTo(Math.random() * w, Math.random() * h); cx.lineTo(Math.random() * w, Math.random() * h); cx.stroke(); } }); var floorMatTex = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ map: floorTex, roughness: 0.95 }); var floor = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.PlaneGeometry(roomWidth, roomLength), floorMatTex); floor.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2; floor.position.set(0, 0, 0); floor.receiveShadow = true; floorGroup.add(floor); // ============================================================ // WALLS // ============================================================ var wallGroup = new THREE.Group(); scene.add(wallGroup); function makeBlockWallTex(w, h) { return makeCanvasTexture(w, h, function(cx, cw, ch) { cx.fillStyle = '#585550'; cx.fillRect(0, 0, cw, ch); var blockH = 32; var blockW = 64; var row, col, ox; for (row = 0; row < ch / blockH + 1; row++) { ox = (row % 2 === 0) ? 0 : blockW / 2; for (col = -1; col < cw / blockW + 1; col++) { var bx = col * blockW + ox; var by = row * blockH; var shade = 75 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 20); cx.fillStyle = 'rgb(' + shade + ',' + (shade - 2) + ',' + (shade - 5) + ')'; cx.fillRect(bx + 1, by + 1, blockW - 2, blockH - 2); cx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(40,38,35,0.7)'; cx.lineWidth = 1.5; cx.strokeRect(bx, by, blockW, blockH); } } var i; for (i = 0; i < 30; i++) { cx.fillStyle = 'rgba(50,45,35,' + (Math.random() * 0.3) + ')'; cx.beginPath(); cx.arc(Math.random() * cw, Math.random() * ch, Math.random() * 30 + 5, 0, Math.PI * 2); cx.fill(); } var d; for (d = 0; d < 6; d++) { var dx = 40 + Math.random() * (cw - 80); var dWidth = 3 + Math.random() * 5; var dLen = ch * (0.4 + Math.random() * 0.6); var grd = cx.createLinearGradient(dx, 0, dx, dLen); grd.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(20,18,12,0.85)'); grd.addColorStop(0.3, 'rgba(25,20,14,0.7)'); grd.addColorStop(0.7, 'rgba(20,18,12,0.4)'); grd.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(20,18,12,0)'); cx.fillStyle = grd; cx.beginPath(); cx.moveTo(dx - dWidth/2, 0); cx.quadraticCurveTo(dx + dWidth, dLen * 0.3, dx - dWidth * 0.3, dLen * 0.6); cx.quadraticCurveTo(dx + dWidth * 0.5, dLen * 0.85, dx, dLen); cx.lineTo(dx + dWidth, dLen); cx.quadraticCurveTo(dx + dWidth * 1.5, dLen * 0.85, dx + dWidth * 1.3, dLen * 0.6); cx.quadraticCurveTo(dx - dWidth * 0.5, dLen * 0.3, dx + dWidth/2, 0); cx.closePath(); cx.fill(); cx.fillStyle = 'rgba(80,75,65,0.2)'; cx.fillRect(dx - dWidth/2, 0, dWidth, 8); } }); } var leftWallTex = makeBlockWallTex(512, 256); var leftWallMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ map: leftWallTex, roughness: 0.9 }); var leftWall = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.PlaneGeometry(roomLength, roomHeight), leftWallMat); leftWall.position.set(-halfW, roomHeight / 2, 0); leftWall.rotation.y = Math.PI / 2; leftWall.receiveShadow = true; wallGroup.add(leftWall); var rightWallTex = makeBlockWallTex(512, 256); var rightWallMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ map: rightWallTex, roughness: 0.9 }); var rightWall = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.PlaneGeometry(roomLength, roomHeight), rightWallMat); rightWall.position.set(halfW, roomHeight / 2, 0); rightWall.rotation.y = -Math.PI / 2; rightWall.receiveShadow = true; wallGroup.add(rightWall); var farWallTex = makeBlockWallTex(512, 256); var farWallMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ map: farWallTex, roughness: 0.9 }); var farWall = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.PlaneGeometry(roomWidth, roomHeight), farWallMat); farWall.position.set(0, roomHeight / 2, -halfL); farWall.receiveShadow = true; wallGroup.add(farWall); var nearWall = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.PlaneGeometry(roomWidth, roomHeight), concreteMat); nearWall.position.set(0, roomHeight / 2, halfL); nearWall.rotation.y = Math.PI; nearWall.receiveShadow = true; wallGroup.add(nearWall); // ============================================================ // CEILING // ============================================================ var ceilGroup = new THREE.Group(); scene.add(ceilGroup); var ceilingTex = makeCanvasTexture(512, 256, function(cx, cw, ch) { cx.fillStyle = '#4a4038'; cx.fillRect(0, 0, cw, ch); var i; for (i = 0; i < 15; i++) { cx.fillStyle = 'rgba(60,50,35,' + (Math.random() * 0.3 + 0.1) + ')'; cx.beginPath(); cx.ellipse(Math.random() * cw, Math.random() * ch, Math.random() * 50 + 20, Math.random() * 20 + 10, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2); cx.fill(); } }); var ceilMatTex = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ map: ceilingTex, roughness: 0.9, side: THREE.DoubleSide }); var ceiling = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.PlaneGeometry(roomWidth, roomLength), ceilMatTex); ceiling.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2; ceiling.position.set(0, roomHeight, 0); ceiling.receiveShadow = true; ceilGroup.add(ceiling); // ============================================================ // JOISTS // ============================================================ var joistGroup = new THREE.Group(); scene.add(joistGroup); var jz; for (jz = -halfL + 1; jz <= halfL - 1; jz += 1.8) { box(joistGroup, roomWidth - 0.2, 0.12, 0.08, woodBeam, 0, roomHeight - 0.06, jz); } box(joistGroup, 0.15, 0.2, roomLength - 0.4, woodBeam, -1.5, roomHeight - 0.1, 0); box(joistGroup, 0.15, 0.2, roomLength - 0.4, woodBeam, 1.5, roomHeight - 0.1, 0); // ============================================================ // SUPPORT POSTS // ============================================================ var postGroup = new THREE.Group(); scene.add(postGroup); box(postGroup, 0.12, roomHeight, 0.12, woodBeam, -1.2, roomHeight / 2, 2); box(postGroup, 0.12, roomHeight, 0.12, woodBeam, 1.2, roomHeight / 2, -2); box(postGroup, 0.12, roomHeight, 0.12, darkWood, -1.2, roomHeight / 2, -5); // ============================================================ // PIPES // ============================================================ var pipeGroup = new THREE.Group(); scene.add(pipeGroup); var pipe1 = cyl(pipeGroup, 0.04, 0.04, roomLength - 2, 8, pipeMat, -halfW + 0.15, roomHeight - 0.3, 0); pipe1.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2; var pipe2 = cyl(pipeGroup, 0.05, 0.05, roomLength - 4, 8, pipeMat, halfW - 0.2, 1.0, -1); pipe2.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2; cyl(pipeGroup, 0.04, 0.04, roomHeight, 8, ironMat, halfW - 0.15, roomHeight / 2, 3); box(pipeGroup, 0.3, 0.3, 0.5, ironMat, halfW - 0.25, roomHeight - 0.5, 1); cyl(pipeGroup, 0.08, 0.08, 0.6, 8, ironMat, halfW - 0.15, roomHeight - 0.5, 0.3); var cp; for (cp = -6; cp < 7; cp += 4) { var cpipe = cyl(pipeGroup, 0.02, 0.02, roomWidth * 0.6, 6, wireMat, 0, roomHeight - 0.15, cp); cpipe.rotation.z = Math.PI / 2; } // ============================================================ // LIGHT BULB // ============================================================ var bulbGroup = new THREE.Group(); scene.add(bulbGroup); var wireGeo = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.005, 0.005, 1.0, 4); var wire = new THREE.Mesh(wireGeo, wireMat); wire.position.set(0, roomHeight - 0.5, 1.5); bulbGroup.add(wire); cyl(bulbGroup, 0.025, 0.02, 0.08, 8, ironMat, 0, roomHeight - 1.04, 1.5); var bulbSphere = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.06, 12, 8), bulbGlass); bulbSphere.position.set(0, roomHeight - 1.12, 1.5); bulbGroup.add(bulbSphere); var bulbLight = new THREE.PointLight(0xccbbaa, 2.5, 25, 1.5); bulbLight.position.set(0, roomHeight - 1.15, 1.5); bulbLight.castShadow = true; bulbLight.shadow.mapSize.set(512, 512); bulbLight.shadow.radius = 8; bulbLight.shadow.bias = -0.002; scene.add(bulbLight); var glowMat = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ color: 0xccbbaa, transparent: true, opacity: 0.1 }); var glowSphere = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.15, 16, 12), glowMat); glowSphere.position.copy(bulbSphere.position); scene.add(glowSphere); // ============================================================ // LIGHTING // ============================================================ var ambientLight = new THREE.AmbientLight(0x0a0810, 0.08); scene.add(ambientLight); var farFill = new THREE.PointLight(0x8090aa, 0.9, 10, 1.5); farFill.position.set(0, 2.2, -halfL + 0.5); scene.add(farFill); var rimLight = new THREE.PointLight(0x506080, 0.4, 8, 2); rimLight.position.set(0.3, 1.2, -halfL + 3.5); scene.add(rimLight); var floorGlow = new THREE.PointLight(0x182030, 0.2, 6, 2); floorGlow.position.set(0, 0.05, -halfL + 4); scene.add(floorGlow); // ============================================================ // TABLE // ============================================================ var tableGroup = new THREE.Group(); scene.add(tableGroup); var tableZ = -halfL + 4.5; var tableY = 0.7; box(tableGroup, 1.4, 0.06, 0.7, tableMat, 0, tableY, tableZ); box(tableGroup, 0.06, tableY, 0.06, darkWood, -0.6, tableY / 2, tableZ - 0.25); box(tableGroup, 0.06, tableY, 0.06, darkWood, 0.6, tableY / 2, tableZ - 0.25); box(tableGroup, 0.06, tableY, 0.06, darkWood, -0.6, tableY / 2, tableZ + 0.25); box(tableGroup, 0.06, tableY, 0.06, darkWood, 0.6, tableY / 2, tableZ + 0.25); // ============================================================ // FIGURES // ============================================================ var figureGroup = new THREE.Group(); scene.add(figureGroup); var womanGroup = new THREE.Group(); womanGroup.position.set(-0.4, 0, tableZ); figureGroup.add(womanGroup); var wBodyGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.26, 0.7, 0.16); var wBody = new THREE.Mesh(wBodyGeo, silhouetteMat); wBody.position.set(0, tableY + 0.12, 0); wBody.castShadow = false; womanGroup.add(wBody); var wHeadGeo = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.09, 12, 8); var wHeadMesh = new THREE.Mesh(wHeadGeo, silhouetteMat); wHeadMesh.position.set(0, tableY + 0.56, 0); wHeadMesh.scale.set(1, 1.15, 0.95); wHeadMesh.castShadow = false; womanGroup.add(wHeadMesh); var manGroup = new THREE.Group(); manGroup.position.set(0.5, 0, tableZ); figureGroup.add(manGroup); var mBodyGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.38, 0.75, 0.2); var mBody = new THREE.Mesh(mBodyGeo, silhouetteMat); mBody.position.set(0, tableY + 0.14, 0); mBody.castShadow = false; manGroup.add(mBody); var mHeadGeo = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.1, 12, 8); var mHeadMesh = new THREE.Mesh(mHeadGeo, silhouetteMat); mHeadMesh.position.set(0, tableY + 0.6, 0); mHeadMesh.scale.set(1, 0.9, 0.95); mHeadMesh.castShadow = false; manGroup.add(mHeadMesh); // ============================================================ // RUG // ============================================================ var rugGroup = new THREE.Group(); scene.add(rugGroup); var rugTex = makeCanvasTexture(512, 512, function(cx, w, h) { cx.fillStyle = '#3a0e0e'; cx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h); var i, j, a; cx.strokeStyle = '#1a0505'; cx.lineWidth = 14; cx.strokeRect(10, 10, w - 20, h - 20); cx.strokeStyle = '#7a5a20'; cx.lineWidth = 6; cx.strokeRect(22, 22, w - 44, h - 44); for (i = 35; i < w - 35; i += 18) { cx.fillStyle = '#5a3818'; cx.fillRect(i, 30, 8, 8); cx.fillRect(i, h - 38, 8, 8); } for (j = 35; j < h - 35; j += 18) { cx.fillStyle = '#5a3818'; cx.fillRect(30, j, 8, 8); cx.fillRect(w - 38, j, 8, 8); } cx.strokeStyle = '#5a1818'; cx.lineWidth = 3; cx.strokeRect(45, 45, w - 90, h - 90); cx.strokeStyle = '#8a7a50'; cx.lineWidth = 1.5; cx.strokeRect(50, 50, w - 100, h - 100); cx.save(); cx.translate(w/2, h/2); cx.rotate(Math.PI / 4); cx.fillStyle = '#4a1510'; cx.fillRect(-65, -65, 130, 130); cx.strokeStyle = '#7a5a28'; cx.lineWidth = 2; cx.strokeRect(-65, -65, 130, 130); cx.fillStyle = '#2a0a08'; cx.fillRect(-40, -40, 80, 80); cx.strokeStyle = '#6a4a20'; cx.lineWidth = 1.5; cx.strokeRect(-40, -40, 80, 80); cx.fillStyle = '#5a2015'; cx.fillRect(-18, -18, 36, 36); cx.restore(); var crnrs = [[120, 120], [w-120, 120], [120, h-120], [w-120, h-120]]; for (i = 0; i < crnrs.length; i++) { cx.save(); cx.translate(crnrs[i][0], crnrs[i][1]); cx.rotate(Math.PI / 4); cx.fillStyle = '#4a1812'; cx.fillRect(-25, -25, 50, 50); cx.strokeStyle = '#6a4a22'; cx.lineWidth = 1.5; cx.strokeRect(-25, -25, 50, 50); cx.fillStyle = '#3a0e0a'; cx.fillRect(-12, -12, 24, 24); cx.restore(); } for (i = 0; i < 8; i++) { for (j = 0; j < 8; j++) { var mx = 80 + i * 48; var my = 80 + j * 48; if (Math.sqrt(Math.pow(mx - w/2, 2) + Math.pow(my - h/2, 2)) < 60) { continue; } if (mx < 55 || mx > w - 55 || my < 55 || my > h - 55) { continue; } cx.fillStyle = '#5a2818'; cx.fillRect(mx - 3, my - 3, 6, 6); cx.strokeStyle = '#6a4020'; cx.lineWidth = 0.5; cx.strokeRect(mx - 3, my - 3, 6, 6); } } for (i = 0; i < 40; i++) { cx.fillStyle = 'rgba(20,10,5,' + (Math.random() * 0.12) + ')'; cx.fillRect(Math.random() * w, Math.random() * h, Math.random() * 30 + 5, Math.random() * 30 + 5); } }); var rugMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ map: rugTex, roughness: 0.92 }); var rug = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.PlaneGeometry(2.8, 4.0), rugMat); rug.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2; rug.position.set(halfW - 1.2, 0.003, 1.5); rug.receiveShadow = true; rugGroup.add(rug); // ============================================================ // SOFA // ============================================================ var sofaGroup = new THREE.Group(); sofaGroup.position.set(halfW - 0.55, 0, 1.5); scene.add(sofaGroup); var chesterRed = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x6a1818, roughness: 0.7 }); var chesterDark = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x4a1010, roughness: 0.75 }); box(sofaGroup, 0.7, 0.35, 1.6, chesterRed, 0, 0.175, 0); box(sofaGroup, 0.6, 0.08, 1.5, chesterRed, 0, 0.39, 0); box(sofaGroup, 0.15, 0.5, 1.6, chesterDark, 0.28, 0.6, 0); box(sofaGroup, 0.6, 0.35, 0.12, chesterDark, 0, 0.5, -0.8); box(sofaGroup, 0.6, 0.35, 0.12, chesterDark, 0, 0.5, 0.8); box(sofaGroup, 0.55, 0.06, 0.16, chesterRed, -0.05, 0.68, -0.8); box(sofaGroup, 0.55, 0.06, 0.16, chesterRed, -0.05, 0.68, 0.8); var tuftTex = makeCanvasTexture(256, 128, function(cx, cw, ch) { cx.fillStyle = '#5a1515'; cx.fillRect(0, 0, cw, ch); var row, col; for (row = 0; row < 5; row++) { for (col = 0; col < 10; col++) { var tx = col * 26 + (row % 2 === 0 ? 0 : 13); var ty = row * 26 + 5; cx.fillStyle = '#3a0a0a'; cx.beginPath(); cx.arc(tx + 13, ty + 13, 4, 0, Math.PI * 2); cx.fill(); cx.strokeStyle = '#4a1212'; cx.lineWidth = 0.8; cx.beginPath(); cx.moveTo(tx, ty + 13); cx.lineTo(tx + 13, ty); cx.lineTo(tx + 26, ty + 13); cx.lineTo(tx + 13, ty + 26); cx.closePath(); cx.stroke(); } } }); var tuftMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ map: tuftTex, roughness: 0.75 }); var tuftPanel = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.PlaneGeometry(1.5, 0.45), tuftMat); tuftPanel.position.set(0.2, 0.6, 0); tuftPanel.rotation.y = -Math.PI / 2; sofaGroup.add(tuftPanel); box(sofaGroup, 0.08, 0.04, 0.08, darkWood, -0.25, 0.02, -0.7); box(sofaGroup, 0.08, 0.04, 0.08, darkWood, -0.25, 0.02, 0.7); box(sofaGroup, 0.08, 0.04, 0.08, darkWood, 0.25, 0.02, -0.7); box(sofaGroup, 0.08, 0.04, 0.08, darkWood, 0.25, 0.02, 0.7); // ============================================================ // DEBRIS // ============================================================ var debrisGroup = new THREE.Group(); scene.add(debrisGroup); cyl(debrisGroup, 0.25, 0.28, 0.7, 10, darkWood, -2.3, 0.35, -1); box(debrisGroup, 0.3, 0.02, 0.2, concreteDark, 1.0, 0.01, 5); box(debrisGroup, 0.15, 0.08, 0.12, ironMat, -0.8, 0.04, 3); // ============================================================ // PUDDLE // ============================================================ var puddleTex = makeCanvasTexture(256, 256, function(cx, cw, ch) { cx.clearRect(0, 0, cw, ch); var grd = cx.createRadialGradient(cw/2, ch/2, 0, cw/2, ch/2, cw/2); grd.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(60,15,12,0.85)'); grd.addColorStop(0.3, 'rgba(70,20,16,0.65)'); grd.addColorStop(0.6, 'rgba(50,16,12,0.45)'); grd.addColorStop(0.85, 'rgba(40,14,10,0.2)'); grd.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(30,10,8,0)'); cx.fillStyle = grd; cx.beginPath(); cx.moveTo(cw * 0.3, ch * 0.15); cx.quadraticCurveTo(cw * 0.7, ch * 0.05, cw * 0.8, ch * 0.3); cx.quadraticCurveTo(cw * 0.9, ch * 0.6, cw * 0.7, ch * 0.8); cx.quadraticCurveTo(cw * 0.5, ch * 0.95, cw * 0.25, ch * 0.75); cx.quadraticCurveTo(cw * 0.1, ch * 0.5, cw * 0.15, ch * 0.3); cx.quadraticCurveTo(cw * 0.2, ch * 0.1, cw * 0.3, ch * 0.15); cx.closePath(); cx.fill(); cx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(50,15,12,0.35)'; cx.lineWidth = 8; cx.lineCap = 'round'; cx.beginPath(); cx.moveTo(cw * 0.6, ch * 0.4); cx.quadraticCurveTo(cw * 0.85, ch * 0.35, cw * 0.9, ch * 0.5); cx.stroke(); cx.lineWidth = 5; cx.beginPath(); cx.moveTo(cw * 0.4, ch * 0.55); cx.quadraticCurveTo(cw * 0.2, ch * 0.7, cw * 0.15, ch * 0.85); cx.stroke(); cx.fillStyle = 'rgba(35,8,6,0.4)'; cx.beginPath(); cx.ellipse(cw * 0.45, ch * 0.45, 30, 22, 0.3, 0, Math.PI * 2); cx.fill(); cx.fillStyle = 'rgba(80,40,35,0.12)'; cx.beginPath(); cx.ellipse(cw * 0.42, ch * 0.4, 18, 12, -0.2, 0, Math.PI * 2); cx.fill(); }); var puddleMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ map: puddleTex, transparent: true, roughness: 0.35, metalness: 0.15, emissive: 0x120403, emissiveIntensity: 0.1 }); var puddle = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.PlaneGeometry(1.6, 1.4), puddleMat); puddle.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2; puddle.position.set(-0.6, 0.006, 4.0); puddle.receiveShadow = true; debrisGroup.add(puddle); // ============================================================ // WIRES // ============================================================ var wireGroup = new THREE.Group();
