scene.add(wireGroup); var wirePts = []; wirePts.push(new THREE.Vector3(0, roomHeight - 1.0, 1.5)); wirePts.push(new THREE.Vector3(0.8, roomHeight - 0.6, 1.5)); wirePts.push(new THREE.Vector3(1.8, roomHeight - 0.3, 1.5)); wirePts.push(new THREE.Vector3(halfW - 0.1, roomHeight - 0.2, 1.5)); var wireCurve = new THREE.CatmullRomCurve3(wirePts); var wirePathGeo = new THREE.TubeGeometry(wireCurve, 20, 0.008, 4, false); var wirePath = new THREE.Mesh(wirePathGeo, wireMat); wireGroup.add(wirePath); var wire2Pts = []; wire2Pts.push(new THREE.Vector3(-halfW + 0.1, roomHeight - 0.15, 5)); wire2Pts.push(new THREE.Vector3(-halfW + 0.15, roomHeight - 0.4, 3)); wire2Pts.push(new THREE.Vector3(-halfW + 0.1, roomHeight - 0.2, 0)); wire2Pts.push(new THREE.Vector3(-halfW + 0.12, roomHeight - 0.5, -3)); var wire2Curve = new THREE.CatmullRomCurve3(wire2Pts); var wire2Geo = new THREE.TubeGeometry(wire2Curve, 20, 0.006, 4, false); wireGroup.add(new THREE.Mesh(wire2Geo, wireMat)); // ============================================================ // ANIMATION // ============================================================ var clock = new THREE.Clock(); var baseBulbIntensity = 2.5; var baseBulbEmissive = 0.55; var baseGlowOpacity = 0.1; function clAnimate() { clAnimId = requestAnimationFrame(clAnimate); var t = clock.getElapsedTime(); // Breathing light instead of pulsing/flickering var breath = 0.97 + Math.sin(t * 0.4) * 0.03; bulbLight.intensity = baseBulbIntensity * breath; bulbGlass.emissiveIntensity = baseBulbEmissive * breath; glowSphere.material.opacity = baseGlowOpacity * breath; // Subtle sway var sway = Math.sin(t * 0.4) * 0.0015; bulbSphere.position.x = sway; bulbLight.position.x = sway; glowSphere.position.x = sway; wire.position.x = sway * 0.5; // Camera drift camera.position.x = 0.3 + Math.sin(t * 0.12) * 0.017 + Math.sin(t * 0.5) * 0.003; camera.position.y = 1.5 + Math.sin(t * 0.15) * 0.006 + Math.sin(t * 0.6) * 0.002; renderer.render(scene, camera); } clAnimate(); // ============================================================ // OVERLAYS // ============================================================ // Vignette var clVig = document.createElement('div'); clVig.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;pointer-events:none;z-index:9001;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 45% 45%, transparent 25%, rgba(0,0,0,0.65) 100%);'; clWrap.appendChild(clVig); // Colorwash var clWash = document.createElement('div'); clWash.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;pointer-events:none;z-index:9002;background:linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(8,8,20,0.35) 0%, rgba(5,5,12,0.1) 30%, rgba(5,5,12,0.1) 60%, rgba(8,5,3,0.35) 100%);'; clWrap.appendChild(clWash); // Datestamp var clDate = document.createElement('div'); clDate.textContent = '23.11.73'; clDate.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:18px;right:24px;font:14px monospace;color:rgba(255,140,50,0.4);pointer-events:none;z-index:9003;'; clWrap.appendChild(clDate); // Location var clLoc = document.createElement('div'); clLoc.textContent = 'BENEATH GREEK STREET, SOHO'; clLoc.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;bottom:18px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);font:12px "Courier New",monospace;color:rgba(200,180,140,0.25);letter-spacing:2px;pointer-events:none;z-index:9003;white-space:nowrap;'; clWrap.appendChild(clLoc); // Button var clBtn = document.createElement('div'); clBtn.textContent = "DESCEND TO COPPER'S LAIR"; clBtn.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;bottom:60px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);padding:14px 36px;font:16px "Courier New",monospace;color:rgba(180,170,150,0.85);border:1px solid rgba(180,170,150,0.3);letter-spacing:4px;cursor:pointer;z-index:9004;background:transparent;opacity:0;transition:opacity 2s ease;'; setTimeout(function() { clBtn.style.opacity = '1'; }, 2500); clBtn.addEventListener('mouseenter', function() { clBtn.style.color = 'rgba(210,200,170,0.95)'; clBtn.style.borderColor = 'rgba(180,170,150,0.6)'; }); clBtn.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() { clBtn.style.color = 'rgba(180,170,150,0.85)'; clBtn.style.borderColor = 'rgba(180,170,150,0.3)'; }); clBtn.addEventListener('click', function() { clWrap.style.transition = 'opacity 1.5s ease'; clWrap.style.opacity = '0'; setTimeout(function() { if (clAnimId) cancelAnimationFrame(clAnimId); clAnimId = null; if (clWrap.parentNode) clWrap.parentNode.removeChild(clWrap); var TARGET = "In Copper's lair"; if (window.Engine && Engine.go) { Engine.go(TARGET); } else { var links = document.querySelectorAll('tw-link, .enchantment-link'); for (var i = 0; i < links.length; i++) { if (links[i].textContent.trim() === '·') { links[i].click(); break; } } } }, 1500); }); clWrap.appendChild(clBtn); document.body.appendChild(clWrap); } setInterval(function() { var container = document.getElementById('cl-container'); if (container && !clActive) { initCoppersLair(); } else if (!container) { clActive = false; if (clAnimId) { cancelAnimationFrame(clAnimId); clAnimId = null; } var wrap = document.getElementById('cl-wrap'); if (wrap && wrap.parentNode) wrap.parentNode.removeChild(wrap); } }, 300); })(); // ============================================================ // OVERLAY ELEMENTS // ============================================================ // Vignette crVig = document.createElement('div'); crVig.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;pointer-events:none;z-index:9001;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 45% 45%, transparent 30%, rgba(0,0,0,0.6) 100%);'; crWrap.appendChild(crVig); // Film grain crGrain = document.createElement('canvas'); crGrain.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;pointer-events:none;z-index:9002;opacity:0.02;mix-blend-mode:overlay;'; crGrain.width = 256; crGrain.height = 256; crWrap.appendChild(crGrain); crGrainCtx = crGrain.getContext('2d'); crGrainFrame = 0; // Colorwash crWash = document.createElement('div'); crWash.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;pointer-events:none;z-index:9002;background:linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(10,8,25,0.3) 0%, rgba(5,5,15,0.08) 30%, rgba(5,5,15,0.08) 60%, rgba(5,3,2,0.4) 100%);'; crWrap.appendChild(crWash); // Datestamp crDate = document.createElement('div'); crDate.textContent = '23.11.73'; crDate.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:18px;right:24px;font:14px monospace;color:rgba(255,140,50,0.4);pointer-events:none;z-index:9003;'; crWrap.appendChild(crDate); // Location crLoc = document.createElement('div'); crLoc.textContent = 'DEAN STREET, SOHO'; crLoc.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;bottom:18px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);font:12px "Courier New",monospace;color:rgba(200,180,140,0.25);letter-spacing:2px;pointer-events:none;z-index:9003;white-space:nowrap;'; crWrap.appendChild(crLoc); // Button crBtn = document.createElement('div'); crBtn.textContent = 'ENTER THE COLONY ROOM'; crBtn.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;bottom:60px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);padding:14px 36px;font:16px "Courier New",monospace;color:rgba(200,170,100,0.85);border:1px solid rgba(200,170,100,0.3);letter-spacing:4px;cursor:pointer;z-index:9004;background:transparent;opacity:0;transition:opacity 2s ease;'; setTimeout(function() { crBtn.style.opacity = '1'; }, 2500); crBtn.addEventListener('mouseenter', function() { crBtn.style.color = 'rgba(230,200,120,0.95)'; crBtn.style.borderColor = 'rgba(200,170,100,0.6)'; }); crBtn.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() { crBtn.style.color = 'rgba(200,170,100,0.85)'; crBtn.style.borderColor = 'rgba(200,170,100,0.3)'; }); crBtn.addEventListener('click', function() { crWrap.style.transition = 'opacity 1.5s ease'; crWrap.style.opacity = '0'; setTimeout(function() { if (crAnimId) cancelAnimationFrame(crAnimId); crAnimId = null; if (crWrap.parentNode) crWrap.parentNode.removeChild(crWrap); var TARGET = 'The Colony Room Door'; if (window.Engine && Engine.go) { Engine.go(TARGET); } else { var links = document.querySelectorAll('tw-link, .enchantment-link'); for (var i = 0; i < links.length; i++) { if (links[i].textContent.trim() === '·') { links[i].click(); break; } } } }, 1500); }); crWrap.appendChild(crBtn); document.body.appendChild(crWrap); } setInterval(function() { var container = document.getElementById('cr-container'); if (container && !crActive) { initColonyRoom(); } else if (!container) { crActive = false; if (crAnimId) { cancelAnimationFrame(crAnimId); crAnimId = null; } var wrap = document.getElementById('cr-wrap'); if (wrap && wrap.parentNode) wrap.parentNode.removeChild(wrap); } }, 300); })(); // ====== COPPER'S LAIR SCENE — INLINE ====== (function() { var clActive = false; var clAnimId = null; function initCoppersLair() { if (clActive) return; clActive = true; if (typeof THREE === 'undefined') { var s = document.createElement('script'); s.src = 'https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/three.js/r128/three.min.js'; s.onload = function() { buildCLScene(); }; document.head.appendChild(s); } else { buildCLScene(); } } function buildCLScene() { var clWrap = document.createElement('div'); clWrap.id = 'cl-wrap'; clWrap.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;z-index:9000;background:#06060a;'; // ============================================================ // SCENE SETUP // ============================================================ var scene = new THREE.Scene(); scene.background = new THREE.Color(0x06060a); scene.fog = new THREE.Fog(0x05050a, 5, 26); var camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(54, window.innerWidth / window.innerHeight, 0.1, 200); camera.position.set(0.3, 1.5, 8.5); camera.lookAt(0, 1.4, -6); var renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ antialias: true }); renderer.setSize(window.innerWidth, window.innerHeight); renderer.setPixelRatio(Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio, 2)); renderer.shadowMap.enabled = true; renderer.shadowMap.type = THREE.PCFSoftShadowMap; renderer.toneMapping = THREE.ACESFilmicToneMapping || THREE.LinearToneMapping; renderer.toneMappingExposure = 0.45; clWrap.appendChild(renderer.domElement); window.addEventListener('resize', function() { camera.aspect = window.innerWidth / window.innerHeight; camera.updateProjectionMatrix(); renderer.setSize(window.innerWidth, window.innerHeight); }); // ============================================================ // MATERIALS // ============================================================ var concreteMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x5a5850, roughness: 0.95 }); var concreteFloor = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x3a3835, roughness: 0.95 }); var concreteDark = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x484540, roughness: 0.9 }); var ceilingMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x4a4038, roughness: 0.9 }); var woodBeam = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x6a4a2a, roughness: 0.85 }); var darkWood = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x3a2515, roughness: 0.8 }); var pipeMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x555550, roughness: 0.6, metalness: 0.3 }); var ironMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x2a2a28, roughness: 0.7, metalness: 0.4 }); var wireMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x888878, roughness: 0.7 }); var bulbGlass = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0xeeeee8, roughness: 0.2, emissive: 0xccbbaa, emissiveIntensity: 0.55, transparent: true, opacity: 0.9 }); var silhouetteMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x0a0a0a, roughness: 0.9 }); var tableMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x2a2018, roughness: 0.85 }); // ============================================================ // HELPERS // ============================================================ function box(group, w, h, d, mat, x, y, z) { var geo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(w, h, d); var m = new THREE.Mesh(geo, mat); m.position.set(x, y, z); m.castShadow = true; m.receiveShadow = true; group.add(m); return m; } function cyl(group, rTop, rBot, h, segs, mat, x, y, z) { var geo = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(rTop, rBot, h, segs); var m = new THREE.Mesh(geo, mat); m.position.set(x, y, z); m.castShadow = true; m.receiveShadow = true; group.add(m); return m; } function makeCanvasTexture(w, h, drawFunc) { var c = document.createElement('canvas'); c.width = w; c.height = h; var cx = c.getContext('2d'); drawFunc(cx, w, h); var tex = new THREE.CanvasTexture(c); tex.minFilter = THREE.LinearFilter; return tex; } // ============================================================ // ROOM DIMENSIONS // ============================================================ var roomLength = 20; var roomWidth = 6; var roomHeight = 2.8; var halfW = roomWidth / 2; var halfL = roomLength / 2; // ============================================================ // FLOOR // ============================================================ var floorGroup = new THREE.Group(); scene.add(floorGroup); var floorTex = makeCanvasTexture(512, 512, function(cx, w, h) { cx.fillStyle = '#3a3835'; cx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h); var i; for (i = 0; i < 200; i++) { var px = Math.random() * w; var py = Math.random() * h; var shade = Math.floor(Math.random() * 20) + 45; cx.fillStyle = 'rgba(' + shade + ',' + shade + ',' + (shade - 5) + ',0.4)'; cx.fillRect(px, py, Math.random() * 30 + 5, Math.random() * 30 + 5); } for (i = 0; i < 8; i++) { cx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(30,28,25,0.5)'; cx.lineWidth = 0.5 + Math.random(); cx.beginPath(); cx.moveTo(Math.random() * w, Math.random() * h); cx.lineTo(Math.random() * w, Math.random() * h); cx.stroke(); } }); var floorMatTex = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ map: floorTex, roughness: 0.95 }); var floor = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.PlaneGeometry(roomWidth, roomLength), floorMatTex); floor.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2; floor.position.set(0, 0, 0); floor.receiveShadow = true; floorGroup.add(floor); // ============================================================ // WALLS // ============================================================ var wallGroup = new THREE.Group(); scene.add(wallGroup); function makeBlockWallTex(w, h) { return makeCanvasTexture(w, h, function(cx, cw, ch) { cx.fillStyle = '#585550'; cx.fillRect(0, 0, cw, ch); var blockH = 32; var blockW = 64; var row, col, ox; for (row = 0; row < ch / blockH + 1; row++) { ox = (row % 2 === 0) ? 0 : blockW / 2; for (col = -1; col < cw / blockW + 1; col++) { var bx = col * blockW + ox; var by = row * blockH; var shade = 75 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 20); cx.fillStyle = 'rgb(' + shade + ',' + (shade - 2) + ',' + (shade - 5) + ')'; cx.fillRect(bx + 1, by + 1, blockW - 2, blockH - 2); cx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(40,38,35,0.7)'; cx.lineWidth = 1.5; cx.strokeRect(bx, by, blockW, blockH); } } var i; for (i = 0; i < 30; i++) { cx.fillStyle = 'rgba(50,45,35,' + (Math.random() * 0.3) + ')'; cx.beginPath(); cx.arc(Math.random() * cw, Math.random() * ch, Math.random() * 30 + 5, 0, Math.PI * 2); cx.fill(); } var d; for (d = 0; d < 6; d++) { var dx = 40 + Math.random() * (cw - 80); var dWidth = 3 + Math.random() * 5; var dLen = ch * (0.4 + Math.random() * 0.6); var grd = cx.createLinearGradient(dx, 0, dx, dLen); grd.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(20,18,12,0.85)'); grd.addColorStop(0.3, 'rgba(25,20,14,0.7)'); grd.addColorStop(0.7, 'rgba(20,18,12,0.4)'); grd.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(20,18,12,0)'); cx.fillStyle = grd; cx.beginPath(); cx.moveTo(dx - dWidth/2, 0); cx.quadraticCurveTo(dx + dWidth, dLen * 0.3, dx - dWidth * 0.3, dLen * 0.6); cx.quadraticCurveTo(dx + dWidth * 0.5, dLen * 0.85, dx, dLen); cx.lineTo(dx + dWidth, dLen); cx.quadraticCurveTo(dx + dWidth * 1.5, dLen * 0.85, dx + dWidth * 1.3, dLen * 0.6); cx.quadraticCurveTo(dx - dWidth * 0.5, dLen * 0.3, dx + dWidth/2, 0); cx.closePath(); cx.fill(); cx.fillStyle = 'rgba(80,75,65,0.2)'; cx.fillRect(dx - dWidth/2, 0, dWidth, 8); } }); } var leftWallTex = makeBlockWallTex(512, 256); var leftWallMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ map: leftWallTex, roughness: 0.9 }); var leftWall = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.PlaneGeometry(roomLength, roomHeight), leftWallMat); leftWall.position.set(-halfW, roomHeight / 2, 0); leftWall.rotation.y = Math.PI / 2; leftWall.receiveShadow = true; wallGroup.add(leftWall); var rightWallTex = makeBlockWallTex(512, 256); var rightWallMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ map: rightWallTex, roughness: 0.9 }); var rightWall = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.PlaneGeometry(roomLength, roomHeight), rightWallMat); rightWall.position.set(halfW, roomHeight / 2, 0); rightWall.rotation.y = -Math.PI / 2; rightWall.receiveShadow = true; wallGroup.add(rightWall); var farWallTex = makeBlockWallTex(512, 256); var farWallMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ map: farWallTex, roughness: 0.9 }); var farWall = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.PlaneGeometry(roomWidth, roomHeight), farWallMat); farWall.position.set(0, roomHeight / 2, -halfL); farWall.receiveShadow = true; wallGroup.add(farWall); var nearWall = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.PlaneGeometry(roomWidth, roomHeight), concreteMat); nearWall.position.set(0, roomHeight / 2, halfL); nearWall.rotation.y = Math.PI; nearWall.receiveShadow = true; wallGroup.add(nearWall); // ============================================================ // CEILING // ============================================================ var ceilGroup = new THREE.Group(); scene.add(ceilGroup); var ceilingTex = makeCanvasTexture(512, 256, function(cx, cw, ch) { cx.fillStyle = '#4a4038'; cx.fillRect(0, 0, cw, ch); var i; for (i = 0; i < 15; i++) { cx.fillStyle = 'rgba(60,50,35,' + (Math.random() * 0.3 + 0.1) + ')'; cx.beginPath(); cx.ellipse(Math.random() * cw, Math.random() * ch, Math.random() * 50 + 20, Math.random() * 20 + 10, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2); cx.fill(); } }); var ceilMatTex = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ map: ceilingTex, roughness: 0.9, side: THREE.DoubleSide }); var ceiling = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.PlaneGeometry(roomWidth, roomLength), ceilMatTex); ceiling.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2; ceiling.position.set(0, roomHeight, 0); ceiling.receiveShadow = true; ceilGroup.add(ceiling); // ============================================================ // JOISTS // ============================================================ var joistGroup = new THREE.Group(); scene.add(joistGroup); var jz; for (jz = -halfL + 1; jz <= halfL - 1; jz += 1.8) { box(joistGroup, roomWidth - 0.2, 0.12, 0.08, woodBeam, 0, roomHeight - 0.06, jz); } box(joistGroup, 0.15, 0.2, roomLength - 0.4, woodBeam, -1.5, roomHeight - 0.1, 0); box(joistGroup, 0.15, 0.2, roomLength - 0.4, woodBeam, 1.5, roomHeight - 0.1, 0); // ============================================================ // SUPPORT POSTS // ============================================================ var postGroup = new THREE.Group(); scene.add(postGroup); box(postGroup, 0.12, roomHeight, 0.12, woodBeam, -1.2, roomHeight / 2, 2); box(postGroup, 0.12, roomHeight, 0.12, woodBeam, 1.2, roomHeight / 2, -2); box(postGroup, 0.12, roomHeight, 0.12, darkWood, -1.2, roomHeight / 2, -5); // ============================================================ // PIPES // ============================================================ var pipeGroup = new THREE.Group(); scene.add(pipeGroup); var pipe1 = cyl(pipeGroup, 0.04, 0.04, roomLength - 2, 8, pipeMat, -halfW + 0.15, roomHeight - 0.3, 0); pipe1.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2; var pipe2 = cyl(pipeGroup, 0.05, 0.05, roomLength - 4, 8, pipeMat, halfW - 0.2, 1.0, -1); pipe2.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2; cyl(pipeGroup, 0.04, 0.04, roomHeight, 8, ironMat, halfW - 0.15, roomHeight / 2, 3); box(pipeGroup, 0.3, 0.3, 0.5, ironMat, halfW - 0.25, roomHeight - 0.5, 1); cyl(pipeGroup, 0.08, 0.08, 0.6, 8, ironMat, halfW - 0.15, roomHeight - 0.5, 0.3); var cp; for (cp = -6; cp < 7; cp += 4) { var cpipe = cyl(pipeGroup, 0.02, 0.02, roomWidth * 0.6, 6, wireMat, 0, roomHeight - 0.15, cp); cpipe.rotation.z = Math.PI / 2; } // ============================================================ // LIGHT BULB // ============================================================ var bulbGroup = new THREE.Group(); scene.add(bulbGroup); var wireGeo = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.005, 0.005, 1.0, 4); var wire = new THREE.Mesh(wireGeo, wireMat); wire.position.set(0, roomHeight - 0.5, 1.5); bulbGroup.add(wire); cyl(bulbGroup, 0.025, 0.02, 0.08, 8, ironMat, 0, roomHeight - 1.04, 1.5); var bulbSphere = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.06, 12, 8), bulbGlass); bulbSphere.position.set(0, roomHeight - 1.12, 1.5); bulbGroup.add(bulbSphere); var bulbLight = new THREE.PointLight(0xccbbaa, 2.5, 25, 1.5); bulbLight.position.set(0, roomHeight - 1.15, 1.5); bulbLight.castShadow = true; bulbLight.shadow.mapSize.set(512, 512); bulbLight.shadow.radius = 8; bulbLight.shadow.bias = -0.002; scene.add(bulbLight); var glowMat = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ color: 0xccbbaa, transparent: true, opacity: 0.1 }); var glowSphere = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.15, 16, 12), glowMat); glowSphere.position.copy(bulbSphere.position); scene.add(glowSphere); // ============================================================ // LIGHTING // ============================================================ var ambientLight = new THREE.AmbientLight(0x0a0810, 0.08); scene.add(ambientLight); var farFill = new THREE.PointLight(0x8090aa, 0.9, 10, 1.5); farFill.position.set(0, 2.2, -halfL + 0.5); scene.add(farFill); var rimLight = new THREE.PointLight(0x506080, 0.4, 8, 2); rimLight.position.set(0.3, 1.2, -halfL + 3.5); scene.add(rimLight); var floorGlow = new THREE.PointLight(0x182030, 0.2, 6, 2); floorGlow.position.set(0, 0.05, -halfL + 4); scene.add(floorGlow); // ============================================================ // TABLE // ============================================================ var tableGroup = new THREE.Group(); scene.add(tableGroup); var tableZ = -halfL + 4.5; var tableY = 0.7; box(tableGroup, 1.4, 0.06, 0.7, tableMat, 0, tableY, tableZ); box(tableGroup, 0.06, tableY, 0.06, darkWood, -0.6, tableY / 2, tableZ - 0.25); box(tableGroup, 0.06, tableY, 0.06, darkWood, 0.6, tableY / 2, tableZ - 0.25); box(tableGroup, 0.06, tableY, 0.06, darkWood, -0.6, tableY / 2, tableZ + 0.25); box(tableGroup, 0.06, tableY, 0.06, darkWood, 0.6, tableY / 2, tableZ + 0.25); // ============================================================ // FIGURES // ============================================================ var figureGroup = new THREE.Group(); scene.add(figureGroup); var womanGroup = new THREE.Group(); womanGroup.position.set(-0.4, 0, tableZ); figureGroup.add(womanGroup); var wBodyGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.26, 0.7, 0.16); var wBody = new THREE.Mesh(wBodyGeo, silhouetteMat); wBody.position.set(0, tableY + 0.12, 0); wBody.castShadow = false; womanGroup.add(wBody); var wHeadGeo = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.09, 12, 8); var wHeadMesh = new THREE.Mesh(wHeadGeo, silhouetteMat); wHeadMesh.position.set(0, tableY + 0.56, 0); wHeadMesh.scale.set(1, 1.15, 0.95); wHeadMesh.castShadow = false; womanGroup.add(wHeadMesh); var manGroup = new THREE.Group(); manGroup.position.set(0.5, 0, tableZ); figureGroup.add(manGroup); var mBodyGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.38, 0.75, 0.2); var mBody = new THREE.Mesh(mBodyGeo, silhouetteMat); mBody.position.set(0, tableY + 0.14, 0); mBody.castShadow = false; manGroup.add(mBody); var mHeadGeo = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.1, 12, 8); var mHeadMesh = new THREE.Mesh(mHeadGeo, silhouetteMat); mHeadMesh.position.set(0, tableY + 0.6, 0); mHeadMesh.scale.set(1, 0.9, 0.95); mHeadMesh.castShadow = false; manGroup.add(mHeadMesh); // ============================================================ // RUG // ============================================================ var rugGroup = new THREE.Group(); scene.add(rugGroup); var rugTex = makeCanvasTexture(512, 512, function(cx, w, h) { cx.fillStyle = '#3a0e0e'; cx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h); var i, j, a; cx.strokeStyle = '#1a0505'; cx.lineWidth = 14; cx.strokeRect(10, 10, w - 20, h - 20); cx.strokeStyle = '#7a5a20'; cx.lineWidth = 6; cx.strokeRect(22, 22, w - 44, h - 44); for (i = 35; i < w - 35; i += 18) { cx.fillStyle = '#5a3818'; cx.fillRect(i, 30, 8, 8); cx.fillRect(i, h - 38, 8, 8); } for (j = 35; j < h - 35; j += 18) { cx.fillStyle = '#5a3818'; cx.fillRect(30, j, 8, 8); cx.fillRect(w - 38, j, 8, 8); } cx.strokeStyle = '#5a1818'; cx.lineWidth = 3; cx.strokeRect(45, 45, w - 90, h - 90); cx.strokeStyle = '#8a7a50'; cx.lineWidth = 1.5; cx.strokeRect(50, 50, w - 100, h - 100); cx.save(); cx.translate(w/2, h/2); cx.rotate(Math.PI / 4); cx.fillStyle = '#4a1510'; cx.fillRect(-65, -65, 130, 130); cx.strokeStyle = '#7a5a28'; cx.lineWidth = 2; cx.strokeRect(-65, -65, 130, 130); cx.fillStyle = '#2a0a08'; cx.fillRect(-40, -40, 80, 80); cx.strokeStyle = '#6a4a20'; cx.lineWidth = 1.5; cx.strokeRect(-40, -40, 80, 80); cx.fillStyle = '#5a2015'; cx.fillRect(-18, -18, 36, 36); cx.restore(); var crnrs = [[120, 120], [w-120, 120], [120, h-120], [w-120, h-120]]; for (i = 0; i < crnrs.length; i++) { cx.save(); cx.translate(crnrs[i][0], crnrs[i][1]); cx.rotate(Math.PI / 4); cx.fillStyle = '#4a1812'; cx.fillRect(-25, -25, 50, 50); cx.strokeStyle = '#6a4a22'; cx.lineWidth = 1.5; cx.strokeRect(-25, -25, 50, 50); cx.fillStyle = '#3a0e0a'; cx.fillRect(-12, -12, 24, 24); cx.restore(); } for (i = 0; i < 8; i++) { for (j = 0; j < 8; j++) { var mx = 80 + i * 48; var my = 80 + j * 48; if (Math.sqrt(Math.pow(mx - w/2, 2) + Math.pow(my - h/2, 2)) < 60) { continue; } if (mx < 55 || mx > w - 55 || my < 55 || my > h - 55) { continue; } cx.fillStyle = '#5a2818'; cx.fillRect(mx - 3, my - 3, 6, 6); cx.strokeStyle = '#6a4020'; cx.lineWidth = 0.5; cx.strokeRect(mx - 3, my - 3, 6, 6); } } for (i = 0; i < 40; i++) { cx.fillStyle = 'rgba(20,10,5,' + (Math.random() * 0.12) + ')'; cx.fillRect(Math.random() * w, Math.random() * h, Math.random() * 30 + 5, Math.random() * 30 + 5); } }); var rugMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ map: rugTex, roughness: 0.92 }); var rug = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.PlaneGeometry(2.8, 4.0), rugMat); rug.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2; rug.position.set(halfW - 1.2, 0.003, 1.5); rug.receiveShadow = true; rugGroup.add(rug); // ============================================================ // SOFA // ============================================================ var sofaGroup = new THREE.Group(); sofaGroup.position.set(halfW - 0.55, 0, 1.5); scene.add(sofaGroup); var chesterRed = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x6a1818, roughness: 0.7 }); var chesterDark = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x4a1010, roughness: 0.75 }); box(sofaGroup, 0.7, 0.35, 1.6, chesterRed, 0, 0.175, 0); box(sofaGroup, 0.6, 0.08, 1.5, chesterRed, 0, 0.39, 0); box(sofaGroup, 0.15, 0.5, 1.6, chesterDark, 0.28, 0.6, 0); box(sofaGroup, 0.6, 0.35, 0.12, chesterDark, 0, 0.5, -0.8); box(sofaGroup, 0.6, 0.35, 0.12, chesterDark, 0, 0.5, 0.8); box(sofaGroup, 0.55, 0.06, 0.16, chesterRed, -0.05, 0.68, -0.8); box(sofaGroup, 0.55, 0.06, 0.16, chesterRed, -0.05, 0.68, 0.8); var tuftTex = makeCanvasTexture(256, 128, function(cx, cw, ch) { cx.fillStyle = '#5a1515'; cx.fillRect(0, 0, cw, ch); var row, col; for (row = 0; row < 5; row++) { for (col = 0; col < 10; col++) { var tx = col * 26 + (row % 2 === 0 ? 0 : 13); var ty = row * 26 + 5; cx.fillStyle = '#3a0a0a'; cx.beginPath(); cx.arc(tx + 13, ty + 13, 4, 0, Math.PI * 2); cx.fill(); cx.strokeStyle = '#4a1212'; cx.lineWidth = 0.8; cx.beginPath(); cx.moveTo(tx, ty + 13); cx.lineTo(tx + 13, ty); cx.lineTo(tx + 26, ty + 13); cx.lineTo(tx + 13, ty + 26); cx.closePath(); cx.stroke(); } } }); var tuftMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ map: tuftTex, roughness: 0.75 }); var tuftPanel = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.PlaneGeometry(1.5, 0.45), tuftMat); tuftPanel.position.set(0.2, 0.6, 0); tuftPanel.rotation.y = -Math.PI / 2; sofaGroup.add(tuftPanel); box(sofaGroup, 0.08, 0.04, 0.08, darkWood, -0.25, 0.02, -0.7); box(sofaGroup, 0.08, 0.04, 0.08, darkWood, -0.25, 0.02, 0.7); box(sofaGroup, 0.08, 0.04, 0.08, darkWood, 0.25, 0.02, -0.7); box(sofaGroup, 0.08, 0.04, 0.08, darkWood, 0.25, 0.02, 0.7); // ============================================================ // DEBRIS // ============================================================ var debrisGroup = new THREE.Group(); scene.add(debrisGroup); cyl(debrisGroup, 0.25, 0.28, 0.7, 10, darkWood, -2.3, 0.35, -1); box(debrisGroup, 0.3, 0.02, 0.2, concreteDark, 1.0, 0.01, 5); box(debrisGroup, 0.15, 0.08, 0.12, ironMat, -0.8, 0.04, 3); // ============================================================ // PUDDLE // ============================================================ var puddleTex = makeCanvasTexture(256, 256, function(cx, cw, ch) { cx.clearRect(0, 0, cw, ch); var grd = cx.createRadialGradient(cw/2, ch/2, 0, cw/2, ch/2, cw/2); grd.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(60,15,12,0.85)'); grd.addColorStop(0.3, 'rgba(70,20,16,0.65)'); grd.addColorStop(0.6, 'rgba(50,16,12,0.45)'); grd.addColorStop(0.85, 'rgba(40,14,10,0.2)'); grd.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(30,10,8,0)'); cx.fillStyle = grd; cx.beginPath(); cx.moveTo(cw * 0.3, ch * 0.15); cx.quadraticCurveTo(cw * 0.7, ch * 0.05, cw * 0.8, ch * 0.3); cx.quadraticCurveTo(cw * 0.9, ch * 0.6, cw * 0.7, ch * 0.8); cx.quadraticCurveTo(cw * 0.5, ch * 0.95, cw * 0.25, ch * 0.75); cx.quadraticCurveTo(cw * 0.1, ch * 0.5, cw * 0.15, ch * 0.3); cx.quadraticCurveTo(cw * 0.2, ch * 0.1, cw * 0.3, ch * 0.15); cx.closePath(); cx.fill(); cx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(50,15,12,0.35)'; cx.lineWidth = 8; cx.lineCap = 'round'; cx.beginPath(); cx.moveTo(cw * 0.6, ch * 0.4); cx.quadraticCurveTo(cw * 0.85, ch * 0.35, cw * 0.9, ch * 0.5); cx.stroke(); cx.lineWidth = 5; cx.beginPath(); cx.moveTo(cw * 0.4, ch * 0.55); cx.quadraticCurveTo(cw * 0.2, ch * 0.7, cw * 0.15, ch * 0.85); cx.stroke(); cx.fillStyle = 'rgba(35,8,6,0.4)'; cx.beginPath(); cx.ellipse(cw * 0.45, ch * 0.45, 30, 22, 0.3, 0, Math.PI * 2); cx.fill(); cx.fillStyle = 'rgba(80,40,35,0.12)'; cx.beginPath(); cx.ellipse(cw * 0.42, ch * 0.4, 18, 12, -0.2, 0, Math.PI * 2); cx.fill(); }); var puddleMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ map: puddleTex, transparent: true, roughness: 0.35, metalness: 0.15, emissive: 0x120403, emissiveIntensity: 0.1 }); var puddle = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.PlaneGeometry(1.6, 1.4), puddleMat); puddle.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2; puddle.position.set(-0.6, 0.006, 4.0); puddle.receiveShadow = true; debrisGroup.add(puddle); // ============================================================ // WIRES // ============================================================ var wireGroup = new THREE.Group(); scene.add(wireGroup); var wirePts = []; wirePts.push(new THREE.Vector3(0, roomHeight - 1.0, 1.5)); wirePts.push(new THREE.Vector3(0.8, roomHeight - 0.6, 1.5)); wirePts.push(new THREE.Vector3(1.8, roomHeight - 0.3, 1.5)); wirePts.push(new THREE.Vector3(halfW - 0.1, roomHeight - 0.2, 1.5)); var wireCurve = new THREE.CatmullRomCurve3(wirePts); var wirePathGeo = new THREE.TubeGeometry(wireCurve, 20, 0.008, 4, false); var wirePath = new THREE.Mesh(wirePathGeo, wireMat); wireGroup.add(wirePath); var wire2Pts = []; wire2Pts.push(new THREE.Vector3(-halfW + 0.1, roomHeight - 0.15, 5)); wire2Pts.push(new THREE.Vector3(-halfW + 0.15, roomHeight - 0.4, 3)); wire2Pts.push(new THREE.Vector3(-halfW + 0.1, roomHeight - 0.2, 0)); wire2Pts.push(new THREE.Vector3(-halfW + 0.12, roomHeight - 0.5, -3)); var wire2Curve = new THREE.CatmullRomCurve3(wire2Pts); var wire2Geo = new THREE.TubeGeometry(wire2Curve, 20, 0.006, 4, false); wireGroup.add(new THREE.Mesh(wire2Geo, wireMat)); // ============================================================ // ANIMATION // ============================================================ var clock = new THREE.Clock(); var baseBulbIntensity = 2.5; var baseBulbEmissive = 0.55; var baseGlowOpacity = 0.1; function clAnimate() { clAnimId = requestAnimationFrame(clAnimate); var t = clock.getElapsedTime(); // Breathing light instead of pulsing/flickering var breath = 0.97 + Math.sin(t * 0.4) * 0.03; bulbLight.intensity = baseBulbIntensity * breath; bulbGlass.emissiveIntensity = baseBulbEmissive * breath; glowSphere.material.opacity = baseGlowOpacity * breath; // Subtle sway var sway = Math.sin(t * 0.4) * 0.0015; bulbSphere.position.x = sway; bulbLight.position.x = sway; glowSphere.position.x = sway; wire.position.x = sway * 0.5; // Camera drift camera.position.x = 0.3 + Math.sin(t * 0.12) * 0.017 + Math.sin(t * 0.5) * 0.003; camera.position.y = 1.5 + Math.sin(t * 0.15) * 0.006 + Math.sin(t * 0.6) * 0.002; renderer.render(scene, camera); } clAnimate(); // ============================================================ // OVERLAYS // ============================================================ // Vignette var clVig = document.createElement('div'); clVig.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;pointer-events:none;z-index:9001;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 45% 45%, transparent 25%, rgba(0,0,0,0.65) 100%);'; clWrap.appendChild(clVig); // Colorwash var clWash = document.createElement('div'); clWash.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;pointer-events:none;z-index:9002;background:linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(8,8,20,0.35) 0%, rgba(5,5,12,0.1) 30%, rgba(5,5,12,0.1) 60%, rgba(8,5,3,0.35) 100%);'; clWrap.appendChild(clWash); // Datestamp var clDate = document.createElement('div'); clDate.textContent = '23.11.73'; clDate.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:18px;right:24px;font:14px monospace;color:rgba(255,140,50,0.4);pointer-events:none;z-index:9003;'; clWrap.appendChild(clDate); // Location var clLoc = document.createElement('div'); clLoc.textContent = 'BENEATH GREEK STREET, SOHO'; clLoc.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;bottom:18px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);font:12px "Courier New",monospace;color:rgba(200,180,140,0.25);letter-spacing:2px;pointer-events:none;z-index:9003;white-space:nowrap;'; clWrap.appendChild(clLoc); // Button var clBtn = document.createElement('div'); clBtn.textContent = "DESCEND TO COPPER'S LAIR"; clBtn.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;bottom:60px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);padding:14px 36px;font:16px "Courier New",monospace;color:rgba(180,170,150,0.85);border:1px solid rgba(180,170,150,0.3);letter-spacing:4px;cursor:pointer;z-index:9004;background:transparent;opacity:0;transition:opacity 2s ease;'; setTimeout(function() { clBtn.style.opacity = '1'; }, 2500); clBtn.addEventListener('mouseenter', function() { clBtn.style.color = 'rgba(210,200,170,0.95)'; clBtn.style.borderColor = 'rgba(180,170,150,0.6)'; }); clBtn.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() { clBtn.style.color = 'rgba(180,170,150,0.85)'; clBtn.style.borderColor = 'rgba(180,170,150,0.3)'; }); clBtn.addEventListener('click', function() { clWrap.style.transition = 'opacity 1.5s ease'; clWrap.style.opacity = '0'; setTimeout(function() { if (clAnimId) cancelAnimationFrame(clAnimId); clAnimId = null; if (clWrap.parentNode) clWrap.parentNode.removeChild(clWrap); var TARGET = "In Copper's lair"; if (window.Engine && Engine.go) { Engine.go(TARGET); } else { var links = document.querySelectorAll('tw-link, .enchantment-link'); for (var i = 0; i < links.length; i++) { if (links[i].textContent.trim() === '·') { links[i].click(); break; } } } }, 1500); }); clWrap.appendChild(clBtn); document.body.appendChild(clWrap); } setInterval(function() { var container = document.getElementById('cl-container'); if (container && !clActive) { initCoppersLair(); } else if (!container) { clActive = false; if (clAnimId) { cancelAnimationFrame(clAnimId); clAnimId = null; } var wrap = document.getElementById('cl-wrap'); if (wrap && wrap.parentNode) wrap.parentNode.removeChild(wrap); } }, 300); })(); // ============================================================ // OVERLAY ELEMENTS // ============================================================ // Vignette crVig = document.createElement('div'); crVig.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;pointer-events:none;z-index:9001;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 45% 45%, transparent 30%, rgba(0,0,0,0.6) 100%);'; crWrap.appendChild(crVig); // Film grain crGrain = document.createElement('canvas'); crGrain.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;pointer-events:none;z-index:9002;opacity:0.02;mix-blend-mode:overlay;'; crGrain.width = 256; crGrain.height = 256; crWrap.appendChild(crGrain); crGrainCtx = crGrain.getContext('2d'); crGrainFrame = 0; // Colorwash crWash = document.createElement('div'); crWash.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;pointer-events:none;z-index:9002;background:linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(10,8,25,0.3) 0%, rgba(5,5,15,0.08) 30%, rgba(5,5,15,0.08) 60%, rgba(5,3,2,0.4) 100%);'; crWrap.appendChild(crWash); // Datestamp crDate = document.createElement('div'); crDate.textContent = '23.11.73'; crDate.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:18px;right:24px;font:14px monospace;color:rgba(255,140,50,0.4);pointer-events:none;z-index:9003;'; crWrap.appendChild(crDate); // Location crLoc = document.createElement('div'); crLoc.textContent = 'DEAN STREET, SOHO'; crLoc.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;bottom:18px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);font:12px "Courier New",monospace;color:rgba(200,180,140,0.25);letter-spacing:2px;pointer-events:none;z-index:9003;white-space:nowrap;'; crWrap.appendChild(crLoc); // Button crBtn = document.createElement('div'); crBtn.textContent = 'ENTER THE COLONY ROOM'; crBtn.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;bottom:60px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);padding:14px 36px;font:16px "Courier New",monospace;color:rgba(200,170,100,0.85);border:1px solid rgba(200,170,100,0.3);letter-spacing:4px;cursor:pointer;z-index:9004;background:transparent;opacity:0;transition:opacity 2s ease;'; setTimeout(function() { crBtn.style.opacity = '1'; }, 2500); crBtn.addEventListener('mouseenter', function() { crBtn.style.color = 'rgba(230,200,120,0.95)'; crBtn.style.borderColor = 'rgba(200,170,100,0.6)'; }); crBtn.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() { crBtn.style.color = 'rgba(200,170,100,0.85)'; crBtn.style.borderColor = 'rgba(200,170,100,0.3)'; }); crBtn.addEventListener('click', function() { crWrap.style.transition = 'opacity 1.5s ease'; crWrap.style.opacity = '0'; setTimeout(function() { if (crAnimId) cancelAnimationFrame(crAnimId); crAnimId = null; if (crWrap.parentNode) crWrap.parentNode.removeChild(crWrap); var TARGET = 'The Colony Room Door'; if (window.Engine && Engine.go) { Engine.go(TARGET); } else { var links = document.querySelectorAll('tw-link, .enchantment-link'); for (var i = 0; i < links.length; i++) { if (links[i].textContent.trim() === '·') { links[i].click(); break; } } } }, 1500); }); crWrap.appendChild(crBtn); document.body.appendChild(crWrap); } setInterval(function() { var container = document.getElementById('cr-container'); if (container && !crActive) { initColonyRoom(); } else if (!container) { crActive = false; if (crAnimId) { cancelAnimationFrame(crAnimId); crAnimId = null; } var wrap = document.getElementById('cr-wrap'); if (wrap && wrap.parentNode) wrap.parentNode.removeChild(wrap); } }, 300); })(); <div id="cp-container"></div>[[·|Centre Point]] <span id="pp-data-opponent" style="display:none;">(print: $opponent)</span> <span id="pp-data-sobriety" style="display:none;">(print: $sobriety)</span> <div class="pp-arena"> <div class="pp-score" id="score-display">YOU 0 — 0 (print: $opponent)</div> <canvas id="pong-canvas" width="540" height="340"></canvas> <div id="pp-narrative"></div> <div id="pp-game-end"></div> <div id="pp-instructions" style="text-align:center;color:#5a7a5a;font-size:0.8em;margin-top:0.8em;letter-spacing:0.1em;">Move mouse to control paddle</div> </div> <span id="pp-go-win" style="display:none;">[[Victory|PP Victory]]</span> <span id="pp-go-lose" style="display:none;">[[Defeat|PP Defeat]]</span> <script> (function(){ var opponent = (document.getElementById('pp-data-opponent') || {}).textContent || 'Opponent'; var sobriety = parseInt((document.getElementById('pp-data-sobriety') || {}).textContent) || 55; var W = 540, H = 340; var canvas = document.getElementById('pong-canvas'); var ctx = canvas.getContext('2d'); var playerScore = 0, oppScore = 0, round = 0; var gameOver = false, paused = false, serving = true, serveTime = Date.now(); var ball = {x:W/2,y:H/2,dx:0,dy:0,r:5,base:3.2}; var pPad = {x:12,y:H/2-35,w:8,h:70}; var oPad = {x:W-20,y:H/2-35,w:8,h:70}; var mouseY = H/2, actualY = pPad.y; var aiTarget = H/2, aiLast = 0; var narr = { Harsent:{ win:["Harsent nods. A veteran's approval.","Your shot surprises you both.","Even the poet blinks.","A clean winner. Harsent says nothing."], lose:["Harsent places it where you aren't. He's done this before.","The ball passes you like a rumour.","Harsent smiles, unhurried. A poet's patience.","He reads you like a manuscript."] }, Clegg:{ win:["Clegg overcommits. Wild swing, clean miss.","His brilliance undoes him.","Too much angle. Clegg curses.","Speed without direction is just noise."], lose:["Clegg smashes it. You never saw it.","A wild shot that somehow finds the corner.","Clegg whoops. The cellar echoes.","He plays like a man with nothing to lose."] } }; function setupInput(){ function h(cy){var r=canvas.getBoundingClientRect();mouseY=(cy-r.top)*(H/r.height);} canvas.addEventListener('mousemove',function(e){h(e.clientY);}); canvas.addEventListener('touchmove',function(e){e.preventDefault();h(e.touches[0].clientY);},{passive:false}); document.addEventListener('mousemove',function(e){var r=canvas.getBoundingClientRect();if(e.clientY>=r.top&&e.clientY<=r.bottom)h(e.clientY);}); } function serve(){ ball.x=W/2;ball.y=H/2; var sp=ball.base+round*0.25;var a=(Math.random()-0.5)*0.8;var d=(round%2===0)?-1:1; ball.dx=d*sp*Math.cos(a);ball.dy=sp*Math.sin(a); serving=true;serveTime=Date.now();round++; } function updateScore(){ var el=document.getElementById('score-display'); if(el)el.textContent='YOU '+playerScore+' \u2014 '+oppScore+' '+opponent.toUpperCase(); } function showNarrative(pw){ var lines=pw?narr[opponent].win:narr[opponent].lose; var line=lines[Math.floor(Math.random()*lines.length)]; var el=document.getElementById('pp-narrative'); if(!el)return; el.style.cssText='text-align:center;color:#b0d0b0;font-size:0.9em;font-style:italic;margin-top:1em;min-height:1.5em;'; el.style.opacity='1';el.textContent=line; if(sobriety<30&&Math.random()<0.4)el.textContent=line+' Your vision swims.'; } function updatePlayer(){ var ty=mouseY-pPad.h/2; if(sobriety<25){ty+=(Math.random()-0.5)*40;if(Math.random()<0.15)return;actualY+=(ty-actualY)*0.06;} else if(sobriety<50){ty+=(Math.random()-0.5)*15;actualY+=(ty-actualY)*0.12;} else{actualY+=(ty-actualY)*0.25;} pPad.y=Math.max(0,Math.min(H-pPad.h,actualY)); } function updateAI(){ var now=Date.now(); if(opponent==='Harsent'){ if(now-aiLast<100)return;aiLast=now; var py=ball.y; if(ball.dx>0){var f=(oPad.x-ball.x)/ball.dx;py=ball.y+ball.dy*f;while(py<0||py>H){if(py<0)py=-py;if(py>H)py=2*H-py;}} py+=(Math.random()-0.5)*20;aiTarget=py; var sp=3.2,c=oPad.y+oPad.h/2,d=aiTarget-c; if(Math.abs(d)>5)oPad.y+=Math.sign(d)*Math.min(sp,Math.abs(d)); }else{ if(now-aiLast<50)return;aiLast=now; var py=ball.y+ball.dy*8;py+=(Math.random()-0.5)*50; if(Math.random()<0.15){var f=ball.dx>0?(oPad.x-ball.x)/ball.dx:30;py=ball.y+ball.dy*f;while(py<0||py>H){if(py<0)py=-py;if(py>H)py=2*H-py;}} aiTarget=py; var sp=5,c=oPad.y+oPad.h/2,d=aiTarget-c; if(Math.abs(d)>3)oPad.y+=Math.sign(d)*Math.min(sp,Math.abs(d)); } oPad.y=Math.max(0,Math.min(H-oPad.h,oPad.y)); } function updateBall(){ if(serving){if(Date.now()-serveTime<800)return;serving=false;} ball.x+=ball.dx;ball.y+=ball.dy; if(ball.y-ball.r<0){ball.y=ball.r;ball.dy=Math.abs(ball.dy);} if(ball.y+ball.r>H){ball.y=H-ball.r;ball.dy=-Math.abs(ball.dy);} if(ball.dx<0&&ball.x-ball.r<=pPad.x+pPad.w&&ball.x+ball.r>=pPad.x&&ball.y>=pPad.y&&ball.y<=pPad.y+pPad.h){ var hp=(ball.y-pPad.y)/pPad.h;var a=(hp-0.5)*Math.PI*0.6; var sp=Math.min(Math.sqrt(ball.dx*ball.dx+ball.dy*ball.dy)*1.05,7); ball.dx=sp*Math.cos(a);ball.dy=sp*Math.sin(a);ball.x=pPad.x+pPad.w+ball.r; } if(ball.dx>0&&ball.x+ball.r>=oPad.x&&ball.x-ball.r<=oPad.x+oPad.w&&ball.y>=oPad.y&&ball.y<=oPad.y+oPad.h){ var hp=(ball.y-oPad.y)/oPad.h;var am=opponent==='Clegg'?0.8:0.6; var a=Math.PI-(hp-0.5)*Math.PI*am; var sp=Math.min(Math.sqrt(ball.dx*ball.dx+ball.dy*ball.dy)*1.05,7); ball.dx=sp*Math.cos(a);ball.dy=sp*Math.sin(a);ball.x=oPad.x-ball.r; } if(ball.x<-20){oppScore++;pointEnd(false);} else if(ball.x>W+20){playerScore++;pointEnd(true);} } function pointEnd(pw){ updateScore();showNarrative(pw);paused=true; if(playerScore>=3||oppScore>=3){endGame(playerScore>=3);return;} setTimeout(function(){paused=false;document.getElementById('pp-narrative').style.opacity='0';serve();},2200); } function endGame(pw){ gameOver=true; var el=document.getElementById('pp-game-end'); var inst=document.getElementById('pp-instructions');if(inst)inst.style.display='none'; if(el){ el.style.cssText='text-align:center;font-family:Courier New,monospace;font-size:1.4em;margin-top:0.5em;min-height:1.5em;'; if(pw)el.innerHTML='<span style="color:#aaffaa;text-shadow:0 0 15px rgba(170,255,170,0.6);">\u2605 VICTORY \u2605</span>'; else el.innerHTML='<span style="color:#ffaaaa;text-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(255,170,170,0.4);">DEFEAT</span>'; } setTimeout(function(){ var sel=pw?'#pp-go-win tw-link':'#pp-go-lose tw-link'; var link=document.querySelector(sel);if(link)link.click(); },2000); } function draw(){ ctx.fillStyle='#0a1a0a';ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H); ctx.strokeStyle='#2a4a2a';ctx.lineWidth=1;ctx.setLineDash([6,6]); ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(W/2,0);ctx.lineTo(W/2,H);ctx.stroke();ctx.setLineDash([]); ctx.fillStyle='#3a5a3a';ctx.fillRect(W/2-2,0,4,6);ctx.fillRect(W/2-2,H-6,4,6); ctx.shadowColor='rgba(170,255,170,0.6)';ctx.shadowBlur=12;ctx.fillStyle='#aaffaa'; ctx.fillRect(pPad.x,pPad.y,pPad.w,pPad.h); ctx.shadowColor='rgba(255,170,170,0.4)';ctx.shadowBlur=10;ctx.fillStyle='#ffaaaa'; ctx.fillRect(oPad.x,oPad.y,oPad.w,oPad.h); ctx.shadowColor='rgba(122,234,122,0.9)';ctx.shadowBlur=14;ctx.fillStyle='#7aea7a'; ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(ball.x,ball.y,ball.r,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill(); ctx.shadowBlur=0; if(sobriety<30){var g=ctx.createRadialGradient(W/2,H/2,H*0.3,W/2,H/2,H*0.7);g.addColorStop(0,'rgba(0,0,0,0)');g.addColorStop(1,'rgba(0,0,0,0.35)');ctx.fillStyle=g;ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);} if(serving){ctx.fillStyle='rgba(122,234,122,0.4)';ctx.font='14px Courier New';ctx.textAlign='center';ctx.fillText('\u00b7 \u00b7 \u00b7',W/2,H/2+40);} } function loop(){ if(!gameOver){if(!paused){updatePlayer();updateAI();updateBall();}draw();requestAnimationFrame(loop);} else{draw();} } setupInput();serve();updateScore();loop(); })(); </script> (set: _divHTML to '<div class="deco-divider"><svg viewBox="0 0 300 28" width="100%" height="28" style="display:block;margin:0.6em auto;max-width:420px;overflow:visible"><line x1="10" y1="12.5" x2="122" y2="12.5" stroke="#d4a574" stroke-width="1.4" opacity="0.55"/><line x1="10" y1="16" x2="122" y2="16" stroke="#d4a574" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.28"/><path d="M130,14 L134,9 L138,14 L134,19 Z" fill="none" stroke="#d4a574" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.55"/><path d="M150,4 L161,14 L150,24 L139,14 Z" fill="none" stroke="#d4a574" stroke-width="1.1" opacity="0.65"/><path d="M150,9 L157,14 L150,19 L143,14 Z" fill="#d4a574" opacity="0.18"/><circle cx="150" cy="14" r="1.2" fill="#d4a574" opacity="0.5"/><path d="M170,14 L166,9 L162,14 L166,19 Z" fill="none" stroke="#d4a574" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.55"/><line x1="178" y1="12.5" x2="290" y2="12.5" stroke="#d4a574" stroke-width="1.4" opacity="0.55"/><line x1="178" y1="16" x2="290" y2="16" stroke="#d4a574" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.28"/></svg></div>')\ (print: _divHTML) (set: $usedLiver to true)\ (set: $confidence to $confidence + 15)\ (set: $sobriety to $sobriety + 12) <div class="verse"> To love, and bear; to hope till Hope creates<br> From its own wreck the thing it contemplates; </div> [[Dean Street|Dean Street]] (set: _bells to 5 - $lilyCount)\ (set: _sobrClass to (cond: $sobriety < 20, ' lily-drowning', $sobriety < 40, ' lily-fading', $sobriety < 60, ' lily-dimming', ''))\ (set: _svgHTML to '<div class="lily-prompt' + _sobrClass + '"><svg class="lily-icon-svg lily-bells-' + (text: _bells) + '" viewBox="0 0 85 95" ><path d="M16 90 Q14 58, 20 38 Q28 16, 45 6 Q56 -2, 66 4 Q72 8, 70 16" fill="none" stroke="#7a9a6a" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M16 90 Q4 65, 10 45 Q14 56, 18 72 Z" fill="#5a7a4a" opacity="0.7"/><path d="M16 90 Q26 66, 24 48 Q20 56, 17 72 Z" fill="#6a8a5a" opacity="0.6"/><g class="lily-bell-1"><path d="M69 14 Q70 18, 68 22" fill="none" stroke="#7a9a6a" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.6"/><path d="M68 22 Q64 25, 63 30 Q66 32, 68 30 Q71 32, 73 30 Q72 25, 68 22 Z" fill="#e8ddd0" opacity="0.5"/></g><g class="lily-bell-2"><path d="M62 6 Q64 12, 62 16" fill="none" stroke="#7a9a6a" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.6"/><path d="M62 16 Q58 19, 57 24 Q60 26, 63 24 Q66 26, 68 24 Q67 19, 63 16 Z" fill="#e8ddd0" opacity="0.55"/><circle cx="62" cy="24" r="0.5" fill="#d4b8e0" opacity="0.3"/></g><g class="lily-bell-3"><path d="M52 6 Q54 14, 55 18" fill="none" stroke="#7a9a6a" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.6"/><path d="M55 18 Q50 22, 49 28 Q52 30, 56 28 Q60 30, 62 28 Q61 22, 57 18 Z" fill="#e8ddd0" opacity="0.65"/><circle cx="55" cy="28" r="0.5" fill="#d4b8e0" opacity="0.4"/></g><g class="lily-bell-4"><path d="M42 12 Q44 22, 46 28" fill="none" stroke="#7a9a6a" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.6"/><path d="M46 28 Q41 32, 40 38 Q43 40, 47 39 Q51 40, 53 38 Q52 32, 48 28 Z" fill="#e8ddd0" opacity="0.85"/><circle cx="46" cy="38" r="0.7" fill="#d4b8e0" opacity="0.5"/></g><g class="lily-bell-5"><path d="M34 22 Q36 32, 37 38" fill="none" stroke="#7a9a6a" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.6"/><path d="M37 38 Q32 42, 31 48 Q34 50, 38 49 Q42 50, 44 48 Q43 42, 39 38 Z" fill="#e8ddd0" opacity="0.75"/><circle cx="37" cy="48" r="0.6" fill="#d4b8e0" opacity="0.4"/></g></svg></div>')\ (print: _svgHTML) <div class="ronnies-scene"> <div class="ronnies-spot"></div> <div class="ronnies-cone"></div> <svg class="ronnies-rule" viewBox="0 0 300 20" width="100%" height="20" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><linearGradient id="rnG" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#6888b8" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="22%" stop-color="#8aacdc" stop-opacity="0.75"/><stop offset="50%" stop-color="#aac8f0" stop-opacity="0.90"/><stop offset="78%" stop-color="#8aacdc" stop-opacity="0.75"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#6888b8" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="rnGd" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#405880" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="25%" stop-color="#6070a0" stop-opacity="0.45"/><stop offset="75%" stop-color="#6070a0" stop-opacity="0.45"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#405880" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient><!-- Warm stage-light bleed above the main rule --><radialGradient id="rnSpill" cx="50%" cy="100%" r="60%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#e8c060" stop-opacity="0.18"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#e8c060" stop-opacity="0"/></radialGradient></defs><!-- Stage-light spill glow above the rule --><rect x="30" y="0" width="240" height="22" fill="url(#rnSpill)"/><!-- Fine upper shadow line --><line x1="0" y1="18" x2="300" y2="18" stroke="url(#rnGd)" stroke-width="0.7"/><!-- Main bright rule --><line x1="0" y1="22" x2="300" y2="22" stroke="url(#rnG)" stroke-width="2.2"/><!-- Subtle secondary line beneath --><line x1="0" y1="25" x2="300" y2="25" stroke="url(#rnGd)" stroke-width="0.8"/><!-- Small diamond at centre — like a stage footlight marker --><polygon points="150,19 153,22 150,25 147,22" fill="#aac8f0" opacity="0.7"/><!-- Two flanking dots --><circle cx="100" cy="22" r="1.2" fill="#8aacdc" opacity="0.5"/><circle cx="200" cy="22" r="1.2" fill="#8aacdc" opacity="0.5"/></svg> Wild Turkey. Good. **What glass?** [[Tumbler (wide, heavy)|RS Glass Wrong]] [[Tulip glass (small, curved)|RS Glass Right]] [[Highball (tall)|RS Glass Wrong]] <svg class="ronnies-rule" viewBox="0 0 300 14" width="100%" height="14" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><linearGradient id="rnG2" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#6888b8" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="22%" stop-color="#8aacdc" stop-opacity="0.75"/><stop offset="50%" stop-color="#aac8f0" stop-opacity="0.90"/><stop offset="78%" stop-color="#8aacdc" stop-opacity="0.75"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#6888b8" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="rnGd2" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#405880" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="25%" stop-color="#6070a0" stop-opacity="0.45"/><stop offset="75%" stop-color="#6070a0" stop-opacity="0.45"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#405880" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient></defs><line x1="0" y1="4" x2="300" y2="4" stroke="url(#rnGd2)" stroke-width="0.7"/><line x1="0" y1="7" x2="300" y2="7" stroke="url(#rnG2)" stroke-width="2.2"/><line x1="0" y1="10" x2="300" y2="10" stroke="url(#rnGd2)" stroke-width="0.8"/><polygon points="150,4 <svg class="colony-fan" viewBox="0 0 300 52" width="100%" height="52" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><clipPath id="cf1"><rect x="0" y="0" width="300" height="50"/></clipPath><linearGradient id="cfL" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#7aaa60" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="50%" stop-color="#9a8a30" stop-opacity="0.75"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#7aaa60" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient></defs><g clip-path="url(#cf1)" opacity="0.35"><line x1="150" y1="54" x2="0" y2="0" stroke="#7aaa60" stroke-width="0.8"/><line x1="150" y1="54" x2="33" y2="0" stroke="#8a9a50" stroke-width="0.8"/><line x1="150" y1="54" x2="67" y2="0" stroke="#7aaa60" stroke-width="0.8"/><line x1="150" y1="54" x2="100" y2="0" stroke="#9a8a30" stroke-width="0.8"/><line x1="150" y1="54" x2="133" y2="0" stroke="#7aaa60" stroke-width="0.8"/><line x1="150" y1="54" x2="150" y2="0" stroke="#c8b860" stroke-width="1.0"/><line x1="150" y1="54" x2="167" y2="0" stroke="#7aaa60" stroke-width="0.8"/><line x1="150" y1="54" x2="200" y2="0" stroke="#9a8a30" stroke-width="0.8"/><line x1="150" y1="54" x2="233" y2="0" stroke="#7aaa60" stroke-width="0.8"/><line x1="150" y1="54" x2="267" y2="0" stroke="#8a9a50" stroke-width="0.8"/><line x1="150" y1="54" x2="300" y2="0" stroke="#7aaa60" stroke-width="0.8"/></g><line x1="0" y1="44" x2="300" y2="44" stroke="url(#cfL)" stroke-width="0.6"/><line x1="0" y1="48" x2="300" y2="48" stroke="url(#cfL)" stroke-width="1.8"/><polygon points="150,41 155,45 150,49 145,45" fill="#c8b860" opacity="0.65"/><polygon points="120,45 123,48 120,51 117,48" fill="none" stroke="#7aaa60" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.45"/><polygon points="180,45 183,48 180,51 177,48" fill="none" stroke="#7aaa60" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.45"/></svg> (set: $sobriety to $sobriety - 25) He's wearing a suit that was probably clean this morning, which meant he'd been home and changed, but was now beginning to crumple in sympathy with his mood. 'Not interested,' he says, to an audience that is both somehow the whole world and you alone. The accent is Anglo-Australian; too clipped and politic for his homeland, yet still straying at its edges into an outback. 'I gave a reading last night in Oxford. Magnificent, actually. Met a girl. She was pretty and working on her D.Phil. at Magdalen, on Shakespeare and Co.; I thought I was there. Wore the suit. Bought a bottle of wine. Met her at the Pillars.' He drinks, you drink, and he seems now to notice you more distinctly, as if drawing his whole, traversable world into a private audience. 'She didn't touch a drop of it. Do you know Martin Lackland? Office on Frith Street?' You do. You used to wake up on the sofa in his mother's house when you were both seventeen. 'I'll tell you something because I like the way you are. Everyone sees him front-of-house, but the real business happens in the back. Password's //Valletta//. Don't ask me how I know. I know everything and none of it helps.' He straightens the suit again. That doesn't help either. 'You didn't hear it from me. I'm not here. I'm in Oxford, being adored.' (set: $knowsCopperSecret to true)\ (set: $knowsLackland to true) <div class="lore-box"> <strong>⟡ SECRET LEARNED ⟡</strong> Steve Lackland gave you a password: //Valletta//. For Lackland's back room. </div> [[Back to Dean Street|Dean Street]] <svg class="colony-fan-bottom" viewBox="0 0 300 52" width="100%" height="52" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><clipPath id="cf2"><rect x="0" y="0" width="300" height="50"/></clipPath><linearGradient id="cfL2" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#7aaa60" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="50%" stop-color="#9a8a30" points="150,41 155,45 150,49 145,45" fill="#c8b860" opacity="0.65"/><polygon points="120,45 123,48 120,51 117,48" fill="none" stroke="#7aaa60" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.45"/><polygon points="180,45 183,48 180,51 177,48" fill="none" stroke="#7aaa60" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.45"/></svg> </div> (set: $hadBreather to true)\ (set: $confidence to $confidence + 12)\ [placeholder] [[Dream On|Dean Street]] (if: $albaRevealed is true)[\ (set: _count to 0)\ (if: $alba contains $alba1)[(set: _count to _count + 1)] (if: $alba contains $alba2)[(set: _count to _count + 1)] (if: $alba contains $alba3)[(set: _count to _count + 1)] (set: _albaClass to "alba-tracker")\ (if: _count >= 1)[(set: _albaClass to _albaClass + " alba-glow-" + (text: _count))] (set: _html to "<div class='" + _albaClass + "'><strong>ALBA</strong>")\ (if: $alba contains $alba1)[(set: _html to _html + "<em class='alba-line'>" + (text: $alba1) + "</em>")] (if: $alba contains $alba2)[(set: _html to _html + "<em class='alba-line'>" + (text: $alba2) + "</em>")] (if: $alba contains $alba3)[(set: _html to _html + "<em class='alba-line'>" + (text: $alba3) + "</em>")] (if: _count is 3)[(set: _html to _html + "<strong class='alba-complete'>THE ALBA IS COMPLETE &mdash; SEEK THE DAWN</strong>")] (set: _html to _html + "</div>")\ (print: _html)\] <div class="trishas-frame"> <span class="trishas-strip">· · · · · · · · · ·</span> (set: $metShana to true) Her lovers are always speechless, beautiful, women who seem to be chosen more for their natural indifference to words, than shocked into silence, like her male companions. She doesn't look up but knows you're there because she has read the Angelic Keys of Edward Kelly, and has such a talent for practical magick. Drinks land on the table, all whiskys, one for each of her five companions and somehow one more for you. She is yet to look up. 'Give it here,' she says. <span class="guided-link">[[Hand over the manuscript|Shana Reads]]</span> [[I'd rather not|Shana Refused]] <svg class="french-rule" viewBox="0 0 300 60" width="100%" height="60" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><linearGradient id="frAmb" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#a06010" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="8%" stop-color="#b07020" x2="215" y2="50"/><line x1="230" y1="10" x2="230" y2="50"/><line x1="245" y1="10" x2="245" y2="50"/><line x1="260" y1="10" x2="260" y2="50"/></g><g opacity="0.55"><path d="M130,30 Q135,14 140,30 Q145,46 150,30 Q155,14 160,30 Q165,46 170,30" fill="none" stroke="#c8a86a" stroke-width="1.2"/><circle cx="130" cy="30" r="2" fill="#c8a86a" opacity="0.7"/><circle cx="170" cy="30" r="2" fill="#c8a86a" opacity="0.7"/></g><polygon points="150,22 154,30 150,38 146,30" fill="#c8a86a" opacity="0.6"/><g opacity="0.35"><rect x="62" y="20" width="6" height="20" rx="1" fill="#002395"/><rect x="73" y="19" width="7" height="22" rx="1" fill="#f0f0f0"/><rect x="85" y="20" width="5" height="20" rx="1" fill="#ed2939"/><rect x="210" y="20" width="6" height="20" rx="1" fill="#002395"/><rect x="221" y="19" width="7" height="22" rx="1" fill="#f0f0f0"/><rect x="233" y="20" width="5" height="20" rx="1" fill="#ed2939"/></g><path d="M20,10 Q20,8 22,8 L28,8 Q30,8 30,10" fill="none" stroke="#c8a86a" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.5"/><path d="M270,10 Q270,8 272,8 L278,8 Q280,8 280,10" fill="none" stroke="#c8a86a" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.5"/><path d="M20,50 Q20,52 22,52 L28,52 Q30,52 30,50" fill="none" stroke="#c8a86a" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.5"/><path d="M270,50 Q270,52 272,52 L278,52 Q280,52 280,50" fill="none" stroke="#c8a86a" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.5"/></svg> There, sitting quietly at a table in the corner, you spot what you're after. He's a novelist now, though you've known him since he was but a poet. Between the ground you've taken and his position falls an amber monolith, through a Dean Street window; a thick and molten bar on the gnarly floor, light and distinct. If you stepped in it you could become a fossil, like the filoplume of a silent dinosaur. You once told him that he should stick to poems. Have you anything to lose? [[Nothing|The novelist]] (link: "Everything")[(set: $confidence to $confidence - 12)(goto: "Dean Street")] <svg class="french-rule" viewBox="0 0 300 24" width="100%" height="24" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><linearGradient id="frC" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#c8a86a" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="45%" stop-color="#c8a86a" stop-opacity="0.55"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#c8a86a" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="frD" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#c8a86a" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="45%" stop-color="#c8a86a" stop-opacity="0.28"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#c8a86a" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient></defs><line x1="0" y1="7" x2="300" y2="7" stroke="url(#frD)" stroke-width="0.5"/><line x1="0" y1="12" x2="300" y2="12" stroke="url(#frC)" stroke-width="1.2"/><svg x="140" y="0" width="20" height="24" viewBox="-12 -2 24 26" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"><g fill="#c8a86a" opacity="0.75"><path d="M0,15 C-3,10 -4,2 0,-1 C4,2 3,10 0,15Z"/><path d="M-1,13 C-4,10 -8,5 -9,3 C-9,5 -8,6 -6,5 C-3,8 -1,11 0,13Z"/><path d="M1,13 C4,10 8,5 9,3 C9,5 8,6 6,5 C3,8 1,11 0,13Z"/><rect x="-8" y="14" width="16" height="2.5" rx="0.5"/><ellipse cx="0" cy="20" rx="2.5" ry="2"/></g></svg></svg> <div id="fh-container"></div>[[·|The French]] <div id="ch-container"></div>[[·|Coach and Horses lock]] <div id="ph-container"></div>[[·|Entering The Pillars of Hercules]] <div id="lo-container"></div>[[·|Martin Lackland's Office]] <div id="ga-container"></div>[[·|At the Corner of Dean Street and Greek Street]] <div id="cr-container"></div>[[·|The Colony Room Door]] <div id="cl-container"></div>[[·|In Copper's lair]] <!-- Ginger light --> <div class="ginger-lamp-wrap"> <svg width="60" height="110" viewBox="0 0 60 110"><ellipse cx="30" cy="33" rx="40" ry="30" fill="rgba(200,100,5,0.10)"/><ellipse cx="30" cy="31" rx="24" ry="18" fill="rgba(220,130,10,0.18)"/><ellipse cx="30" cy="29" rx="13" ry="10" fill="rgba(255,190,60,0.22)"/><polygon points="27,2 30,0 33,2 32,7 28,7" fill="rgba(60,38,4,0.96)"/><path d="M13,7 Q30,4 47,7 L44,13 L16,13 Z" fill="rgba(60,38,4,0.96)"/><path d="M16,13 L44,13 L40,44 L20,44 Z" fill="rgba(130,75,8,0.45)" stroke="rgba(90,52,4,0.65)" stroke-width="1"/><path d="M19,15 L41,15 L37,42 L23,42 Z" fill="rgba(255,165,35,0.42)"/><ellipse cx="30" cy="29" rx="7" ry="10" fill="rgba(255,232,130,0.55)"/><ellipse cx="30" cy="27" rx="3" ry="4" fill="rgba(255,250,210,0.68)"/><rect x="22" y="44" width="16" height="6" rx="2.5" fill="rgba(60,38,4,0.96)"/><rect x="27" y="50" width="6" height="60" rx="2" fill="rgba(45,28,3,0.90)"/></svg> </div> <div class="ginger-scene"> <div class="ginger-light"></div> A man, not much past twenty, stands under a ginger light. At first you think he must be a dilly boy. He wears a beret and paints his nails; he is epicene and crinoline, as if he might snap at any moment. Then you clock him for a poet that you know. A poet called Red. Like a tiger in the Taiga, moving strong and low through heavy blizzard, whose footprints fill as soon as they are made, what Red leaves of himself upon the street is trackless at your shutter-speed; he is an accumulaton, mostly, of scents, and the drifting bergs of ash he drops in the puddle at his feet, which, even when they should be dead, are, by some feeling wind, awakened into transitory brightness. You stand close for a while; he is somewhere else entirely. [[Speak to him|You speak to the poet]] </div> <!-- Swinging bulb --> <div class="cellar-bulb-wrap"> <svg width="48" height="90" viewBox="0 0 48 90"><!-- Wire from ceiling --><line x1="24" y1="0" x2="24" y2="30" stroke="#888878" stroke-width="1.4" opacity="0.75"/><!-- Socket cap --><rect x="17" y="28" width="14" height="10" rx="2.5"fill="rgba(80,78,65,0.9)" stroke="rgba(160,155,120,0.7)" stroke-width="1"/><!-- Socket ring detail --><rect x="19" y="36" width="10" height="3" rx="1"fill="none" stroke="rgba(150,145,110,0.55)" stroke-width="0.8"/><!-- Outer glow halo --><ellipse cx="24" cy="60" rx="20" ry="22"fill="rgba(255,245,160,0.12)"/><!-- Bulb body — pear shape, bright and solid --><path d="M24,38 C16,38 10,45 10,55 C10,67 16,78 24,78 C32,78 38,67 38,55 C38,45 32,38 24,38 Z"fill="rgba(255,252,210,0.95)" stroke="rgba(220,210,160,0.6)" stroke-width="0.8"/><!-- Inner warm core --><ellipse cx="24" cy="57" rx="9" ry="11"fill="rgba(255,240,120,0.55)"/><!-- Filament — W-shape --><path d="M18,60 L20,53 L24,58 L28,53 L30,60"fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,200,40,0.95)" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linejoin="round"/><!-- Neck base ring --><rect x="20" y="75" width="8" height="3" rx="1"fill="rgba(200,195,155,0.65)" stroke="none"/></svg> </div> <div class="cellar-scene"> <div class="cellar-light"></div> (set: $wasBeaten to true) Copper's short hook catches you and you're floored. 'I don't talk to liars,' he says. As he stands on the precipice of valediction, about to finish the job, a voice shouts from the staircase, 'Salvu! Leave it! He's alright.' It's John St. John. Copper stops: 'He thinks he owns the place.' 'I know him. I hate him but I know him and he's sound.' John St. John's face is legible only to you, who once knew him so well. He's amused at your situation, pleased both that you're in it and that he could save you from it, and wound-up that he had to save you again. He pulls you to your feet. (if: $metRed is true)[He leans close as he pulls you to your feet: 'Red told Copper you had money. A manuscript worth something, he thought, the numpty. Sold you for a song, it's the French in him.'] (if: $knowsCopperWord)[Copper is watching from across the cellar. He says nothing, but something shifts — the words you said earlier are still in the room with him, still doing their work. He reaches over and sets a book of matches on the step beside you. Unmarked. St. John reads it. 'Well,' he says. 'Better than I'd have expected.' (set: $hasTrishaMatchbook to true) [[Try Trisha's|Failure: Trisha's]]] (else:)[[[He has something to tell you|St. John's Word]]] </div> <!-- Swinging bulb --> <div class="cellar-bulb-wrap"> <svg width="48" height="90" viewBox="0 0 48 90"><!-- Wire from ceiling --><line x1="24" y1="0" x2="24" y2="30" stroke="#888878" stroke-width="1.4" opacity="0.75"/><!-- Socket cap --><rect x="17" y="28" width="14" height="10" rx="2.5"fill="rgba(80,78,65,0.9)" stroke="rgba(160,155,120,0.7)" stroke-width="1"/><!-- Socket ring detail --><rect x="19" y="36" width="10" height="3" rx="1"fill="none" stroke="rgba(150,145,110,0.55)" stroke-width="0.8"/><!-- Outer glow halo --><ellipse cx="24" cy="60" rx="20" ry="22"fill="rgba(255,245,160,0.12)"/><!-- Bulb body — pear shape, bright and solid --><path d="M24,38 C16,38 10,45 10,55 C10,67 16,78 24,78 C32,78 38,67 38,55 C38,45 32,38 24,38 Z"fill="rgba(255,252,210,0.95)" stroke="rgba(220,210,160,0.6)" stroke-width="0.8"/><!-- Inner warm core --><ellipse cx="24" cy="57" rx="9" ry="11"fill="rgba(255,240,120,0.55)"/><!-- Filament — W-shape --><path d="M18,60 L20,53 L24,58 L28,53 L30,60"fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,200,40,0.95)" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linejoin="round"/><!-- Neck base ring --><rect x="20" y="75" width="8" height="3" rx="1"fill="rgba(200,195,155,0.65)" stroke="none"/></svg> </div> <div class="cellar-scene"> <div class="cellar-light"></div> 'Lackland's got a back room. The word's //Valletta//.' Copper's gurning, more in speed than anger. St. John leads you out: 'Next time, knock on the right door.' (set: $confidence to $confidence - 18) (if: $knowsCopperSecret is false)[(set: $knowsCopperSecret to true) <div class="lore-box"> <strong>⟡ SECRET LEARNED ⟡</strong> John St. John gave you a password: //Valletta//. For Lackland's back room. </div>] You surface into Dean Street like the ascent of man, having something, at least, that you didn't have before. [[Dean Street|Dean Street]] </div> EXPLICIT LIBER EST. [[PLUS. ULTRA.|Dawn]] (set: $exploredSinceFrench to true)\ <svg class="cecil-rule" viewBox="0 0 300 40" width="100%" height="40" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><linearGradient id="ccAmb" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#8a6a30" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="15%" stop-color="#a08040" stop-opacity="0.5"/><stop offset="50%" stop-color="#c8a050" stop-opacity="0.6"/><stop offset="85%" stop-color="#a08040" stop-opacity="0.5"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#8a6a30" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient></defs><line x1="20" y1="10" x2="280" y2="10" stroke="url(#ccAmb)" stroke-width="1"/><line x1="20" y1="30" x2="280" y2="30" stroke="url(#ccAmb)" stroke-width="1"/><g opacity="0.5" fill="none" stroke="#c8a050"><rect x="135" y="12" width="12" height="16" rx="1" stroke-width="1"/><line x1="138" y1="14" x2="138" y2="26" stroke-width="0.5"/><rect x="149" y="13" width="10" height="14" rx="1" stroke-width="0.8"/><rect x="117" y="14" width="8" height="12" rx="1" stroke-width="0.7" transform="rotate(-8,121,20)"/><rect x="163" y="11" width="14" height="18" rx="1" stroke-width="0.9"/><line x1="167" y1="13" x2="167" y2="27" stroke-width="0.5"/><line x1="170" y1="13" x2="170" y2="27" stroke-width="0.5"/></g><circle cx="50" cy="20" r="2" fill="#c8a050" opacity="0.4"/><circle cx="250" cy="20" r="2" fill="#c8a050" opacity="0.4"/></svg> <h2 class="venue-title">Cecil Court</h2> A light's on late in Cecil Court, leeching its scrumpy amber into the fog that's settled between shopfronts. This is the Booksellers' street. In dimmed windows you glimpse the things you covet: first impressions with uncorrected misprints, presentation copies and pirated stuff. On your way to the amber light you pass by Watkins, long tenant of numbers 19-21, and hoary purveyor of the esoteric and occult. (link: "⟡ LORE: Watkins ⟡")[<div class="lore-box"> John Watkins, an ecumenical occultist bookseller and associate of Madame Blavatsky, opened the shop in 1901. His son Geoffrey ran it after him and, as of 1973, has only just retired; though he still haunts the place, like his father does. Cecil Court is known in the trade as Death Row. The origin of that name is far from certain, but it is, probably, traceable at least to Dr. Johnson's The Rambler, wherein he remarks on the tendency of the alleyway, for such it was then, to gather, after rain, though it was some way from the river, the corpses of cats and wild geese. Crowley came here and Yeats, Waite and Mathers. Mozart sold tickets to his shows from the shop at number nine. It is a dangerous bookshop. </div>] [[Look in|Watkins]] (set: $exploredSinceFrench to true)\ A light's on late in Cecil Court, leeching its scrumpy amber into the fog that's settled between shopfronts. This is the Booksellers' street. In dimmed windows you glimpse the things you covet: first impressions with uncorrected misprints, presentation copies and pirated stuff. On your way to the amber light you pass by Watkins, long tenant of numbers 19-21, and hoary purveyor of the esoteric and occult. [[Look in|Watkins]] At first you see only yourself reflected back in the window; but a moment later it fizzes into clarity, like the bubbles on tonic, and you see now through glass clear as perfect ice. A waltz strikes up, twice-muffled, as if it came both from the inside of the bookshop and your own inmost ear. You watch a moment longer: from the stockroom, two brass figures appear, lifesize, dancing; Madame Blavatsky is waltzing with the Beast. [[Waltz on to the light|O'Flatterly's shop]] The sign reads: I. O'FLATTERLY, dealer in books. You waltz in. Strenuously reading, Inish O'Flatterly sits at the thick wooden counter. He does not look to notice you, yet neither does his shop lack any welcome. [[I was sent by Clegg|O'Flatterly introduction]] (set: $ppScore to 0)\ (set: $oppScore to 0)\ (set: $opponent to "Clegg") 'Best of five,' says Clegg. 'Civilised rules.' [[Serve|PP Pong]] (set: $ppScore to 0)\ (set: $oppScore to 0)\ (set: $opponent to "Harsent") 'Best of five,' says Harsent. 'No mercy.' [[Serve|PP Pong]] <div class="chippy-scene"> <div class="chippy-light top"></div> <div class="chippy-light bottom"></div> <svg class="chippy-tube" viewBox="0 0 300 18" width="100%" height="18" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><filter id="fgA" x="-20%" y="-120%" width="140%" height="400%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="3" result="blur"/><feMerge><feMergeNode in="blur"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge></filter></defs><!-- Cold blue outer glow --><rect x="14" y="1" width="272" height="16" rx="6" fill="rgba(180,210,255,0.22)" filter="url(#fgA)"/><!-- Tube body — harsh cold white with blue tint --><rect x="16" y="4" width="268" height="10" rx="4" fill="rgba(215,230,255,0.96)"/><!-- Bright core stripe --><rect x="18" y="6" width="264" height="4" rx="2" fill="rgba(240,248,255,1.0)"/><!-- End caps — grey metal --><rect x="12" y="3" width="7" height="12" rx="2" fill="rgba(130,135,145,0.75)"/><rect x="281" y="3" width="7" height="12" rx="2" fill="rgba(130,135,145,0.75)"/><!-- Faint internal line suggesting the fluorescent tube --><line x1="22" y1="9" x2="278" y2="9" stroke="rgba(200,220,255,0.4)" stroke-width="0.7"/></svg> (set: $hadChippy to true)\ (set: $confidence to $confidence + 15)\ (set: $sobriety to $sobriety + 20) You find it down a side street, where you always knew it was but had forgotten: the Chinese Fish and Chips. The fluorescent light inside is a brutality after all that amber and shadow. A woman behind the counter doesn't look up. The radio plays something you almost recognise. You order cod and chips. The vinegar is sharp and the grease is holy. You eat standing at the narrow counter, watching the night drift past the steamed-up window. |lily1>[(display: "Lily SVG")]\ (click-replace: ?lily1)[(set: $lilyCount to $lilyCount + 1)(display: "Lily SVG")<span class="lily-glimpse lily-fade">That must be her, as tall as the Amazon; her joints articulate how you remember.</span>] For a few minutes, you are nobody. You have no manuscript. You owe nothing to anyone. The warmth spreads through you. The fog lifts, just a little. [[Back to Dean Street|Dean Street]] <svg class="chippy-tube" viewBox="0 0 300 18" width="100%" height="18" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><filter id="fgB" x="-20%" y="-120%" width="140%" height="400%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="3" result="blur"/><feMerge><feMergeNode in="blur"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge></filter></defs><rect x="14" y="1" width="272" height="16" rx="6" fill="rgba(180,210,255,0.22)" filter="url(#fgB)"/><rect x="16" y="4" width="268" height="10" rx="4" fill="rgba(215,230,255,0.96)"/><rect x="18" y="6" width="264" height="4" rx="2" x1="22" y1="9" x2="278" y2="9" stroke="rgba(200,220,255,0.4)" stroke-width="0.7"/></svg> </div> <svg class="coach-beam" viewBox="0 0 300 36" width="100%" height="36" opacity="0.55"><path d="M-8,-6 Q-9,2 -6,6 Q-3,10 0,10 Q3,10 6,6 Q9,2 8,-6" fill="none" stroke="#c8922a" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/><circle cx="-8" cy="-6" r="1.5" (set: $visitedCoach to true)\ (set: $afterMidnight to true)\ <h2 class="venue-title">The Coach and Horses</h2> <svg class="coach-beam-bottom" viewBox="0 0 300 36" width="100%" height="36" y1="6" x2="267" y2="30"/></g><circle cx="50" cy="18" r="4" fill="#c8922a" opacity="0.5"/><circle cx="50" cy="17" r="1.5" fill="#ffe090" opacity="0.35"/><circle cx="150" cy="18" r="4.5" fill="#c8922a" opacity="0.55"/><circle cx="150" cy="17" r="1.8" fill="#ffe090" opacity="0.4"/><circle cx="250" cy="18" r="4" fill="#c8922a" opacity="0.5"/><circle cx="250" cy="17" r="1.5" fill="#ffe090" opacity="0.35"/></svg> You've just come-to in a cubicle, in what seems to be the gents' toilet at the Coach and Horses. You gather yourself and walk back to the bar. It is empty except for Jeffrey Bernard and, behind the bar, a cow. 'Are you alright?' he says. 'You don't look well.' 'I've got a book to sell.' 'That I can see. They're running from you, will have been all night. Have you seen my cow?' He seems unsure if he's lost it or if he's asking if you'd found it. It's standing behind the bar, lets out a noise. He drinks. 'Speak to Lackland, he'll be around. You'll find your own way out.' (set: $knowsLackland to true)\ (set: $confidence to $confidence + 4) //&#91;insert sponsored drink&#93;// (link: "Drink it.")[(set: $confidence to $confidence + 15)(set: $sobriety to $sobriety - 5) <span class="inventory-note">&#9734; CONFIDENCE +15 | SOBRIETY −5</span>] [[Deal with the cow|Jeffrey Bernard's Cow]] <div class="colony-scene"> <svg class="colony-corner tl" viewBox="0 0 28 28"><path The Colony Room tilts. (if: $knowsCopperSecret is false)[At the bar, a man in a suit that was clean this morning is drinking alone. He keeps adjusting it, as though neatness were a posture he could resume by force of will. stroke="#7aaa60" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.45"/><polygon points="180,45 183,48 180,51 177,48" fill="none" stroke="#7aaa60" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.45"/></svg> (set: $sobriety to $sobriety - 18) He's wearing a suit that was probably clean this morning, which meant he'd been home and changed, but was now beginning to crumple in sympathy with his mood. 'Not interested,' he says, to an audience that is both somehow the whole world and you alone. The accent is Anglo-Australian; too clipped and politic for his homeland, yet still straying at its edges into an outback. 'I gave a reading last night in Oxford. Magnificent, actually. Met a girl. She was pretty and working on her D.Phil. at Magdalen, on Shakespeare and Co.; I thought I was there. Wore the suit. Bought a bottle of wine. Met her at the Pillars.' He drinks, you drink, and he seems now to notice you more distinctly, as if drawing his whole, traversable world into a private audience. 'She didn't touch a drop of it. Do you know Martin Lackland? Office on Frith Street?' <span class="lily-thought">You think of Lily. She never much liked it either.</span> You do. You used to wake up on the sofa in his mother's house when you were both seventeen. 'I'll tell you something because I like the way you are. Everyone sees him front-of-house, but the real business happens in the back. Password's //Valletta//. Don't ask me how I know. I know everything and none of it helps.' He straightens the suit again. That doesn't help either. 'You didn't hear it from me. I'm not here. I'm in Oxford, being adored.' (set: $knowsCopperSecret to true)\ (set: $knowsLackland to true) <div class="lore-box"> <strong>⟡ SECRET LEARNED ⟡</strong> Steve Merkin gave you a password: //Valletta//. For Lackland's back room. </div> [[Back to Dean Street|Dean Street]] <svg class="colony-fan-bottom" viewBox="0 0 300 52" width="100%" height="52" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><clipPath
