points="180,45 183,48 180,51 177,48" fill="none" stroke="#7aaa60" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.45"/></svg> </div> <!-- Swinging bulb --> <div class="cellar-bulb-wrap"> <svg width="48" height="90" viewBox="0 0 48 90"><!-- Wire from ceiling --><line x1="24" y1="0" x2="24" y2="30" stroke="#888878" stroke-width="1.4" opacity="0.75"/><!-- Socket cap --><rect x="17" y="28" width="14" height="10" rx="2.5"fill="rgba(80,78,65,0.9)" stroke="rgba(160,155,120,0.7)" stroke-width="1"/><!-- Socket ring detail --><rect x="19" y="36" width="10" height="3" rx="1"fill="none" stroke="rgba(150,145,110,0.55)" stroke-width="0.8"/><!-- Outer glow halo --><ellipse cx="24" cy="60" rx="20" ry="22"fill="rgba(255,245,160,0.12)"/><!-- Bulb body — pear shape, bright and solid --><path d="M24,38 C16,38 10,45 10,55 C10,67 16,78 24,78 C32,78 38,67 38,55 C38,45 32,38 24,38 Z"fill="rgba(255,252,210,0.95)" stroke="rgba(220,210,160,0.6)" stroke-width="0.8"/><!-- Inner warm core --><ellipse cx="24" cy="57" rx="9" ry="11"fill="rgba(255,240,120,0.55)"/><!-- Filament — W-shape --><path d="M18,60 L20,53 L24,58 L28,53 L30,60"fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,200,40,0.95)" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linejoin="round"/><!-- Neck base ring --><rect x="20" y="75" width="8" height="3" rx="1"fill="rgba(200,195,155,0.65)" stroke="none"/></svg> </div> <div class="cellar-scene"> <div class="cellar-light"></div> (set: $confidence to $confidence + 12) Salvu Copper's face droops under the heat of his internal furnace. 'So someone's looking after you? That's enough,' he says. Quiet Frankie raises his glass without looking. Ashton Granger is just happy you're alive. He presses a book of matches into your hand: 'Tell Trisha I sent you.' (set: $hasTrishaMatchbook to true) [[Try Trisha's|Failure: Trisha's]] </div> <!-- Swinging bulb --> <div class="cellar-bulb-wrap"> <svg width="48" height="90" viewBox="0 0 48 90"><!-- Wire from ceiling --><line x1="24" y1="0" x2="24" y2="30" stroke="#888878" stroke-width="1.4" opacity="0.75"/><!-- Socket cap --><rect x="17" y="28" width="14" height="10" rx="2.5"fill="rgba(80,78,65,0.9)" stroke="rgba(160,155,120,0.7)" stroke-width="1"/><!-- Socket ring detail --><rect x="19" y="36" width="10" height="3" rx="1"fill="none" stroke="rgba(150,145,110,0.55)" stroke-width="0.8"/><!-- Outer glow halo --><ellipse cx="24" cy="60" rx="20" ry="22"fill="rgba(255,245,160,0.12)"/><!-- Bulb body — pear shape, bright and solid --><path d="M24,38 C16,38 10,45 10,55 C10,67 16,78 24,78 C32,78 38,67 38,55 C38,45 32,38 24,38 Z"fill="rgba(255,252,210,0.95)" stroke="rgba(220,210,160,0.6)" stroke-width="0.8"/><!-- Inner warm core --><ellipse cx="24" cy="57" rx="9" ry="11"fill="rgba(255,240,120,0.55)"/><!-- Filament — W-shape --><path d="M18,60 L20,53 L24,58 L28,53 L30,60"fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,200,40,0.95)" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linejoin="round"/><!-- Neck base ring --><rect x="20" y="75" width="8" height="3" rx="1"fill="rgba(200,195,155,0.65)" stroke="none"/></svg> </div> <div class="cellar-scene"> <div class="cellar-light"></div> Copper steps closer. 'I asked you a question,' he says. Quiet Frankie still hasn't looked up but Ashton Granger has; she stops doodling. [[Try to run for the stairs|Fight starts]] [[Stand your ground|Stand your ground]] </div> You see yourself walking to meet you, he looks at you, with a pitying grin, then turns and heads, quickly, towards Centre Point. [[Follow him|Approach Centre Point]] * [[Go to Dawn|Dawn]] (if: ($alba contains $alba1) and ($alba contains $alba2) and ($alba contains $alba3))[It is as if you've woken from anaesthetic. You are standing at the corner of Dean Street and Old Compton Street, watching the light change again like it hasn't changed for a whole black night. The plane of the eastern sky is cobalt first, then brassy and, at length, light in matter and in aspect, like a lifted weight. People with jobs begin to work in overalls and behind the wheels of lorries. You have been awake very long. The book's still in your bag, unsold for now. You're glad to feel its weight which you'd forgotten with the drink. Aoife doesn't care about the book. Today you'll start your shift again, after dinner, but there will be some hours, in between, when you'll hold her closer than ever man held woman. (if: $knowsLackland is true)[Phoenix-like from some impossible door, Lackland emerges and draws your eye. 'Tomorrow!' he cries, 'Tomorrow!' As he crabwalks into a taxi. //To the last syllable of recorded time.// Yes, perhaps you'll come tomorrow. If only to pass time among the beautiful and the broken and the blessed. And maybe tomorrow will have its own tomorrow. Maybe the hefty mirror of today will scatter its bright certainties among some living possibilities. Till then, you'll lie with her and she will lie with you and you'll raise a daughter.] (if: $hadPhoneCall is true)[She has called you home with her cold voice. Recall:] There is a song you learned in that night's dark. You'll spoon and it will ring like tinnitus. <div class="alba-final"> <em>$alba1</em> <em>$alba2</em> <em>$alba3</em> </div> <span class="lily-thought">Somewhere in the lightening air, the last trace of lily-of-the-valley lifts from the stones and is gone. You let it go. It is the hardest thing you have ever done and it takes no effort at all.</span> (if: $wasBeaten is true)[You've caught a shiner from the fight with Copper, but Aoife won't ask a thing, so long as you're home.] (if: $haunts's length > 0)[You've other wounds as well, these are the haunts that found you when you went out looking for them:] Go home, boy. //FINIS//] (else:)[Not yet. The poem is incomplete. [[Back to Dean Street|Dean Street]]] <svg id="dean-lamp-svg" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="145" height="400" style="float:right;margin:0.3em -0.5em 1em 0.8em;overflow:hidden;"><defs><radialGradient id="dslamp" cx="55%" cy="5%" r="65%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#d4a060" stop-opacity="0.7"/><stop offset="25%" stop-color="#c89060" stop-opacity="0.35"/><stop offset="60%" stop-color="#c89060" stop-opacity="0.12"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#c89060" stop-opacity="0"/></radialGradient></defs><rect x="-40" y="-80" width="240" height="340" fill="url(#dslamp)"/><g fill="none" stroke="#c8a86a" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><line x1="90" y1="32" x2="90" y2="38" stroke-width="1.8"/><circle cx="90" cy="42" r="4" stroke-width="2.0"/><line x1="90" y1="46" x2="90" y2="56" stroke-width="1.8"/><line x1="90" y1="56" x2="68" y2="68" stroke-width="2.5"/><line x1="90" y1="56" x2="112" y2="68" stroke-width="2.5"/><line x1="66" y1="68" x2="114" y2="68" stroke-width="2.3"/><line x1="68" y1="68" x2="68" y2="104" stroke-width="2.3"/><line x1="112" y1="68" x2="112" y2="104" stroke-width="2.3"/><line x1="66" y1="104" x2="114" y2="104" stroke-width="2.3"/><line x1="90" y1="68" x2="90" y2="104" stroke-width="1.4"/><line x1="68" y1="86" x2="112" y2="86" stroke-width="1.4"/><path d="M90,104 L72,178 L100,238" stroke-width="3.0"/><ellipse cx="100" cy="240" rx="13" ry="4" stroke-width="1.8"/><line x1="100" y1="246" x2="100" y2="9999" stroke-width="3.8"/><ellipse cx="100" cy="385" rx="13" ry="4" stroke-width="1.8"/><ellipse cx="100" cy="530" rx="13" ry="4" stroke-width="1.8"/><rect x="84" y="692" width="32" height="8" rx="2" stroke-width="1.8"/></g></svg> <h1 class="game-title" style="font-size:1.7em;">DREAM STREET<span style="display:block;height:0.15em;"></span>SHUFFLE</h1> {(unless: $alba is an array)[(set: $alba to (a:))] (unless: $haunts is an array)[(set: $haunts to (a:))] (unless: $bookTitle is a string)[(set: $bookTitle to "Untitled Manuscript")] (if: $bookTitle is "")[(set: $bookTitle to "Untitled Manuscript")] (set: $returns to $returns + 1) (if: $confidence > 100)[(set: $confidence to 100)] (if: $confidence < 0)[(set: $confidence to 0)] (if: $sobriety > 100)[(set: $sobriety to 100)] (if: $sobriety < 0)[(set: $sobriety to 0)] (if: $lilyCount >= 2 and $hadLilyCall1 is false)[(set: $lilyCallReturn to "Dean Street")(go-to: "Lily phone call 1")]\ (if: $lilyCount >= 3 and $hadLilyCall1 is true and $hadLilyCall2 is false)[(set: $lilyCallReturn to "Dean Street")(go-to: "Lily phone call 2")]\ (if: $lilyCount >= 4 and $hadLilyCall2 is true and $hadDualRing is false)[(set: $lilyCallReturn to "Dean Street")(go-to: "The dual ring")]\ (if: $lilyCount >= 5 and $hadDualRing is true and $hadLilyCall3 is false)[(set: $lilyCallReturn to "Dean Street")(go-to: "Lily phone call 3")]\ (if: $sobriety <= 0 and $haunts's length >= 3)[(set: $coachUrgent to true)](else-if: $sobriety <= 0)[(set: $sobriety to 5)//You stagger. Nearly fell. Catch yourself on a lamppost. The street blurs then steadies. You need to keep it together.//] (if: $confidence <= 5 and not (($alba contains $alba1) and ($alba contains $alba2) and ($alba contains $alba3)))[[[Give up on the book|No more]]] (if: $wasBeaten is true and $visitedInterval is true)[<span class="fetch-glimpse">You see him then: yourself, walking ahead of you down Greek Street toward Centre Point. He does not look back. He walks the way a man walks when he has made a decision. You know where he is going. You have always known.</span>] (if: $returns >= 7 and $afterMidnight is false)[(set: $afterMidnight to true)] } <span class="scene-date">(if: $afterMidnight)[24.11.73](else:)[23.11.73]</span> <span class="scene-location">Dean Street, Soho, London.</span> (if: $returns > 1)[<div class="ds-intro ds-faded">](else:)[<div class="ds-intro">]\ (if: $returns is 2 and $hasCoin is false)[(set: $hasCoin to true)<div id="coin-overlay"><div class="coin-overlay-box"><div class="coin-overlay-stage"><div class="coin-overlay-disc" id="coin-overlay-disc"><div class="cp-face cp-heads"></div><div class="cp-face cp-tails"></div></div></div><p class="coin-overlay-text">You found a coin on the pavement; a rare one, called a &#39;Donkey&#39;. There&#39;s only one. Keep it. You&#39;ll want it later.</p><span class="inventory-note">&#9734; COIN ACQUIRED</span><button class="coin-overlay-btn" id="coin-toss-btn">Toss it</button><span class="coin-overlay-result" id="coin-overlay-result"></span></div></div><script>(function(){var tossCount=0,maxToss=2,stage=document.querySelector(".coin-overlay-stage");var sequence=[false,true];function sparks(){for(var i=0;12>i;i++){var s=document.createElement("div");s.className="cp-spark";var a=Math.random()*360,dist=60+Math.random()*40;s.style.setProperty("--sx",(Math.cos(a*Math.PI/180)*dist)+"px");s.style.setProperty("--sy",(Math.sin(a*Math.PI/180)*dist)+"px");s.style.animationDelay=(Math.random()*0.3)+"s";s.style.animationDuration=(0.5+Math.random()*0.5)+"s";stage.appendChild(s);setTimeout(function(el){el.remove();},(1200),s);}}document.getElementById("coin-toss-btn").addEventListener("click",function(){var d=document.getElementById("coin-overlay-disc"),r=document.getElementById("coin-overlay-result"),b=this,o=document.getElementById("coin-overlay");if(d.classList.contains("cp-flipping"))return;var heads=sequence[tossCount];tossCount++;var endDeg=heads?"1440deg":"1620deg";var restDeg=heads?"0deg":"180deg";d.style.setProperty("--cp-end",endDeg);d.classList.remove("cp-flipping");void d.offsetWidth;d.classList.add("cp-flipping");sparks();r.textContent="";b.classList.add("coin-btn-hidden");setTimeout(function(){r.textContent=heads?"Heads.":"Tails.";d.style.transform="rotateX("+restDeg+")";d.classList.remove("cp-flipping");if(tossCount>=maxToss){setTimeout(function(){o.classList.add("coin-overlay-fade");setTimeout(function(){o.remove();},800);},1800);}else{setTimeout(function(){r.textContent="";b.classList.remove("coin-btn-hidden");b.textContent="Toss again";},2200);}},2000);});})();</script>]\ (if: $hasCoin is true)[<script>if(!window.showCoinModal){window.showCoinModal=function(opts){var mode=opts.mode||"free",max=opts.maxToss||(mode==="free"?3:1),tc=0,cb=opts.onResult||function(){};var o=document.createElement("div");o.id="coin-overlay";var h='<div class="coin-overlay-box"><div class="coin-overlay-stage"><div class="coin-overlay-disc" id="cm-d"><div class="cp-face cp-heads"></div><div class="cp-face cp-tails"></div></div></div></div>';if(mode==="decide"&&opts.label1)h+='<div class="coin-gate-labels"><div class="coin-gate-label cg-h">Heads: '+opts.label1+'</div><div class="coin-gate-label cg-t">Tails: '+opts.label2+'</div></div>';h+='<button class="coin-overlay-btn" id="cm-b">Toss it</button><span class="coin-overlay-result" id="cm-r"></span></div>';o.innerHTML=h;document.body.appendChild(o);var d=document.getElementById("cm-d"),r=document.getElementById("cm-r"),b=document.getElementById("cm-b"),st=o.querySelector(".coin-overlay-stage");b.addEventListener("click",function(){if(d.classList.contains("cp-flipping"))return;tc++;var heads=Math.floor(Math.random()*2)===0,ed=heads?"1440deg":"1620deg",rd=heads?"0deg":"180deg";d.style.setProperty("--cp-end",ed);d.classList.remove("cp-flipping");void d.offsetWidth;d.classList.add("cp-flipping");for(var i=0;12>i;i++){var s=document.createElement("div");s.className="cp-spark";var a=Math.random()*360,dist=60+Math.random()*40;s.style.setProperty("--sx",(Math.cos(a*Math.PI/180)*dist)+"px");s.style.setProperty("--sy",(Math.sin(a*Math.PI/180)*dist)+"px");s.style.animationDelay=(Math.random()*0.3)+"s";s.style.animationDuration=(0.5+Math.random()*0.5)+"s";st.appendChild(s);setTimeout(function(el){el.remove();},1200,s);}r.textContent="";b.classList.add("coin-btn-hidden");setTimeout(function(){r.textContent=heads?"Heads.":"Tails.";d.style.transform="rotateX("+rd+")";d.classList.remove("cp-flipping");if(mode==="decide"){var hl=o.querySelector(".cg-h"),tl=o.querySelector(".cg-t");if(hl&&tl){if(heads){hl.style.color="#c8a86a";tl.style.opacity="0.3";}else{tl.style.color="#c8a86a";hl.style.opacity="0.3";}}setTimeout(function(){o.classList.add("coin-overlay-fade");setTimeout(function(){o.remove();cb(heads);},800);},1800);}else if(tc>=max){setTimeout(function(){o.classList.add("coin-overlay-fade");setTimeout(function(){o.remove();},800);},1800);}else{setTimeout(function(){r.textContent="";b.classList.remove("coin-btn-hidden");b.textContent="Toss again";},2200);}},2000);});};window.coinGate=function(t1,t2){var links=document.querySelectorAll("tw-link"),l1=null,l2=null;for(var i=0;links.length>i;i++){var t=links[i].textContent.trim();if(t===t1&&!l1)l1=links[i];if(t===t2&&!l2)l2=links[i];}if(!l1||!l2)return;l1.style.pointerEvents="none";l1.style.opacity="0.4";l2.style.pointerEvents="none";l2.style.opacity="0.4";var w=document.createElement("div");w.className="coin-gate-wrap";w.innerHTML='<div class="coin-gate-hint">The Donkey will decide.</div><button class="coin-gate-btn">Flip the Donkey</button>';var p=l2.closest("tw-expression")||l2.parentElement;if(p&&p.parentElement)p.parentElement.insertBefore(w,p.nextSibling);w.querySelector(".coin-gate-btn").addEventListener("click",function(){window.showCoinModal({mode:"decide",label1:t1,label2:t2,onResult:function(isH){var c=isH?l1:l2;c.style.pointerEvents="";c.click();}});});};window.flipCoinPopup=function(){window.showCoinModal({mode:"free",maxToss:3});}}</script>]\ A heavy afternoon lingers in rainfall on the pavements though the sky has cleared now and the newborn night is cut with moonshine. There is an atmosphere of the silver screen: as if Brando might emerge in a tight and sodden T-shirt, from any door or alleyway, anytime. In your bag, you have //(print: $bookTitle)//, your novel, in manuscript. You need to sell it, pronto. </div> (if: $haunts's length >= 5)[Something shifts again. Eyes meet you and doors open like they used to. Keep on. ](else-if: $haunts's length >= 3)[Something shifts. The faces start to know your face again. A girl at the French waves through the reeded glass. It's beginning to let you in. ](if: $metRed is true)[\ (if: $coachUrgent is true)[<div class="choice-box">You can't see straight. The pavement sways beneath you like the deck of a ship. There is only one door you can find. <span class="guided-link">[[The Coach and Horses|Coach and Horses lock]]</span></div>](else:)[Where now?] (if: $coachUrgent is false and not ($haunts contains $haunt2))[[[To The French|Approach The French]] ](if: $coachUrgent is false and ($haunts contains $haunt2))[<span class="greyed-out">The French &#91;DONE FOR TONIGHT&#93;</span> ]\ (if: $coachUrgent is false and $visited's French is false and $returns >= 2)[<span class="greyed-out">The Colony Room</span> ]\ (if: $coachUrgent is false and $visited's French is true and $hadPhoneCall is true and $metCritic is false)[[[The Pillars — there was someone you wanted to talk to|Maritime interlude]] ](else-if: $coachUrgent is false and $visited's French is true)[[[To The Pillars of Hercules|Maritime interlude]] ]\ (if: $coachUrgent is false and $visited's French is true)[[[Try the Colony Room|Approach The Colony Room]] ]\ (if: $coachUrgent is false and $knowsRonnies is true and $completedSetlist is false)[[[Hear the jazz at Ronnie Scott's|Ronnie Scott's]] ]\ (if: $coachUrgent is false and $knowsRonnies is true and $completedSetlist is true and ($ronniesLastOrders is false))[(set: $ronniesLastOrders to true)[[Ronnie Scott's &#91;LAST ORDERS&#93;|Ronnie Scott's]] ]\ (if: $coachUrgent is false and $knowsRonnies is true and $completedSetlist is true and $ronniesLastOrders is true)[<span class="greyed-out">Ronnie Scott's &#91;CLOSED&#93;</span> ]\ (if: $coachUrgent is false and $knowsLackland is true and $knowsCopperSecret is true)[[[Go to Lackland's Office|Approach Lacklands Office]] ](else-if: $coachUrgent is false and $knowsLackland is true)[<span class="greyed-out">Lackland's Office &#91;NOT NOW. TRY ELSEWHERE&#93;</span> ]\ (if: $coachUrgent is false and $knowsCecilCourt is true and $hasMissingPage is true and $returnedPage is false)[[[Return the page to O'Flatterly|O'Flatterly introduction]] ](else-if: $coachUrgent is false and $knowsCecilCourt is true and $knowsAboutPage is true and $returnedPage is false)[[[Cecil Court|Cecil Court]] ](else-if: $coachUrgent is false and $knowsCecilCourt is true and $returnedPage is false)[[[Visit the antiquarian in Cecil Court|Cecil Court Approach]] ](if: $coachUrgent is false and $returnedPage is true and ($cecilLastOrders is false))[(set: $cecilLastOrders to true)[[Cecil Court &#91;LAST ORDERS&#93;|Cecil Court]] ]\ (if: $coachUrgent is false and $returnedPage is true and $cecilLastOrders is true)[<span class="greyed-out">Cecil Court &#91;CLOSED&#93;</span> ]\ (if: $coachUrgent is false and $hasTrishaMatchbook is true and not ($haunts contains $haunt8))[[[Try Trisha's|Failure: Trisha's]] ](if: $coachUrgent is false and ($haunts contains $haunt8) and ($trishasLastOrders is false))[(set: $trishasLastOrders to true)[[Trisha's &#91;LAST ORDERS&#93;|Failure: Trisha's]] ]\ (if: $coachUrgent is false and ($haunts contains $haunt8) and $trishasLastOrders is true)[<span class="greyed-out">Trisha's &#91;CLOSED&#93;</span> ]\ (if: ($alba contains $alba1) and ($alba contains $alba2) and not ($alba contains $alba3))[<div class="choice-box"><span class="guided-link">[[The voice|Late Lily]]</span></div> ]] (else:)[Someone's on the corner. [[See who's there|Approach The Ginger Light]]] (if: $confidence < 40 and $hadBreather is false and $visited's Pillars is true)[<div class="choice-box">You're feeling worn down. There's a quiet doorway nearby. [[Step into the doorway|A Doorway on Dean Street]]</div>](else-if: $hadBreather is true)[<span class="greyed-out">Step into the doorway</span> ]\ (if: $confidence < 50 and $sobriety < 50 and $hadChippy is false and ($confidence >= 40 or $hadBreather is true))[<div class="choice-box">You're in a bad way. But there's a place you know, down a side street. The Chinese Fish and Chips. [[Get something to eat|Chinese Fish and Chips]]</div>](else-if: $hadChippy is true)[<span class="greyed-out">Get something to eat</span> ]\ (set: $notebookUnlocked to true)\ (if: ($alba contains $alba1) and ($alba contains $alba2) and ($alba contains $alba3))[[[Go to Dawn|Dawn]]] <svg class="carthage-pyre" viewBox="0 0 500 95" width="100%" height="95" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><radialGradient id="cpGlow" cx="50%" cy="85%" r="70%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#d4600a" stop-opacity="0.4"/><stop offset="30%" stop-color="#c84a08" id="cpGround" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#3a2010" stop-opacity="0.5"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#1a0a08" stop-opacity="0.3"/></linearGradient></defs><rect x="0" y="77" width="500" height="18" fill="url(#cpGround)"/><rect x="0" y="0" width="500" height="95" fill="url(#cpGlow)"/><rect x="195" y="77" width="110" height="6" rx="1" fill="#3a2818" Q254,30 258,18 Q262,40 265,67Z" fill="#e88020" opacity="0.5"/><path d="M240,67 Q237,44 246,24 Q249,36 252,18 Q255,34 258,26 Q259,42 260,67Z" fill="#ffa040" opacity="0.45"/><path d="M245,67 Q243,48 249,30 Q251,42 253,34 Q254,48 255,67Z" fill="#ffc868" opacity="0.4"/><path d="M222,67 Q216,52 224,35 Q228,45 230,38 Q229,50 232,67Z" fill="#c04808" opacity="0.3"/><path d="M268,67 Q272,50 276,32 Q274,44 278,40 Q276,52 275,67Z" fill="#c04808" opacity="0.3"/><circle cx="228" cy="61" r="4.5" fill="#1a0a06" opacity="0.55"/><rect x="232" y="63" width="32" height="3" rx="1" fill="#1a0a06" opacity="0.5"/><path d="M264,63 L266,63 L266,58 L264,58 Z" fill="#1a0a06" opacity="0.5"/><path d="M267,63 L269,63 L269,59 L267,59 Z" fill="#1a0a06" opacity="0.45"/><circle cx="245" cy="4" r="0.8" fill="#ffa030" opacity="0.4"/><circle cx="260" cy="7" r="0.6" fill="#ff8020" opacity="0.35"/><circle cx="238" cy="10" r="0.7" fill="#ffc050" opacity="0.4"/><circle cx="268" cy="3" r="0.5" fill="#ff6010" opacity="0.3"/><circle cx="252" cy="2" r="0.6" fill="#ffc050" opacity="0.35"/><circle cx="230" cy="6" r="0.5" fill="#ff8020" opacity="0.3"/><circle cx="272" cy="12" r="0.9" fill="#ffa030" opacity="0.35"/><circle cx="242" cy="16" r="0.5" fill="#ffc050" opacity="0.3"/><circle cx="256" cy="14" r="0.4" fill="#ff6010" opacity="0.25"/><rect x="80" y="30" width="5" height="47" fill="#705848" opacity="0.45"/><rect x="78" y="28" width="9" height="3" rx="0.5" fill="#806858" opacity="0.5"/><path d="M82,45 L84,55" stroke="#3a2010" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.4"/><rect x="70" y="74" width="9" height="4" rx="1" fill="#705848" opacity="0.3" transform="rotate(-15,74,76)"/><rect x="405" y="22" width="6" height="55" fill="#705848" opacity="0.4"/><rect x="402" y="20" width="12" height="3" rx="0.5" fill="#806858" opacity="0.45"/><path d="M408,35 Q410,42 407,50 Q410,58 408,65" fill="none" stroke="#d4600a" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.2"/><path d="M415,72 Q420,65 430,72" fill="none" stroke="#705848" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.3"/><rect x="140" y="48" width="3" height="29" fill="#503828" opacity="0.25"/><rect x="350" y="42" width="3" height="35" fill="#503828" opacity="0.2"/><path d="M348,42 L356,42" stroke="#503828" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.15"/><circle cx="180" cy="82" r="0.8" fill="#d4600a" opacity="0.25"/><circle cx="320" cy="80" r="0.6" fill="#c84a08" opacity="0.2"/><circle cx="160" cy="84" r="0.5" fill="#ff8020" opacity="0.15"/><circle cx="340" cy="83" r="0.7" fill="#d4600a" opacity="0.2"/><rect x="0" y="0" width="500" height="95" fill="url(#cpTopFade)"/><rect x="0" y="0" width="500" height="95" fill="url(#cpFade)"/></svg> On the pyre, Dido is burning where she has burnt for 2,000 years. The scent of her sour embers says something about the lily of the valley. 'Stay,' she says, 'My Carthage is meant for you. Lily is in her valley and will not return. Rest here and think no more about your England.' (link: "⟡ LORE: Her Dying Words ⟡")[<div class="lore-box"> Littora littoribus contraria, fluctibus undas<br> Impresor: arma armis: pugnent ipsig nepotes:<br> Liue false Æneas, truest Dido dyes,<br> Sic sic inuat ire sub umbras.<br> <br> Shores against shores; waves, waves;<br> I curse, arms against arms, you and your children.<br> Live false Aeneus, truest Dido dies,<br> So, so happily I go, under the shades. </div>] (if: $knowsAboutPage is true and $hasMissingPage is false)[Among the flames, you see something that shouldn't be there — a page, curling at the edges but not yet consumed. The writing on it shifts and writhes. [[Reach into the flames|Rescue the page]]] (if: $confidence <= 15)[[[Remain in Carthage|Stay in Carthage]] (if: $haunts's length >= 3 or $hasCoin is true)[[[Try The Green Sea|Green Sea Approach]]](else:)[//You must not, yet, go any deeper inland.//] [[Return to the shore|The coast of Carthage]]] (else:)[Not yet. The game's not played to death. (if: $haunts's length >= 3 or $hasCoin is true)[[[Try The Green Sea|Green Sea Approach]]](else:)[//You must not, yet, go any deeper inland.//] [[Return to the shore|The coast of Carthage]]] <svg d="M270,50 Q270,52 272,52 L278,52 Q280,52 280,50" fill="none" stroke="#c8a86a" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.5"/></svg> (set: $sobriety to $sobriety - 25) You're served. [[Back to the bar|The French]] <svg class="french-rule" viewBox="0 0 300 24" width="100%" height="24" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><linearGradient id="frC" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" ry="2"/></g></svg></svg> <div class="pillars-scene"> <div class="pillars-light"></div> <div class="pillars-smoke"></div> <div class="pillars-dust"><span style="left:12%;bottom:18%;animation-duration:7s;animation-delay:0s;"></span><span style="left:32%;bottom:8%;animation-duration:9.5s;animation-delay:1.2s;"></span><span style="left:52%;bottom:28%;animation-duration:6.5s;animation-delay:2.8s;"></span><span style="left:72%;bottom:5%;animation-duration:11s;animation-delay:0.4s;"></span><span style="left:22%;bottom:38%;animation-duration:8.5s;animation-delay:1.8s;"></span><span style="left:82%;bottom:22%;animation-duration:10s;animation-delay:3.5s;"></span><span style="left:42%;bottom:12%;animation-duration:7.8s;animation-delay:0.8s;"></span><span style="left:62%;bottom:32%;animation-duration:9s;animation-delay:2.2s;"></span></div> <!-- Left broken pillar — Piranesi/Decline & Fall style --> <svg class="pillar left" viewBox="0 0 34 280" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMax meet"><defs><linearGradient id="pf" x1="0" x2="0" y1="0" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#8ac8dc" stop-opacity="0.72"/><stop offset="60%" stop-color="#8ac8dc" stop-opacity="0.42"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#8ac8dc" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient></defs><!-- Two-step plinth base --><rect x="1" y="252" width="32" height="8" fill="none" stroke="url(#pf)" stroke-width="1.1"/><rect x="4" y="246" width="26" height="7" fill="none" stroke="url(#pf)" stroke-width="1"/><!-- Shaft edges (slight taper: 24px wide at top, 26px at base) --><line x1="5" y1="246" x2="6" y2="88" stroke="url(#pf)" stroke-width="1.1"/><line x1="29" y1="246" x2="28" y2="88" stroke="url(#pf)" stroke-width="1.1"/><!-- Drum course bands every 22px --><line x1="5.3" y1="110" x2="28.7" y2="110" stroke="url(#pf)" stroke-width="0.65"/><line x1="5.5" y1="132" x2="28.5" y2="132" stroke="url(#pf)" stroke-width="0.65"/><line x1="5.5" y1="154" x2="28.5" y2="154" stroke="url(#pf)" stroke-width="0.65"/><line x1="5.5" y1="176" x2="28.5" y2="176" stroke="url(#pf)" stroke-width="0.65"/><line x1="5.5" y1="198" x2="28.5" y2="198" stroke="url(#pf)" stroke-width="0.65"/><line x1="5.5" y1="220" x2="28.5" y2="220" stroke="url(#pf)" stroke-width="0.65"/><line x1="5.5" y1="242" x2="28.5" y2="242" stroke="url(#pf)" stroke-width="0.65"/><!-- Faint fluting --><line x1="10" y1="88" x2="10" y2="245" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.22"/><line x1="14" y1="88" x2="14" y2="245" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.22"/><line x1="17" y1="88" x2="17" y2="245" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.22"/><line x1="20" y1="88" x2="20" y2="245" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.22"/><line x1="24" y1="88" x2="24" y2="245" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.22"/><!-- Echinus (curved capital swell) --><path d="M6,88 Q5,78 3,72 L31,72 Q29,78 28,88" fill="none" stroke="url(#pf)" stroke-width="1.1"/><!-- Abacus slab — CRACKED, left portion collapsed inward --><!-- Right surviving portion: tilting down-left --><path d="M12,72 L32,68 L33,63 L13,66 Z" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.6"/><!-- Left fallen piece: a slab lying at an angle, partly off the shaft --><path d="M2,74 L-2,70 L8,67 L11,72 Z" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.9" opacity="0.45"/><!-- Fracture line across shaft top --><path d="M6,88 L9,83 L13,87 L17,80 L21,86 L25,79 L28,88" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.9" opacity="0.55"/><!-- A fallen drum section leaning against the shaft at ~1/3 height --><path d="M1,168 L3,160 L9,162 L9,170 L3,172 Z" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.85" opacity="0.32"/><!-- Crack on shaft face --><path d="M13,130 L15,142 L12,150" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.28"/><!-- Rubble at base --><path d="M3,255 L9,255 L10,260 L2,260 Z" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.28"/><path d="M21,257 L28,257 L29,262 L20,261 Z" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.7" opacity="0.22"/><path d="M13,260 L18,259 L19,264 L12,263 Z" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.7" opacity="0.2"/></svg> <!-- Right pillar — same shape, scaleX(-1) mirrors it so break faces inward --> <svg class="pillar right" viewBox="0 0 34 280" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMax meet"><defs><linearGradient id="pf2" x1="0" x2="0" y1="0" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#8ac8dc" stop-opacity="0.72"/><stop offset="60%" stop-color="#8ac8dc" stop-opacity="0.42"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#8ac8dc" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient></defs><rect x="1" y="252" width="32" height="8" fill="none" stroke="url(#pf2)" stroke-width="1.1"/><rect x="4" y="246" width="26" height="7" fill="none" stroke="url(#pf2)" stroke-width="1"/><!-- Shorter shaft: top at y=130 instead of y=88 — this pillar more ruined --><line x1="5" y1="246" x2="6" y2="130" stroke="url(#pf2)" stroke-width="1.1"/><line x1="29" y1="246" x2="28" y2="130" stroke="url(#pf2)" stroke-width="1.1"/><line x1="5.5" y1="152" x2="28.5" y2="152" stroke="url(#pf2)" stroke-width="0.65"/><line x1="5.5" y1="174" x2="28.5" y2="174" stroke="url(#pf2)" stroke-width="0.65"/><line x1="5.5" y1="196" x2="28.5" y2="196" stroke="url(#pf2)" stroke-width="0.65"/><line x1="5.5" y1="218" x2="28.5" y2="218" stroke="url(#pf2)" stroke-width="0.65"/><line x1="5.5" y1="240" x2="28.5" y2="240" stroke="url(#pf2)" stroke-width="0.65"/><line x1="10" y1="130" x2="10" y2="245" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.22"/><line x1="14" y1="130" x2="14" y2="245" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.22"/><line x1="17" y1="130" x2="17" y2="245" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.22"/><line x1="20" y1="130" x2="20" y2="245" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.22"/><line x1="24" y1="130" x2="24" y2="245" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.22"/><!-- Echinus at top of shorter shaft --><path d="M6,130 Q5,120 3,114 L31,114 Q29,120 28,130" fill="none" stroke="url(#pf2)" stroke-width="1.1"/><!-- This column: abacus has COLLAPSED entirely — jagged stump and tilted block --><path d="M3,114 L6,107 L10,112 L14,104 L18,110 L22,102 L27,108 L31,114" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.6"/><!-- Large fallen capital block --><path d="M2,106 L-3,98 L14,94 L17,104 Z" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.5"/><!-- Fracture running down shaft --><path d="M6,130 L9,125 L13,129 L17,122 L21,128 L25,121 L28,130" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.9" opacity="0.55"/><path d="M9,142 L11,158 L8,164" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.28"/><!-- Fallen drum leaning against shaft --><path d="M1,215 L3,207 L9,209 L9,217 L3,219 Z" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.85" opacity="0.3"/><!-- Rubble at base --><path d="M3,255 L9,255 L10,260 L2,260 Z" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.28"/><path d="M22,257 L29,257 L30,262 L21,261 Z" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.7" opacity="0.22"/><path d="M11,260 L17,259 L18,264 L10,263 Z" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.7" opacity="0.2"/></svg> <!-- Lattice pub window at top --> <svg class="pillars-lattice" viewBox="0 0 300 36" width="100%" height="36" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><linearGradient id="latEdge" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#7ab8cc" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="15%" stop-color="#7ab8cc" stop-opacity="0.55"/><stop offset="85%" stop-color="#7ab8cc" stop-opacity="0.55"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#7ab8cc" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient><pattern id="dLat" x="0" y="0" width="42" height="24" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse"><path d="M7,0 L14,12 L7,24 L0,12 Z" fill="rgba(160,35,25,0.26)" stroke="#5a96aa" stroke-width="1" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M21,0 L28,12 L21,24 L14,12 Z" fill="rgba(185,215,235,0.07)" stroke="#5a96aa" stroke-width="1" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M35,0 L42,12 L35,24 L28,12 Z" fill="rgba(28,108,52,0.22)" stroke="#5a96aa" stroke-width="1" stroke-linejoin="round"/></pattern><mask id="latMask"><rect x="0" y="0" width="300" height="36" fill="url(#latEdge)"/></mask></defs><rect x="0" y="0" width="300" height="36" fill="url(#dLat)" mask="url(#latMask)"/><line x1="0" y1="34" x2="300" y2="34" stroke="url(#latEdge)" stroke-width="1.2"/></svg> (unless: $visited is a datamap)[(set: $visited to (dm:))]\ (unless: $visited contains "Pillars")[(set: $visited's Pillars to false)]\ (set: $sobriety to $sobriety - 18)\ (set: $exploredSinceFrench to true)\ (if: $visited's Pillars is false)[(set: $visited's Pillars to true)\ (set: $confidence to $confidence + 8)]\ When you pass the Pillars' threshold you've already made your choice. Whatever more you choose comes out in the wash: <div class="verse"> Hobson has supt, and 's newly gon to bed. </div> (if: $hadPhoneCall is false)[The phone behind the bar rings. The barman calls your name. [[Answer the phone|The phone call]]] (else:)[Through the fumes, vapours and drink, you recognise a man. (if: $metCritic is true)[ <div class="lore-box"> <strong>⟡ THE GREAT HAM ⟡</strong> [placeholder] </div> [[Talk to The Great Ham|Talk to the critic]]](else:)[[[Talk to the halfcut literary critic|Talk to the critic]]]] </div> <!-- Swinging bulb --> <div class="cellar-bulb-wrap"> <svg width="48" height="90" viewBox="0 0 48 90"><line x1="24" y1="0" x2="24" y2="30" stroke="#888878" stroke-width="1.4" opacity="0.75"/><rect x="17" y="28" width="14" height="10" rx="2.5"fill="rgba(80,78,65,0.9)" stroke="rgba(160,155,120,0.7)" stroke-width="1"/><rect x="19" y="36" width="10" height="3" rx="1"fill="none" stroke="rgba(150,145,110,0.55)" stroke-width="0.8"/><ellipse cx="24" cy="60" rx="20" ry="22"fill="rgba(255,245,160,0.12)"/><path d="M24,38 C16,38 10,45 10,55 C10,67 16,78 24,78 C32,78 38,67 38,55 C38,45 32,38 24,38 Z"fill="rgba(255,252,210,0.95)" stroke="rgba(220,210,160,0.6)" stroke-width="0.8"/><ellipse cx="24" cy="57" rx="9" ry="11"fill="rgba(255,240,120,0.55)"/><path d="M18,60 L20,53 L24,58 L28,53 L30,60"fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,200,40,0.95)" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linejoin="round"/><rect x="20" y="75" width="8" height="3" rx="1"fill="rgba(200,195,155,0.65)" stroke="none"/></svg> </div> <div class="cellar-scene"> <div class="cellar-light"></div> You bolt for the stairs. Copper shouts something but you're already gone, back through the Colony Room door and onto Dean Street. Your hands are shaking. Your jaw hurts. But you're still standing. [[Dean Street|Dean Street]] </div> (if: $hasTrishaMatchbook is true)[The doorman's saying no tonight. You're about to fuck off, politely, when you think of the matchbook. You give it him. 'Harsent,' he says. 'Not a question. Come in.' [[Enter Trisha's|Trisha's]]]\ (else:)[(set: $confidence to $confidence - 15) They do not know you. [[Dean Street|Dean Street]]] <!-- Swinging bulb --> <div class="cellar-bulb-wrap"> <svg width="48" height="90" viewBox="0 0 48 90"><line x1="24" y1="0" x2="24" y2="30" stroke="#888878" stroke-width="1.4" opacity="0.75"/><rect x="17" y="28" width="14" height="10" rx="2.5"fill="rgba(80,78,65,0.9)" stroke="rgba(160,155,120,0.7)" stroke-width="1"/><rect x="19" y="36" width="10" height="3" rx="1"fill="none" stroke="rgba(150,145,110,0.55)" stroke-width="0.8"/><ellipse cx="24" cy="60" rx="20" ry="22"fill="rgba(255,245,160,0.12)"/><path d="M24,38 C16,38 10,45 10,55 C10,67 16,78 24,78 C32,78 38,67 38,55 C38,45 32,38 24,38 Z"fill="rgba(255,252,210,0.95)" stroke="rgba(220,210,160,0.6)" stroke-width="0.8"/><ellipse cx="24" cy="57" rx="9" ry="11"fill="rgba(255,240,120,0.55)"/><path d="M18,60 L20,53 L24,58 L28,53 L30,60"fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,200,40,0.95)" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linejoin="round"/><rect x="20" y="75" width="8" height="3" rx="1"fill="rgba(200,195,155,0.65)" stroke="none"/></svg> </div> <div class="cellar-scene"> <div class="cellar-light"></div> <div class="pp-arena"> <div class="pp-score"><span class="pp-result-lose">🥊 DOWN 🥊</span></div> </div> You are on the floor. The cellar ceiling rotates slowly above you, like a thought you cannot complete. Copper stands over you, barely winded; he could do this all night and you both know it. 'Brave,' he says. 'Stupid, but brave.' [[Try to get up|Beaten]] <div class="pp-arena"> <div class="pp-score"><span class="pp-result-lose">CAUGHT</span></div> </div> You step back but the wall has other ideas; it meets you like an old debt. Copper's fist finds your shoulder and spins you like a thought he's having about you. 'No room down here,' he says. 'Did nobody mention?' [[Round 2|Fight Round 2]] (set: $fightScore to $fightScore + 1)\ <div class="pp-arena"> <div class="pp-score">ABSORBED</div> </div> You get your arms up. The impact travels through your bones like news through a small town: everyone knows at once. You are still standing. This surprises you both. 'You can take one,' says Copper. 'Good. There's more where that came from.' [[Round 2|Fight Round 2]] (set: $fightScore to $fightScore + 2)\ <div class="pp-arena"> <div class="pp-score"><span class="pp-result-win">CLEAN</span></div> </div> You fold beneath it. His knuckles whistle through the space where your skull had been, where it is not, where it will never be again. For a breath he is off-balance; in his eyes you see a question form. 'Quick,' he admits. 'Let's see about lucky.' [[Round 2|Fight Round 2]] (set: $fightScore to $fightScore + 1)\ <div class="pp-arena"> <div class="pp-score">ABSORBED</div> </div> You catch his wrist. For a moment you are locked together, breathing each other's air, intimate as lovers or as enemies; in Soho these are often the same. He wrenches free. The jab dies undelivered. 'Interesting,' he says. 'Most writers don't fight back.' [[Round 3|Fight Round 3]] (set: _counterChance to (random: 1, 10)) (if: _counterChance >= 6)[(set: $fightScore to $fightScore + 3) <div class="pp-arena"> <div class="pp-score"><span class="pp-result-win">★ COUNTER ★</span></div> </div> You let the jab come. It rocks your head back; stars bloom behind your eyes like flowers in a cemetery. But your own fist is already travelling, and it finds the soft country beneath his ribs. Copper folds. The sound he makes is not language. 'Bastard,' he gasps, when he can. But his eyes are smiling. [[Round 3|Fight Round 3]]] (else:)[<div class="pp-arena"> <div class="pp-score"><span class="pp-result-lose">CAUGHT</span></div> </div> You try to counter but your body is slower than your ambition. His jab snaps your head back. Blood in your mouth, copper-bright. The cellar swims like something seen through bathwater. 'Don't get clever,' says Copper. 'Clever gets you dead.' [[Round 3|Fight Round 3]]] (set: $fightScore to $fightScore + 2)\ <div class="pp-arena"> <div class="pp-score"><span class="pp-result-win">CLEAN</span></div> </div> You slip sideways; his knuckles graze your cheek like a rumour, like something that nearly happened but didn't. He grunts. Annoyance or respect; the Maltese don't differentiate. 'Slippery,' he says. 'Like a poet.' [[Round 3|Fight Round 3]] (set: $fightScore to $fightScore + 1)\ <div class="pp-arena"> <div class="pp-score">CLINCHED</div> </div> You step inside his reach and clinch him. His uppercut has nowhere to go; it dies against your shoulder. You are chest to chest now, breathing hard, close as dancers, close as grief. (if: $fightScore >= 4)[[[Push him off|Fight Victory]]] (else:)[[[He throws you|Fight Defeat]]] <div class="pp-arena"> <div class="pp-score">HEAD ON</div> </div> (set: _finalChance to (random: 1, 10)) (if: _finalChance >= 5)[(set: $fightScore to $fightScore + 3) You charge. His uppercut glances off your shoulder like a confession off a priest. Your forehead meets his nose; there is a sound like a book closing. [[He staggers|Fight Victory]]] (else:)[His uppercut finds you clean. The ceiling and the floor exchange positions; you are no longer certain which is which. [[Darkness|Fight Defeat]]] (set: $fightScore to $fightScore + 2)\ <div class="pp-arena"> <div class="pp-score"><span class="pp-result-win">SLIPPED</span></div> </div> You weave. The uppercut passes through the space you have just vacated, like a train through an empty station. Copper stumbles forward, momentum betraying him. (if: $fightScore >= 4)[[[The opening|Fight Victory]]] (else:)[[[He recovers|Fight Defeat]]] <div class="pp-arena"> <div class="pp-score">🥊 ROUND 1 🥊</div> </div> Copper feints left. You clock it; he clocks you clocking it. Then the right hook comes, wide as a sermon, and the air ahead of his fist arrives first like a herald. [[Duck under it|Fight R1 Duck]] [[Block with your forearms|Fight R1 Block]] [[Step back|Fight R1 Back]] <div class="pp-arena"> <div class="pp-score">🥊 ROUND 2 🥊</div> </div> Copper circles. He has the patience of geography; he could do this until the mountains erode. Then he drives forward—a jab, straight as a sermon, aimed at the bridge of your nose. [[Slip to the side|Fight R2 Slip]] [[Catch his wrist|Fight R2 Catch]] [[Take it and counter|Fight R2 Counter]] <div class="pp-arena"> <div class="pp-score">🥊 ROUND 3 🥊</div> </div> The final exchange. Copper breathes harder now; so do you. The cellar air is thick with what you've both been spending. He feints twice—left, left—then throws everything he has into an uppercut that starts somewhere near his knees. [[Weave away|Fight R3 Weave]] [[Clinch him|Fight R3 Clinch]] [[Meet him head-on|Fight R3 Headon]] <!-- Swinging bulb --> <div class="cellar-bulb-wrap"> <svg width="48" height="90" viewBox="0 0 48 90"><line x1="24" y1="0" x2="24" y2="30" stroke="#888878" stroke-width="1.4" opacity="0.75"/><rect x="17" y="28" width="14" height="10" rx="2.5"fill="rgba(80,78,65,0.9)" stroke="rgba(160,155,120,0.7)" stroke-width="1"/><rect x="19" y="36" width="10" height="3" rx="1"fill="none" stroke="rgba(150,145,110,0.55)" stroke-width="0.8"/><ellipse cx="24" cy="60" rx="20" ry="22"fill="rgba(255,245,160,0.12)"/><path d="M24,38 C16,38 10,45 10,55 C10,67 16,78 24,78 C32,78 38,67 38,55 C38,45 32,38 24,38 Z"fill="rgba(255,252,210,0.95)" stroke="rgba(220,210,160,0.6)" stroke-width="0.8"/><ellipse cx="24" cy="57" rx="9" ry="11"fill="rgba(255,240,120,0.55)"/><path d="M18,60 L20,53 L24,58 L28,53 L30,60"fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,200,40,0.95)" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linejoin="round"/><rect x="20" y="75" width="8" height="3" rx="1"fill="rgba(200,195,155,0.65)" stroke="none"/></svg> </div> <div class="cellar-scene"> <div class="cellar-light"></div> <div class="pp-arena"> <div class="pp-score"><span class="pp-result-win">🥊 STANDING 🥊</span></div> </div> Copper kneels. Blood on his lip like punctuation. He looks up at you and you see something in his face that might be respect, or might be the thing that comes before respect in men like him. 'Alright,' he says. 'Alright.' Quiet Frankie has not moved; Quiet Frankie may never move again. Ashton Granger scribbles like her life depends on it. Perhaps it does. (if: $knowsCopperWord)['You know the words,' says Copper, rising. 'And you've got stones.' He looks at you for a long moment — a man doing an arithmetic he takes seriously. Then he reaches into his jacket. He presses a book of matches into your hand. Unmarked. 'Tell them Salvu sent you.' (set: $confidence to $confidence + 12) (set: $hasTrishaMatchbook to true) [[Try Trisha's|Failure: Trisha's]]] (else:)['You've got stones,' says Copper, rising. 'Wrong door, but stones.' He jerks his thumb toward the stairs: the universal gesture for //go, before I change my mind//. 'Tell whoever sent you that Salvu Copper doesn't forget a face.' (set: $confidence to $confidence + 8) [[Escape up the stairs|Escape success]]] (set: $fightScore to 0)\ <span id="sob-data" style="display:none;">(print: $sobriety)</span> <div id="pre-fight"> <div class="pp-arena"> <div class="pp-score">🥊 THE CELLAR 🥊</div> </div> The cellar contracts like a lung. Copper rolls his shoulders; the sound of them is tectonic. Quiet Frankie looks up for the first time. Even the shadows lean in. 'Three goes,' says Copper. 'More than most get.' He raises his fists in the old style, the Queensberry style, the style of men who learned violence before it had rules. <div style="text-align:center;margin-top:1em;"> <button id="fight-start-btn" onclick="window.startFightGame()" style="background:#1a0a08;color:#d4a574;border:1px solid #8a4a3a;padding:8px 24px;font-family:Georgia,serif;font-size:1em;cursor:pointer;">Put your fists up</button> </div> </div> <div id="fight-arena" style="display:none;"> <div class="pp-arena"> <div class="pp-score" id="round-display">🤜 PRACTICE 1/3 🤜</div> <canvas id="fight-canvas" width="560" height="400" style="display:block;width:100%;height:100%;cursor:crosshair;"></canvas> <div id="fight-narrative" style="text-align:center;padding:0.5em;min-height:2.5em;font-style:italic;color:#d4a574;transition:opacity 0.3s;"></div> <div id="fight-end" style="text-align:center;padding:0.5em;font-family:Courier New,monospace;font-size:1.4em;"></div> <div id="fight-instructions" style="text-align:center;color:#5a4a3a;font-size:0.75em;margin-top:0.5em;letter-spacing:0.1em;">Click a zone to dodge, block, or counter</div> </div> </div> <span id="go-fight-victory" style="display:none;">[[Victory|Fight Victory]]</span> <span id="go-fight-defeat" style="display:none;">[[Defeat|Fight Defeat]]</span> <div class="trishas-frame"> <span class="trishas-strip">· · · · · · · · · ·</span> She knocks //(print: $bookTitle)// to the floor and then very carefully places it back on the table, being certain to alter the page that it fell on. She reads. 'What's wrong with it?' she asks. [[What?|Shana's Verdict]] <div class="trishas-frame"> <span class="trishas-strip">· · · · · · · · · ·</span> 'Wise,' she says. 'Or cowardly. The two are so often the same thing wearing different hats.' She waves you away. A flick of the wrist; a whole dismissal in the gesture. The circle closes behind you like water. (set: $confidence to $confidence - 12) [[Back to the bar|Trisha's]] <div class="trishas-frame"> <span class="trishas-strip">· · · · · · · · · ·</span> 'Nothing,' she says. 'That's the thing. Nothing is wrong with it. It's just nothing.' She pushes it back towards you. You return it to your bag like something injured. 'I love you but you need to get to work. Bring it to me six months down the line.' (set: $confidence to $confidence + 8) [[Take the manuscript|After Shana]] <div class="trishas-frame"> <span class="trishas-strip">· · · · · · · · · ·</span> You lift a heavier bag because you are weaker, less than you were. But six months is an age, the kid will be walking by then. You smile and you leave. (if: not ($haunts contains $haunt8))[(if: $hauntExplained is false)[(set: $hauntExplained to true) <div class="lore-box"> <strong>⟡ HAUNTS ⟡</strong> Tonight, Soho will mark you. Here, in our mutual dream, we call them 'haunts'. You'll gather them as you wander the night and its stages. Seek them: you'll need them to get out. </div>] (set: $haunts to $haunts + (a: $haunt8)) <div class="haunt-box"> <div class="haunt-header">⟡ HAUNT COLLECTED ⟡</div> <div class="haunt-name">THE WOUND</div> <div class="haunt-description">She saw through you. That's a gift.</div> </div>] [[Back to Dean Street|Dean Street]] <div class="haunt-tracker"> <strong>HAUNTS</strong> (if: $haunts contains $haunt1)[<div class="haunt-collected">⬖ $haunt1</div>](else:)[<div class="greyed-out">○ The Sketch</div>] (if: $haunts contains $haunt2)[<div class="haunt-collected">⬖ $haunt2</div>](else:)[<div class="greyed-out">○ The Refusal</div>] (if: $haunts contains $haunt3)[<div class="haunt-collected">⬖ $haunt3</div>](else:)[<div class="greyed-out">○ The Beast</div>] (if: $haunts contains $haunt4)[<div class="haunt-collected">⬖ $haunt4</div>](else:)[<div class="greyed-out">○ The Debt</div>] (if: $haunts contains $haunt5)[<div class="haunt-collected">⬖ $haunt5</div>](else:)[<div class="greyed-out">○ The Game</div>] (if: $haunts contains $haunt6)[<div class="haunt-collected">⬖ $haunt6</div>](else:)[<div class="greyed-out">○ The Delivery</div>] (if: $haunts contains $haunt7)[<div class="haunt-collected">⬖ $haunt7</div>](else:)[<div class="greyed-out">○ The Head</div>] (if: $haunts contains $haunt8)[<div class="haunt-collected">⬖ $haunt8</div>](else:)[<div class="greyed-out">○ The Wound</div>] </div> <svg class="french-rule" viewBox="0 0 300 24" width="100%" height="24" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><linearGradient id="frC" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#c8a86a" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="45%" stop-color="#c8a86a" stop-opacity="0.55"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#c8a86a" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="frD" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#c8a86a" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="45%" stop-color="#c8a86a" stop-opacity="0.28"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#c8a86a" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient></defs><line x1="0" y1="7" x2="300" y2="7" stroke="url(#frD)" stroke-width="0.5"/><line x1="0" y1="12" x2="300" y2="12" stroke="url(#frC)" stroke-width="1.2"/><svg x="140" y="0" width="20" height="24" viewBox="-12 -2 24 26" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"><g fill="#c8a86a" opacity="0.75"><path d="M0,15 C-3,10 -4,2 0,-1 C4,2 3,10 0,15Z"/><path d="M-1,13 C-4,10 -8,5 -9,3 C-9,5 -8,6 -6,5 C-3,8 -1,11 0,13Z"/><path d="M1,13 C4,10 8,5 9,3 C9,5 8,6 6,5 C3,8 1,11 0,13Z"/><rect x="-8" y="14" width="16" height="2.5" rx="0.5"/><ellipse cx="0" cy="20" rx="2.5" ry="2"/></g></svg></svg> (set: $sobriety to $sobriety - 12)\ You nod; he orders two double whisky-sodas. Clocking first, his face, then your own in a pier glass behind him, you observe that you both look much older than you should, had you aged normally or healthily in the time since you stopped speaking. His slate eyes shine like slate does after cold rain. 'You're selling something,' he says. 'I saw you buttering Red.' John St. John (for that is his name) is a poet who hates Red, with a hatred more instinct than reason. It took seed in the days when they both used the upstairs room in a Bloomsbury pub as their personal office, though its roots find life in something deeper. (link: "⟡ LORE: On Red and John St. John ⟡")[<div class="lore-box"><p>There is a cleaving-apart in English poetics, much as there is in philosophy, which derives from a difference of opinion about the French and the Germans. Where Red isn't English, he is mostly French. He is Arthur Rimbaud on Charing Cross Road and his poems enact their dérive among the fragments of Mallarmé and Laforgue that Eliot shored up against the ruins in which the Great War left Europe.</p> <p>In //Socialism: Utopian and Scientific// (1880), Friedrich Engels differentiates between socialists for whom socialism is mostly about acting to make the world better for those who live in it, who are often English, and those whose socialism is rooted in a scientific understanding of 'will', as an abstract, impersonal force, subject to the laws of dialectics, not Christian morality.</p> <p>Red doesn't know it, but he is of the scientific party. John St. John, on the other hand, is an English poet, in the way that the Coverdale Bible is an English Bible.</p></div>] <svg class="french-rule" viewBox="0 0 300 24" width="100%" height="24" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><linearGradient id="frC" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#c8a86a" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="45%" stop-color="#c8a86a" stop-opacity="0.55"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#c8a86a" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="frD" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#c8a86a" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="45%" stop-color="#c8a86a" stop-opacity="0.28"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#c8a86a" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient></defs><line x1="0" y1="7" x2="300" y2="7" stroke="url(#frD)" stroke-width="0.5"/><line x1="0" y1="12" x2="300" y2="12" stroke="url(#frC)" stroke-width="1.2"/><svg x="140" y="0" width="20" height="24" viewBox="-12 -2 24 26" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"><g fill="#c8a86a" opacity="0.75"><path d="M0,15 C-3,10 -4,2 0,-1 C4,2 3,10 0,15Z"/><path d="M-1,13 C-4,10 -8,5 -9,3 C-9,5 -8,6 -6,5 C-3,8 -1,11 0,13Z"/><path d="M1,13 C4,10 8,5 9,3 C9,5 8,6 6,5 C3,8 1,11 0,13Z"/><rect x="-8" y="14" width="16" height="2.5" rx="0.5"/><ellipse cx="0" cy="20" rx="2.5" ry="2"/></g></svg></svg> [[Drink with him|The Empty Glass]] <svg class="french-rule" viewBox="0 0 300 24" width="100%" height="24" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><linearGradient id="frC" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#c8a86a" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="45%" stop-color="#c8a86a" stop-opacity="0.55"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#c8a86a" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="frD" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#c8a86a" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="45%" stop-color="#c8a86a" stop-opacity="0.28"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#c8a86a" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient></defs><line x1="0" y1="7" x2="300" y2="7" stroke="url(#frD)" stroke-width="0.5"/><line x1="0" y1="12" x2="300" y2="12" stroke="url(#frC)" stroke-width="1.2"/><svg x="140" y="0" width="20" height="24" viewBox="-12 -2 24 26" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"><g fill="#c8a86a" opacity="0.75"><path d="M0,15 C-3,10 -4,2 0,-1 C4,2 3,10 0,15Z"/><path d="M-1,13 C-4,10 -8,5 -9,3 C-9,5 -8,6 -6,5 C-3,8 -1,11 0,13Z"/><path d="M1,13 C4,10 8,5 9,3 C9,5 8,6 6,5 C3,8 1,11 0,13Z"/><rect x="-8" y="14" width="16" height="2.5" rx="0.5"/><ellipse cx="0" cy="20" rx="2.5" ry="2"/></g></svg></svg> After these thoughts you drink and while you drink you notice that John's glass is empty already. He drops it and it smashes. 'Thank God, that was empty,' he says, and stands. You reach for your wallet and he waves you off. 'Next time,' he says, 'It all comes out in the wash.' He's gone and you know that you owe something now. The fact of kindness ties you to this place. (if: not ($haunts contains $haunt4))[(if: $hauntExplained is false)[(set: $hauntExplained to true) <div class="lore-box"> <strong>⟡ HAUNTS ⟡</strong> Tonight, Soho will mark you. Here, in our mutual dream, we call them 'haunts'. You'll gather them as you wander the night and its stages. Seek them: you'll need them to get out. </div>] (set: $haunts to $haunts + (a: $haunt4)) (set: $exploredSinceFrench to false) <div class="haunt-box"> <div class="haunt-header">⟡ HAUNT COLLECTED ⟡</div> <div class="haunt-name">THE DEBT</div> <div class="haunt-description">You'll never not owe somebody a drink.</div> </div>] <svg class="french-rule" viewBox="0 0 300 24" width="100%"
