0,13Z"/><rect x="-8" y="14" width="16" height="2.5" rx="0.5"/><ellipse cx="0" cy="20" rx="2.5" ry="2"/></g></svg></svg> [[Back to Dean Street|Dean Street]] <!-- Swinging bulb --> <div class="cellar-bulb-wrap"> <svg width="48" height="90" viewBox="0 0 48 90"><!-- Wire from ceiling --><line x1="24" y1="0" x2="24" y2="30" stroke="#888878" stroke-width="1.4" opacity="0.75"/><!-- Socket cap --><rect x="17" y="28" width="14" height="10" rx="2.5"fill="rgba(80,78,65,0.9)" stroke="rgba(160,155,120,0.7)" stroke-width="1"/><!-- Socket ring detail --><rect x="19" y="36" width="10" height="3" rx="1"fill="none" stroke="rgba(150,145,110,0.55)" stroke-width="0.8"/><!-- Outer glow halo --><ellipse cx="24" cy="60" rx="20" ry="22"fill="rgba(255,245,160,0.12)"/><!-- Bulb body — pear shape, bright and solid --><path d="M24,38 C16,38 10,45 10,55 C10,67 16,78 24,78 C32,78 38,67 38,55 C38,45 32,38 24,38 Z"fill="rgba(255,252,210,0.95)" stroke="rgba(220,210,160,0.6)" stroke-width="0.8"/><!-- Inner warm core --><ellipse cx="24" cy="57" rx="9" ry="11"fill="rgba(255,240,120,0.55)"/><!-- Filament — W-shape --><path d="M18,60 L20,53 L24,58 L28,53 L30,60"fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,200,40,0.95)" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linejoin="round"/><!-- Neck base ring --><rect x="20" y="75" width="8" height="3" rx="1"fill="rgba(200,195,155,0.65)" stroke="none"/></svg> </div> <div class="cellar-scene"> <div class="cellar-light"></div> 'Come in then,' says Copper. You do as you're told as he closes the door behind you. 'Downstairs,' says Copper. You don't remember it being downstairs. Salvu Copper is a big man in a small body, or perhaps it's the other way round, you can't be sure. You barrel yourself into a cellar, cold and pale. It extends to your left, beneath the colony rooms and probably one plot further. You turn to Copper, who has just joined you from the stairs. [[Turn to Copper|Turn to Copper]] </div> <div class="items-tracker"> <strong>OBJECTS</strong> (if: $hasTrishaMatchbook is true)[<div class="item-entry">◈ Trisha's matchbook (an invitation)</div>](else:)[<div class="greyed-out">○ A matchbook</div>] (if: $knowsCecilCourt is true)[<div class="item-entry">◈ A beer mat — Cecil Court scrawled on the back</div>](else:)[<div class="greyed-out">○ A beer mat</div>] (if: $hasMissingPage is true)[<div class="item-entry">◈ Page 47 (for O'Flatterly)</div>](else:)[<div class="greyed-out">○ A missing page</div>] </div> <svg class="coach-beam" viewBox="0 0 300 36" width="100%" height="36" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><linearGradient id="wdA" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#3a2408" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="10%" stop-color="#5c3810" stop-opacity="1"/><stop offset="90%" stop-color="#5c3810" stop-opacity="1"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#3a2408" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="wdB" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#3a2408" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="10%" stop-color="#7a5220" stop-opacity="0.7"/><stop offset="90%" stop-color="#7a5220" stop-opacity="0.7"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#3a2408" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="brA" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#c8922a" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="50%" stop-color="#c8922a" stop-opacity="0.7"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#c8922a" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient></defs><rect x="0" y="6" width="300" height="24" fill="url(#wdA)"/><line x1="0" y1="6" x2="300" y2="6" stroke="url(#wdB)" stroke-width="1.2"/><line x1="0" y1="30" x2="300" y2="30" stroke="url(#wdB)" stroke-width="1.2"/><line x1="0" y1="18" x2="300" y2="18" stroke="url(#brA)" stroke-width="1.5"/><circle cx="50" cy="18" r="4" fill="#c8922a" opacity="0.5"/><circle cx="150" cy="18" r="4.5" fill="#c8922a" opacity="0.55"/><circle cx="250" cy="18" r="4" fill="#c8922a" opacity="0.5"/></svg> 'Will you do something about this cow?' Said Jeffrey Bernard. You take its bridle. It sneezes. When you look back he's disappeared to a timeshare on the seacoast of Bohemia. (if: not ($haunts contains $haunt3))[(if: $hauntExplained is false)[(set: $hauntExplained to true) <div class="lore-box"> <strong>⟡ HAUNTS ⟡</strong> Tonight, Soho will mark you. Here, in our dream, we call these marks 'haunts'. You'll gather them as you wander the night and its stages. Seek them: you'll need them to get out. </div>] (set: $haunts to $haunts + (a: $haunt3)) <div class="haunt-box"> <div class="haunt-header">⟡ HAUNT COLLECTED ⟡</div> <div class="haunt-name">THE BEAST</div> <div class="haunt-description">Is it New York or New Year?</div> </div>] What will you do with his cow? [[Ride the beast|Ride Jeffrey Bernard's cow]] (set: $alba to $alba + (a: $alba1)) (set: $albaGiven's red to true)\ (set: $albaRevealed to true) 'You'll not sell it,' says Red. 'Forget the writing. That's no way to live.' As he turns from his ginger light, he kisses you and as he does you close your eyes. He is still speaking. Inside their shuttered lids you read: <div class="revelation-box alba-fade-first"> <em>"$alba1"</em> </div> <strong class="alba-counter alba-fade-first">THE FIRST LINE OF THREE</strong> [[Dream On|Alba Revealed]] <div class="quest-box"> <div class="quest-header">⟡ ALBA ⟡</div> <div class="quest-description"> There are three lines of an aubade out in the darkness. Find them before dawn and you'll get out alive. Miss them and you'll be another Dean Street dream. </div> <div class="quest-objective">FIND THE THREE LINES BEFORE DAWN</div> </div> [[Back to Dean Street|Dean Street]] <div id="gs-approach"></div>[[·|LINE 2]] Just off the beach is a bar called The Green Sea. It's mostly old men playing cribbage, and on its wall is a portrait of Ban Ali, though standards have slipped or morals have grown less important; there are women here now, white women, at least. At the back round the second biggest table is a family you know, playing cards with an Italian deck. Among them, with his back to you, is your old friend. The eldest of the kids. You see him before he sees you. (link: "Listen")[(set: $alba to $alba + (a: $alba2)) (set: $albaGiven's street2 to true) He speaks. The family roars on around, as his old sister winds a trick, him but you hear only this: <div class="revelation-box"> <em>"$alba2"</em> </div> <span class="lily-thought">North Quad, St. John's College, Oxford. Late May night and the sexy airs of summer, the trees' munificence. Her staircase and then her, footsteps away. And in the night-blown roses of your ears, repeating what you've learned for your exams: //Annihilating all that's made To a green thought in a green shade.//</span> <strong class="alba-counter">THE SECOND LINE OF THREE</strong> [[Return to Dean Street|Dean Street]]] If dawn was something you could hear, you would hear it now. Your ears are attuned in a way that your eyes can never be. But you trust your eyes more, so the thrum of dawn approaching, registers as a silent alarm. Then you see it, the sky tearing patches from itself and bleeding red, orange, green through the night's bandage. (link: "Closer")[(set: $alba to $alba + (a: $alba3)) (set: $albaGiven's street3 to true) The last line comes out of your own throat, as you cry, 'I wish that I was never…' then: <div class="revelation-box"> <em>"$alba3"</em> </div> <span class="lily-thought">In a certain memory she sits on your bed, dressing; she is in her underwear, which is black and laced. It is not her beauty that stays with you or her nakedness; they struck you at the time but you've known many women after her. What changed you, under it all, was that vision of something you could not believe, made real; the perfect reality of love imagined, for the first time in your mind, as something close, that you could hold, kiss and make love to. It was the only time that life became quite real and you could not believe it. You'd burn Troy after Troy to see God's face like that again.</span> It is written. You shall get out alive. <strong class="alba-counter">THE THIRD LINE — THE ALBA IS COMPLETE</strong> [[Soho!|Things turn up]]] Downstairs. A table tennis table, green as money. Two men: John Clegg, bookseller. David Harsent, poet. 20-20. Match point. [[Watch the decider|Watch the decider]] <div class="copper-door"> <!-- Maltese cross rule — dark iron tones --> <svg viewBox="0 0 300 40" width="100%" height="40" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><linearGradient id="mgEdge" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#6b2020" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="15%" stop-color="#6b2020" stop-opacity="0.5"/><stop offset="85%" stop-color="#6b2020" stop-opacity="0.5"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#6b2020" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient></defs><line x1="0" y1="36" x2="300" y2="36" stroke="url(#mgEdge)" stroke-width="1.5"/><line x1="0" y1="4" x2="300" y2="4" stroke="url(#mgEdge)" stroke-width="0.8"/><!-- Maltese cross centre --><g transform="translate(150,20)" fill="none" stroke="#8b3030" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0.55"><path d="M0,-10 L4,-4 L10,0 L4,4 L0,10 L-4,4 L-10,0 L-4,-4 Z"/><circle cx="0" cy="0" r="2.5" stroke-width="0.8"/></g><!-- Side studs --><circle cx="60" cy="20" r="1.8" fill="#4a1818" opacity="0.4"/><circle cx="240" cy="20" r="1.8" fill="#4a1818" opacity="0.4"/><circle cx="30" cy="20" r="1.2" fill="#4a1818" opacity="0.25"/><circle cx="270" cy="20" r="1.2" fill="#4a1818" opacity="0.25"/></svg> Salvu Copper, who is proportioned brutally, opens the door and leans over the threshold, like a hawk might hang over its prey. 'Can I help you?' said Salvu. <span class="guided-link">[['I'm a member.'|Approach Coppers Lair]]</span> [['Sorry, I think I've got the wrong door.'|Wrong door]] (if: $hasCoin is true)[<script>if(window.coinGate)window.coinGate("'I'm a member.'","'Sorry, I think I've got the wrong door.'");</script>] <svg viewBox="0 0 300 40" width="100%" height="40" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><linearGradient id="mgEdge2" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#6b2020" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="15%" stop-color="#6b2020" stop-opacity="0.5"/><stop offset="85%" stop-color="#6b2020" stop-opacity="0.5"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#6b2020" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient></defs><line x1="0" y1="4" x2="300" y2="4" stroke="url(#mgEdge2)" stroke-width="1.5"/><line x1="0" y1="36" x2="300" y2="36" stroke="url(#mgEdge2)" stroke-width="0.8"/><g transform="translate(150,20)" fill="none" stroke="#8b3030" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0.55"><path d="M0,-10 L4,-4 L10,0 L4,4 L0,10 L-4,4 L-10,0 L-4,-4 Z"/><circle cx="0" cy="0" r="2.5" stroke-width="0.8"/></g></svg> </div> <div class="maritime-scene"> <div class="maritime-lamp"></div> <div class="maritime-lightning"></div> <span class="maritime-svg-wrap"><svg viewBox="0 0 1200 18" preserveAspectRatio="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M0,9 C25,2 50,16 75,9 C100,2 125,16 150,9 C175,2 200,16 225,9 C250,2 275,16 300,9 C325,2 350,16 375,9 C400,2 425,16 450,9 C475,2 500,16 525,9 C550,2 575,16 600,9 C625,2 650,16 675,9 C700,2 725,16 750,9 C775,2 800,16 825,9 C850,2 875,16 900,9 C925,2 950,16 975,9 C1000,2 1025,16 1050,9 C1075,2 1100,16 1125,9 C1150,2 1175,16 1200,9" fill="none" stroke="#4a7090" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.8"/></svg></span> Turning onto Greek Street, you find yourself at sea and in a storm. <span class="maritime-svg-wrap slow"><svg viewBox="0 0 1200 18" preserveAspectRatio="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M0,12 C30,4 60,16 90,12 C120,4 150,16 180,12 C210,4 240,16 270,12 C300,4 330,16 360,12 C390,4 420,16 450,12 C480,4 510,16 540,12 C570,4 600,16 630,12 C660,4 690,16 720,12 C750,4 780,16 810,12 C840,4 870,16 900,12 C930,4 960,16 990,12 C1020,4 1050,16 1080,12 C1110,4 1140,16 1170,12 C1200,4 1200,16 1200,12" fill="none" stroke="#3a5a78" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0.9"/></svg></span> The broiling waters shred your ship till it's leaf-tobacco, toss it like a stub. <span class="maritime-svg-wrap"><svg viewBox="0 0 1200 18" preserveAspectRatio="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M0,9 C25,2 50,16 75,9 C100,2 125,16 150,9 C175,2 200,16 225,9 C250,2 275,16 300,9 C325,2 350,16 375,9 C400,2 425,16 450,9 C475,2 500,16 525,9 C550,2 575,16 600,9 C625,2 650,16 675,9 C700,2 725,16 750,9 C775,2 800,16 825,9 C850,2 875,16 900,9 C925,2 950,16 975,9 C1000,2 1025,16 1050,9 C1075,2 1100,16 1125,9 C1150,2 1175,16 1200,9" fill="none" stroke="#4a7090" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.8"/></svg></span> A big hand splits the sky and a big voice booms: <span class="ne-plus-ultra">NE. PLUS. ULTRA.</span> Do you keep going? [[Yes|Approach The Pillars]] (if: $knowsCecilCourt is true)[[[Seek the shore|The coast of Carthage]]](else:)[//The horizon is lost in spray.//] </div> (set: $exploredSinceFrench to true)\ You find the building on Frith Street, on the door: M. Lackland. You knock and he buzzes you in. You climb two doglegs to his rooms. He lifts the needle from his record, sinks his glass then tops it up again (more scotch and soda). (link: "⟡ What's he listening to? ⟡")[<div class="lore-box"> On the turntable was //2 + 2 + 1 = Ponderosa Twins Plus One//, by the Ponderosa Twins Plus One, more specifically the song 'Bound', on which the producer Bobby Massey has writing credit. Massey had been with the O'Jays and would go on, after the turning of the millennium, to be listed as executive producer on a film with the Spice Girls and two films with David Beckham. But he, like the rest of that group, was from Cleveland, Ohio, in the U.S.A. I'm writing this in February, 2026; if you're reading it you'll have lived at least a touch longer. So we'll know that Ye sample that song in 'Bound 2', when he still went by Kanye West. But Lackland knows nothing about that. He has a Garrard 401 screwed into the wall, with an SME arm bolted on and a Shure cartridge. This means that he can play his music loudly. He found the album at Dobell's several lunches ago, and it's hardly been silent since. </div>] He turns to his desk with both his elbows and setting them down individually, says, 'You were sent here by Jeffrey?' You nod. 'Well, give it here.' You lay //(print: $bookTitle)// down. He reads the first page; then the last; then a page from somewhere in the middle. (if: $confidence >= 60)[He sets it down as one might set a toddler down on the floor. 'This isn't bad. Have you got a job? A wife? How long can you give to me? You've something but there's work to do; lots of work.' This is as close as you've come to anything. (set: $confidence to $confidence + 15) [[Leave|Dean Street]]] (else:)[He sets it down. 'This isn't there.' You knew that. (set: $confidence to $confidence - 12) [[Leave|Dean Street]]] (if: $knowsCopperSecret is true)[You notice a door at the back of the office you hadn't seen before. Or perhaps you had, but now it means something. <span class="guided-link">[[Whisper "Valletta"|Lackland's Back Room]]</span>] (set: $knowsLackland to true)\ (set: $confidence to $confidence + 4)\ You're back on Dean Street. From the direction of Leicester Square a man is approaching. He is walking a cow. He is Jeffrey Bernard. He stops, and resumes a conversation you'd never begun: 'I'd very much like to wake up one morning with a cow of the Friesian variety and walk her down to Soho to the Coach and Horses, stopping on the way to buy twenty Players, ply her with vodkas until closing time, whip her off to an Indian restaurant, take her up to the Colony Room till 5.30 and then to the Yorkminster, Swiss Tavern, Three Greyhounds, get beaten up by Chinese waiters at midnight, have a row with the taxi driver, set the bed on fire, put it out with tears and then wake up on the floor. Could you then milk said cow? I doubt it.' The cow regards you with milky indifference. [[Deal with the cow|Jeffrey Bernard's Cow]] [[Walk away|Dean Street]] (if: $hasCoin is true)[<script>if(window.coinGate)window.coinGate("Deal with the cow","Walk away");</script>] You lie on the Dean Street pavement like a mechanic under a chassis, take an udder in your fist and squeeze it, gingerly. A little warm milk plashes on your lips. It tastes of grass and moonlight and something you can't name. 'This,' you think, 'is why he is unwell.' (set: $sobriety to $sobriety + 15) (set: $confidence to $confidence + 10) [[Get up and try again|Dean Street]] Centre Point is still behind you. It's been there all night long. The way that you conceive, now, of its height is more temporal than spatial and like time but not but like space it remains impossible, merely notional; has a quality that space only attains when we imagine it infinitely. One jumping from the top should fall forever and seem to fall as a ton of feathers falls in a perfect vacuum. Standing here you can see London, Carthage, Liverpool and everything else. (if: $hadPhoneCall is true)[You think of Aoife. The baby. The cold flat waiting for you with nothing in it but your failure.] [[Lose|Black page]] <div class="pillars-scene"> <div class="pillars-light"></div> <div class="pillars-smoke"></div> <div class="pillars-dust"><span style="left:12%;bottom:18%;animation-duration:7s;animation-delay:0s;"></span><span style="left:32%;bottom:8%;animation-duration:9.5s;animation-delay:1.2s;"></span><span style="left:52%;bottom:28%;animation-duration:6.5s;animation-delay:2.8s;"></span><span style="left:72%;bottom:5%;animation-duration:11s;animation-delay:0.4s;"></span><span style="left:22%;bottom:38%;animation-duration:8.5s;animation-delay:1.8s;"></span><span style="left:82%;bottom:22%;animation-duration:10s;animation-delay:3.5s;"></span><span style="left:42%;bottom:12%;animation-duration:7.8s;animation-delay:0.8s;"></span><span style="left:62%;bottom:32%;animation-duration:9s;animation-delay:2.2s;"></span></div> <svg class="pillars-lattice" viewBox="0 0 300 36" width="100%" height="36" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><linearGradient id="latEdge" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#7ab8cc" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="15%" stop-color="#7ab8cc" stop-opacity="0.55"/><stop offset="85%" stop-color="#7ab8cc" stop-opacity="0.55"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#7ab8cc" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient><pattern id="dLat" x="0" y="0" width="42" height="24" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse"><path d="M7,0 L14,12 L7,24 L0,12 Z" fill="rgba(160,35,25,0.26)" stroke="#5a96aa" stroke-width="1" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M21,0 L28,12 L21,24 L14,12 Z" fill="rgba(185,215,235,0.07)" stroke="#5a96aa" stroke-width="1" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M35,0 L42,12 L35,24 L28,12 Z" fill="rgba(28,108,52,0.22)" stroke="#5a96aa" stroke-width="1" stroke-linejoin="round"/></pattern><mask id="latMask"><rect x="0" y="0" width="300" height="36" fill="url(#latEdge)"/></mask></defs><rect x="0" y="0" width="300" height="36" fill="url(#dLat)" mask="url(#latMask)"/><line x1="0" y1="34" x2="300" y2="34" stroke="url(#latEdge)" stroke-width="1.2"/></svg> 'None of us likes it.' <span class="guided-link">(link-goto: "Put //" + $bookTitle + "// on the table", "The critic's judgement")</span> </div> <svg class="cecil-rule" viewBox="0 0 300 40" width="100%" height="40" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><linearGradient id="ccAmb" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#8a6a30" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="15%" stop-color="#a08040" stop-opacity="0.5"/><stop offset="50%" stop-color="#c8a050" stop-opacity="0.6"/><stop offset="85%" stop-color="#a08040" stop-opacity="0.5"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#8a6a30" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient></defs><line x1="20" y1="10" x2="280" y2="10" stroke="url(#ccAmb)" stroke-width="1"/><line x1="20" y1="30" x2="280" y2="30" stroke="url(#ccAmb)" stroke-width="1"/><g opacity="0.5" fill="none" stroke="#c8a050"><rect x="135" y="12" width="12" height="16" rx="1" stroke-width="1"/><line x1="138" y1="14" x2="138" y2="26" stroke-width="0.5"/><rect x="149" y="13" width="10" height="14" rx="1" stroke-width="0.8"/><rect x="117" y="14" width="8" height="12" rx="1" stroke-width="0.7" transform="rotate(-8,121,20)"/><rect x="163" y="11" width="14" height="18" rx="1" stroke-width="0.9"/><line x1="167" y1="13" x2="167" y2="27" stroke-width="0.5"/><line x1="170" y1="13" x2="170" y2="27" stroke-width="0.5"/></g><circle cx="50" cy="20" r="2" fill="#c8a050" opacity="0.4"/><circle cx="250" cy="20" r="2" fill="#c8a050" opacity="0.4"/></svg> Inish O'Flatterly clocks you, first with his eyes still downcast, then eventually as he looks up. 'You're a novelist and that wasn't a question,' he steams; it is the gentle steaming of the kettle, not that of the railway. (if: $hasMissingPage is true)[Your hand goes to your pocket. The page. You'd almost forgotten; the night has that effect. [[Show him the page|Return the page]]]\ (else:)[[[What book?|O'Flatterly's quest]] [[I'll keep an eye out|Dean Street]](if: not ($haunts contains $haunt6))[ <span class="missed-haunt">You missed a haunt</span>]] 'Dear boy,' he burrs, 'I don't know who you are, and don't care who you are, and I don't know that I don't like what you've written; but do me a kindness, kid, and let's just assume I won't love it. Besides, there is something more important that you must do for me; that we must do together.' O'Flatterly coughs, disturbing the dust on the tome before him, agitating its thousand motes into flight, which hang over his desk like slate-grey clouds over Willesden Junction. His hair, which was blond already, seems longer and wilder now. He slaps the manuscript like an arse and says: 'Something's missing! Page 47. It fell from my arms, yesterday night in the dusk, somewhere in Soho. I can tell that you move among monsters and thieves, one of them must have it: get it for me, please.' (set: $knowsAboutPage to true) <div class="lore-box"> <strong>⟡ QUEST ⟡</strong> Inish O'Flatterly is searching for a missing page — Page 47 of an impossible manuscript. It's somewhere in Soho. Find it and return it to him. </div> [[I'll look for it|Dean Street]](if: not ($haunts contains $haunt6))[ <span class="missed-haunt">You missed a haunt</span>] (set: _roll to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $sobriety < 50)[(set: _roll to _roll + 1)] (if: $opponent is "Harsent")[(if: _roll >= 6)[(set: $ppScore to $ppScore + 1) Your smash catches Harsent off-guard. <div class="pp-score">YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent</div>] (else:)[(set: $oppScore to $oppScore + 1) Harsent redirects it back at you, twice as hard. <div class="pp-score">YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent</div>]] (else:)[(if: _roll >= 7)[(set: $ppScore to $ppScore + 1) Clegg doesn't expect it. Point. <div class="pp-score">YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent</div>] (else:)[(set: $oppScore to $oppScore + 1) Clegg absorbs it. Puts it where you aren't. <div class="pp-score">YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent</div>]] (if: $ppScore >= 3)[[[Victory|PP Victory]]] (else:)[(if: $oppScore >= 3)[[[Defeat|PP Defeat]]] (else:)[[[Next point|PP Point 2]]]] (set: _roll to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $sobriety < 50)[(set: _roll to _roll + 1)] (if: $opponent is "Harsent")[(if: _roll >= 6)[(set: $ppScore to $ppScore + 1) You catch him reaching and punish it. <div class="pp-score">YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent</div>] (else:)[(set: $oppScore to $oppScore + 1) Harsent was ready. He always is. <div class="pp-score">YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent</div>]] (else:)[(if: _roll >= 7)[(set: $ppScore to $ppScore + 1) Speed beats precision, this time. <div class="pp-score">YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent</div>] (else:)[(set: $oppScore to $oppScore + 1) Clegg makes you pay for your impatience. <div class="pp-score">YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent</div>]] (if: $ppScore >= 3)[[[Victory|PP Victory]]] (else:)[(if: $oppScore >= 3)[[[Defeat|PP Defeat]]] (else:)[[[Next point|PP Point 3]]]] (set: _roll to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $sobriety < 50)[(set: _roll to _roll + 1)] (if: $opponent is "Harsent")[(if: _roll >= 6)[(set: $ppScore to $ppScore + 1) You go for broke. The ball screams past him. <div class="pp-score">YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent</div>] (else:)[(set: $oppScore to $oppScore + 1) Harsent goes for broke harder. <div class="pp-score">YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent</div>]] (else:)[(if: _roll >= 7)[(set: $ppScore to $ppScore + 1) Clegg can't handle the pressure. Not this time. <div class="pp-score">YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent</div>] (else:)[(set: $oppScore to $oppScore + 1) Clegg redirects your fury into the net. <div class="pp-score">YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent</div>]] (if: $ppScore >= 3)[[[Victory|PP Victory]]] (else:)[(if: $oppScore >= 3)[[[Defeat|PP Defeat]]] (else:)[[[Next point|PP Point 4]]]] (set: _roll to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $sobriety < 50)[(set: _roll to _roll + 1)] (if: $opponent is "Harsent")[(if: _roll >= 6)[(set: $ppScore to $ppScore + 1)] (else:)[(set: $oppScore to $oppScore + 1)]] (else:)[(if: _roll >= 7)[(set: $ppScore to $ppScore + 1)] (else:)[(set: $oppScore to $oppScore + 1)]] (if: $ppScore >= 3)[[[Victory|PP Victory]]] (else:)[(if: $oppScore >= 3)[[[Defeat|PP Defeat]]] (else:)[[[Final point|PP Point 5]]]] (set: $confidence to $confidence - 12)\ <div class="pp-arena"> <div class="pp-score"><span class="pp-result-lose">DEFEAT</span></div> </div> (if: $opponent is "Harsent")[(set: $hasTrishaMatchbook to true) Harsent tosses you a matchbook. 'Trisha's. Tell them Harsent sent you.'] (else:)[(set: $knowsCecilCourt to true) Clegg scrawls something on a beer mat and slides it across. 'A bookseller in Cecil Court. Tell him I sent you.'] (if: not ($haunts contains $haunt5))[(if: $hauntExplained is false)[(set: $hauntExplained to true) <div class="lore-box"> <strong>⟡ HAUNTS ⟡</strong> Tonight, Soho will mark you. Here, in our mutual dream, we call them 'haunts'. You'll gather them as you wander the night and its stages. Seek them: you'll need them to get out. </div>] (set: $haunts to $haunts + (a: $haunt5)) <div class="haunt-box"> <div class="haunt-header">⟡ HAUNT COLLECTED ⟡</div> <div class="haunt-name">THE GAME</div> <div class="haunt-description">*</div> </div>] [[Back upstairs|Dean Street]] (set: _roll to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $sobriety >= 40)[(set: _roll to _roll + 1)] (if: $confidence >= 50)[(set: _roll to _roll + 1)] (if: _roll >= 6)[(set: $ppScore to $ppScore + 1) The ball clips the edge. It could go either way. It goes yours. [[Victory|PP Victory]]] (else:)[(set: $oppScore to $oppScore + 1) The ball clips the edge. It could go either way. It doesn't. [[Defeat|PP Defeat]]] <div class="pp-arena"> <div class="pp-score"><span class="pp-ball">●</span> YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent <span class="pp-ball">●</span></div> How do you play this point? [[Steady and safe — keep it in play|PP Steady 1]] [[Aggressive — go for the winner|PP Aggressive 1]] [[Trick shot — do something unexpected|PP Trick 1]] </div> <div class="pp-arena"> <div class="pp-score"><span class="pp-ball">●</span> YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent <span class="pp-ball">●</span></div> How do you play this point? [[Steady and safe|PP Steady 2]] [[Aggressive|PP Aggressive 2]] [[Trick shot|PP Trick 2]] </div> <div class="pp-arena"> <div class="pp-score"><span class="pp-ball">●</span> YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent <span class="pp-ball">●</span></div> How do you play this point? [[Steady and safe|PP Steady 3]] [[Aggressive|PP Aggressive 3]] [[Trick shot|PP Trick 3]] </div> <div class="pp-arena"> <div class="pp-score"><span class="pp-ball">●</span> YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent <span class="pp-ball">●</span></div> How do you play this point? [[Steady and safe|PP Steady 4]] [[Aggressive|PP Aggressive 4]] [[Trick shot|PP Trick 4]] </div> <div class="pp-arena"> <div class="pp-score"><span class="pp-ball">●</span> YOU 2 — 2 $opponent <span class="pp-ball">●</span></div> 2-2. Winner takes all. [[Everything on one shot|PP Final]] </div> (set: _roll to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $sobriety >= 50)[(set: _roll to _roll + 2)] (if: $opponent is "Harsent")[(if: _roll >= 5)[(set: $ppScore to $ppScore + 1) Harsent grows impatient. Net. <div class="pp-score">YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent</div>] (else:)[(set: $oppScore to $oppScore + 1) Harsent reads you. Forehand. Gone. <div class="pp-score">YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent</div>]] (else:)[(if: _roll >= 6)[(set: $ppScore to $ppScore + 1) You find a gap Clegg can't reach. <div class="pp-score">YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent</div>] (else:)[(set: $oppScore to $oppScore + 1) Clegg outlasts you. Placement. <div class="pp-score">YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent</div>]] (if: $ppScore >= 3)[[[Victory|PP Victory]]] (else:)[(if: $oppScore >= 3)[[[Defeat|PP Defeat]]] (else:)[[[Next point|PP Point 2]]]] (set: _roll to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $sobriety >= 50)[(set: _roll to _roll + 2)] (if: $opponent is "Harsent")[(if: _roll >= 5)[(set: $ppScore to $ppScore + 1) Patience wins. Harsent overreaches and you're there to collect. <div class="pp-score">YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent</div>] (else:)[(set: $oppScore to $oppScore + 1) Harsent finds a rhythm you can't break. <div class="pp-score">YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent</div>]] (else:)[(if: _roll >= 6)[(set: $ppScore to $ppScore + 1) You outlast him. Clegg's precision wavers, just for a moment. <div class="pp-score">YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent</div>] (else:)[(set: $oppScore to $oppScore + 1) Clegg is a machine. You are not. <div class="pp-score">YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent</div>]] (if: $ppScore >= 3)[[[Victory|PP Victory]]] (else:)[(if: $oppScore >= 3)[[[Defeat|PP Defeat]]] (else:)[[[Next point|PP Point 3]]]] (set: _roll to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $sobriety >= 50)[(set: _roll to _roll + 2)] (if: $opponent is "Harsent")[(if: _roll >= 5)[(set: $ppScore to $ppScore + 1) The rally stretches. Twenty shots. Thirty. Finally, Harsent cracks. <div class="pp-score">YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent</div>] (else:)[(set: $oppScore to $oppScore + 1) You crack first. Harsent pounces. <div class="pp-score">YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent</div>]] (else:)[(if: _roll >= 6)[(set: $ppScore to $ppScore + 1) Clegg's rhythm falters. You're there. <div class="pp-score">YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent</div>] (else:)[(set: $oppScore to $oppScore + 1) Clegg finds the angle you forgot to cover. <div class="pp-score">YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent</div>]] (if: $ppScore >= 3)[[[Victory|PP Victory]]] (else:)[(if: $oppScore >= 3)[[[Defeat|PP Defeat]]] (else:)[[[Next point|PP Point 4]]]] (set: _roll to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $sobriety >= 50)[(set: _roll to _roll + 2)] (if: $opponent is "Harsent")[(if: _roll >= 5)[(set: $ppScore to $ppScore + 1)] (else:)[(set: $oppScore to $oppScore + 1)]] (else:)[(if: _roll >= 6)[(set: $ppScore to $ppScore + 1)] (else:)[(set: $oppScore to $oppScore + 1)]] (if: $ppScore >= 3)[[[Victory|PP Victory]]] (else:)[(if: $oppScore >= 3)[[[Defeat|PP Defeat]]] (else:)[[[Final point|PP Point 5]]]] (set: _roll to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $opponent is "Harsent")[(if: _roll >= 7)[(set: $ppScore to $ppScore + 1) Spin serve. Harsent misses it laughing. <div class="pp-score">YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent</div>] (else:)[(set: $oppScore to $oppScore + 1) Harsent's seen clever. He reads it. <div class="pp-score">YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent</div>]] (else:)[(if: _roll >= 8)[(set: $ppScore to $ppScore + 1) Clegg looks surprised. For once. <div class="pp-score">YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent</div>] (else:)[(set: $oppScore to $oppScore + 1) Clegg does fundamentals. Your cleverness bounces off. <div class="pp-score">YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent</div>]] (if: $ppScore >= 3)[[[Victory|PP Victory]]] (else:)[(if: $oppScore >= 3)[[[Defeat|PP Defeat]]] (else:)[[[Next point|PP Point 2]]]] (set: _roll to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $opponent is "Harsent")[(if: _roll >= 7)[(set: $ppScore to $ppScore + 1) The trick works. Harsent swears, delighted. <div class="pp-score">YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent</div>] (else:)[(set: $oppScore to $oppScore + 1) Harsent reads you like a bad poem. <div class="pp-score">YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent</div>]] (else:)[(if: _roll >= 8)[(set: $ppScore to $ppScore + 1) Clegg hesitates. That's all you need. <div class="pp-score">YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent</div>] (else:)[(set: $oppScore to $oppScore + 1) Clegg doesn't hesitate twice. <div class="pp-score">YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent</div>]] (if: $ppScore >= 3)[[[Victory|PP Victory]]] (else:)[(if: $oppScore >= 3)[[[Defeat|PP Defeat]]] (else:)[[[Next point|PP Point 3]]]] (set: _roll to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $opponent is "Harsent")[(if: _roll >= 7)[(set: $ppScore to $ppScore + 1) Madness. It works. <div class="pp-score">YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent</div>] (else:)[(set: $oppScore to $oppScore + 1) Harsent saw it coming. Poets know tricks. <div class="pp-score">YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent</div>]] (else:)[(if: _roll >= 8)[(set: $ppScore to $ppScore + 1) The trick that shouldn't work, works. <div class="pp-score">YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent</div>] (else:)[(set: $oppScore to $oppScore + 1) Clegg punishes your cleverness. <div class="pp-score">YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent</div>]] (if: $ppScore >= 3)[[[Victory|PP Victory]]] (else:)[(if: $oppScore >= 3)[[[Defeat|PP Defeat]]] (else:)[[[Next point|PP Point 4]]]] (set: _roll to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $opponent is "Harsent")[(if: _roll >= 7)[(set: $ppScore to $ppScore + 1)] (else:)[(set: $oppScore to $oppScore + 1)]] (else:)[(if: _roll >= 8)[(set: $ppScore to $ppScore + 1)] (else:)[(set: $oppScore to $oppScore + 1)]] (if: $ppScore >= 3)[[[Victory|PP Victory]]] (else:)[(if: $oppScore >= 3)[[[Defeat|PP Defeat]]] (else:)[[[Final point|PP Point 5]]]] (set: $confidence to $confidence + 15)\ <div class="pp-arena"> <div class="pp-score"><span class="pp-result-win">★ VICTORY ★</span></div> </div> (if: $opponent is "Harsent")[Harsent laughs. Hands you a folded paper. 'A line. Can't find its poem. Maybe you can.'] (else:)[Clegg hands you a slip of paper. 'From an old pamphlet. Seventeenth century. Take it.'] You unfold the paper: <div class="revelation-box"> <em>"Between the acting of a dreadful thing / And the first motion, all the interim is / Like a phantasma, or a hideous dream."</em> </div> It's not the Alba. But it's something. (if: not ($haunts contains $haunt5))[(if: $hauntExplained is false)[(set: $hauntExplained to true) <div class="lore-box"> <strong>⟡ HAUNTS ⟡</strong> Tonight, Soho will mark you. Here, in our mutual dream, we call them 'haunts'. You'll gather them as you wander the night and its stages. Seek them: you'll need them to get out. </div>] (set: $haunts to $haunts + (a: $haunt5)) <div class="haunt-box"> <div class="haunt-header">⟡ HAUNT COLLECTED ⟡</div> <div class="haunt-name">THE GAME</div> <div class="haunt-description">*</div> </div>] [[Back upstairs|Dean Street]] <div class="ronnies-scene"> <div class="ronnies-spot"></div> <div class="ronnies-cone"></div> <svg class="ronnies-rule" viewBox="0 0 300 20" width="100%" height="20" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><linearGradient id="rnG" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#6888b8" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="22%" stop-color="#8aacdc" stop-opacity="0.75"/><stop offset="50%" stop-color="#aac8f0" stop-opacity="0.90"/><stop offset="78%" stop-color="#8aacdc" stop-opacity="0.75"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#6888b8" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="rnGd" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#405880" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="25%" stop-color="#6070a0" stop-opacity="0.45"/><stop offset="75%" stop-color="#6070a0" stop-opacity="0.45"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#405880" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient><!-- Warm stage-light bleed above the main rule --><radialGradient id="rnSpill" cx="50%" cy="100%" r="60%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#e8c060" stop-opacity="0.18"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#e8c060" stop-opacity="0"/></radialGradient></defs><!-- Stage-light spill glow above the rule --><rect x="30" y="0" width="240" height="22" fill="url(#rnSpill)"/><!-- Fine upper shadow line --><line x1="0" y1="18" x2="300" y2="18" stroke="url(#rnGd)" stroke-width="0.7"/><!-- Main bright rule --><line x1="0" y1="22" x2="300" y2="22" stroke="url(#rnG)" stroke-width="2.2"/><!-- Subtle secondary line beneath --><line x1="0" y1="25" x2="300" y2="25" stroke="url(#rnGd)" stroke-width="0.8"/><!-- Small diamond at centre — like a stage footlight marker --><polygon points="150,19 153,22 150,25 147,22" fill="#aac8f0" opacity="0.7"/><!-- Two flanking dots --><circle cx="100" cy="22" r="1.2" fill="#8aacdc" opacity="0.5"/><circle cx="200" cy="22" r="1.2" fill="#8aacdc" opacity="0.5"/></svg> 'Bourbon,' says the guitarist. 'The one with the bird on the label. Tulip glass.' 'Moscow Mule,' says Moe de Alcousin. 'Fresh lime. Not bottled.' 'Scotch,' says the pianist. 'The Macallan. Neat.' <span id="sob-data-bar" style="display:none;">(print: $sobriety)</span> <div class="pp-arena" id="bar-arena"> <div class="pp-score" id="bar-round-display">🎸 THE BAR 🎸</div> <canvas id="bar-canvas" width="560" height="400" style="display:block;width:100%;height:100%;"></canvas> <div id="pre-bar"> <div style="text-align:center;padding:1em;color:#d4a574;font-family:Georgia,serif;"> <p><strong>🎸 Guitarist:</strong> Bourbon — "the one with the bird on the label" — tulip glass</p> <p><strong>🎷 Moe:</strong> Moscow Mule — "fresh lime, not bottled"</p> <p><strong>🎹 Pianist:</strong> Scotch — "The Macallan, neat"</p> <br> <button id="bar-start-btn" onclick="window.startBarGame()" style="background:#2a1a12;color:#d4a574;border:1px solid #d4a574;padding:8px 24px;font-family:Georgia,serif;font-size:1em;cursor:pointer;">Go to the bar</button> </div> </div> <div id="bar-narrative" style="text-align:center;padding:0.5em;min-height:1.5em;font-style:italic;"></div> <div id="bar-end" style="text-align:center;padding:0.5em;"></div> </div> <span id="bar-win-link" long pull of his mule. 'Fresh lime,' he says. 'Tulip,' says the guitarist. The pianist raises his Macallan. 'Wait for this,' says Moe.
