offset="0%" stop-color="#5080c8" stop-opacity="0.30"/><stop offset="12%" stop-color="#6090d0" stop-opacity="0.18"/><stop offset="28%" stop-color="#7aa8d8" stop-opacity="0.09"/><stop offset="50%" stop-color="#7aa8d8" stop-opacity="0.03"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#7aa8d8" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="b3g" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="0" gradientUnits="objectBoundingBox"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#5080c8" stop-opacity="0.28"/><stop offset="12%" stop-color="#6090d0" stop-opacity="0.16"/><stop offset="28%" stop-color="#7aa8d8" stop-opacity="0.08"/><stop offset="55%" stop-color="#7aa8d8" stop-opacity="0.03"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#7aa8d8" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient><radialGradient id="bg1" cx="0%" cy="12%" r="8%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#6090d0" stop-opacity="0.12"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#6090d0" stop-opacity="0"/></radialGradient><radialGradient id="bg2" cx="100%" cy="35%" r="8%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#5080c8" stop-opacity="0.10"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#5080c8" stop-opacity="0"/></radialGradient><radialGradient id="bg3" cx="0%" cy="90%" r="8%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#5080c8" stop-opacity="0.09"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#5080c8" stop-opacity="0"/></radialGradient></defs><circle cx="0" cy="110" r="90" fill="url(#bg1)"/><circle cx="1000" cy="350" r="80" fill="url(#bg2)"/><circle cx="0" cy="910" r="85" fill="url(#bg3)"/><g style="animation:dst-beamPulse1 9s ease-in-out infinite;"><polygon points="0,80 0,140 650,520 620,470" fill="url(#b1g)"/><polygon points="0,60 0,160 680,540 600,450" fill="url(#b1g)" opacity="0.4"/></g><g style="animation:dst-beamPulse2 12s ease-in-out infinite;"><polygon points="1000,320 1000,380 300,580 330,540" fill="url(#b2g)"/><polygon points="1000,300 1000,400 270,600 350,520" fill="url(#b2g)" opacity="0.4"/></g><g style="animation:dst-beamPulse3 15s ease-in-out infinite;"><polygon points="0,880 0,940 800,280 770,240" fill="url(#b3g)"/><polygon points="0,860 0,960 830,300 750,220" fill="url(#b3g)" opacity="0.4"/></g></svg> <div style="position:absolute;top:35%;left:-10%;width:120%;height:18%;background:linear-gradient(to right,transparent 5%,rgba(100,130,180,0.03) 25%,rgba(100,130,180,0.05) 50%,rgba(100,130,180,0.03) 75%,transparent 95%);animation:dst-fog1 22s ease-in-out infinite;"></div> <div style="position:absolute;top:55%;left:-10%;width:120%;height:14%;background:linear-gradient(to right,transparent 10%,rgba(90,120,160,0.025) 30%,rgba(90,120,160,0.04) 55%,rgba(90,120,160,0.025) 80%,transparent 95%);animation:dst-fog2 28s ease-in-out infinite;"></div> <div style="position:absolute;top:70%;left:-10%;width:120%;height:10%;background:linear-gradient(to right,transparent 15%,rgba(80,110,150,0.02) 40%,rgba(80,110,150,0.035) 60%,transparent 90%);animation:dst-fog1 35s ease-in-out infinite;animation-delay:-10s;"></div> <div style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:1;"> <div style="text-align:center;color:#d4c4b0;padding:2em 1em;"> <div style="font-family:'Playfair Display',Georgia,serif;font-size:3.5em;letter-spacing:0.15em;line-height:1.3;animation:dst-titleGlow 6s ease-in-out infinite;">DREAM STREET<br>SHUFFLE</div> <div style="font-family:'Crimson Text',Georgia,serif;font-size:1.15em;margin-top:1.8em;color:#a08060;letter-spacing:0.08em;animation:dst-breathe 8s ease-in-out infinite;">by Three Blue Posts</div> <div style="margin-top:3em;font-size:1.6em;letter-spacing:0.25em;">[[BEGIN|Start]]</div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="trishas-frame"> <span class="trishas-strip">· · · · · · · · · ·</span> (set: $confidence to $confidence + 10)\ (set: $sobriety to $sobriety - 8)\ (set: $exploredSinceFrench to true)\ (unless: $visited is a datamap)[(set: $visited to (dm:))]\ (unless: $visited contains "Trishas")[(set: $visited's Trishas to false)]\ (if: $visited's Trishas is false)[(set: $visited's Trishas to true) <div class="first-visit-hint">TRISHA'S: HERE AT LAST. IT WAS GOING TO HAPPEN SOONER OR LATER.</div>] <h2 class="venue-title">Trisha's</h2> The stairs descend through light incarnadine and lead you onto a ship that seems far from Soho because it sails in the calm at the storm's heart. You enter some eternal afternoon. Years earlier it was perpetual dusk, which is like dawn; balanced; a cocktail stirred, not shaken. Now is the forever afternoon; both the day before and the day after, a kind of grenadine light and frozen-gin time. Mascara running in the Spanish fashion down eyes that would be closed were they not here. Sessile on the circumambient benches, a woman is a mathematical attractor; that is, all systems tend to move her way. She sits, the Byzantine broad, magnificent, with an angel on each side. You know who she is, she is Shana, destroyer of worlds. (if: $metShana is false)[[[Approach Shana|Approach Shana]]] (if: $metShana is true and ($haunts contains $haunt8))[<div class="venue-exhausted">You've spoken to Shana. Nothing more to do here but drink and watch.</div>] (if: $metShana is true and not ($haunts contains $haunt8))[<div class="venue-exhausted">You've spoken to Shana. Nothing more to do here but drink and watch.</div> <span class="missed-haunt">You missed a haunt</span>] (if: $knowsRonnies is true and $completedSetlist is false)[[[Ronnie Scott's is nearby.|Ronnie Scott's]]] [[Back to Dean Street|Dean Street]] <span class="trishas-strip">· · · · · · · · · ·</span></div> <!-- Swinging bulb --> <div class="cellar-bulb-wrap"> <svg width="48" height="90" viewBox="0 0 48 90"><!-- Wire from ceiling --><line x1="24" y1="0" x2="24" y2="30" stroke="#888878" stroke-width="1.4" opacity="0.75"/><!-- Socket cap --><rect x="17" y="28" width="14" height="10" rx="2.5"fill="rgba(80,78,65,0.9)" stroke="rgba(160,155,120,0.7)" stroke-width="1"/><!-- Socket ring detail --><rect x="19" y="36" width="10" height="3" rx="1"fill="none" stroke="rgba(150,145,110,0.55)" stroke-width="0.8"/><!-- Outer glow halo --><ellipse cx="24" cy="60" rx="20" ry="22"fill="rgba(255,245,160,0.12)"/><!-- Bulb body — pear shape, bright and solid --><path d="M24,38 C16,38 10,45 10,55 C10,67 16,78 24,78 C32,78 38,67 38,55 C38,45 32,38 24,38 Z"fill="rgba(255,252,210,0.95)" stroke="rgba(220,210,160,0.6)" stroke-width="0.8"/><!-- Inner warm core --><ellipse cx="24" cy="57" rx="9" ry="11"fill="rgba(255,240,120,0.55)"/><!-- Filament — W-shape --><path d="M18,60 L20,53 L24,58 L28,53 L30,60"fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,200,40,0.95)" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linejoin="round"/><!-- Neck base ring --><rect x="20" y="75" width="8" height="3" rx="1"fill="rgba(200,195,155,0.65)" stroke="none"/></svg> </div> <div class="cellar-scene"> <div class="cellar-light"></div> 'Salvu Copper' is a name you know and now you're putting a face to it. Since the Twins went down in '68, his work's been easier. He's run his little fiefdom – pornography, strip clubs, hookers (the sorts of work that old fashioned East End crooks will swear blind they don't touch) – very nicely, though lately he's feeling the heat. At the far end of the cellar, at a simple wooden table, sits 'Quiet' Frankie Muscat, who seems to you like nothing so much as a planet, the sort of man with moons. Yes, he is big, but his gravity comes, mostly, from his silence and a sense of power unused. Opposite him (and her presence surprises you) is a poet you know, an American girl who comes from banking money, called Ashton Granger. You agreed long ago to pretend not to notice each other, should you accidentally meet. She twirls her hair and scribbles without looking at the page, and gives Quiet Frankie a kind of angry come-hither look. Copper speaks: 'What have you got to say for yourself?' (if: $knowsCopperWord)[You say the words. Copper's face changes — just a fraction, a recalibration. 'You know the words,' he says. 'You still knocked on the wrong door.' He steps closer. Quiet Frankie still hasn't looked up but Ashton Granger has; she stops doodling. [[Brace yourself|Fight starts]]] (else:)[[[Say nothing|Copper confronts]]] </div> Harsent wins it. Smash to the corner. 'Fresh blood,' says Harsent. 'Fancy a game?' 'House rules,' says Clegg. 'Winner plays the stranger.' [[Challenge Harsent|Challenge Harsent]] [[Challenge Clegg|Challenge Clegg]] [[I'd rather just watch|Watch them play]] You watch them play. 'Lackland's sitting on something,' says Clegg. 'Lackland's always sitting on something,' says Harsent. 'It's what he does instead of standing for anything.' (set: $confidence to $confidence + 4) Harsent tosses you a paddle. 'House rules.' [[Take the paddle|Challenge Harsent]] <svg class="french-rule" viewBox="0 0 300 60" width="100%" height="60" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><linearGradient id="frAmb" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#a06010" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="8%" stop-color="#b07020" stop-opacity="0.5"/><stop offset="50%" stop-color="#c88020" stop-opacity="0.65"/><stop offset="92%" stop-color="#b07020" stop-opacity="0.5"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#a06010" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="frLn" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#c8a86a" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="8%" stop-color="#c8a86a" stop-opacity="0.9"/><stop offset="92%" stop-color="#c8a86a" stop-opacity="0.9"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#c8a86a" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient></defs><rect x="0" y="10" width="300" height="40" fill="url(#frAmb)" opacity="0.4"/><line x1="20" y1="10" x2="280" y2="10" stroke="url(#frLn)" stroke-width="1.5"/><line x1="20" y1="50" x2="280" y2="50" stroke="url(#frLn)" stroke-width="1.5"/><g opacity="0.3" stroke="#c8a86a" stroke-width="0.6" fill="none"><line x1="40" y1="10" x2="40" y2="50"/><line x1="55" y1="10" x2="55" y2="50"/><line x1="70" y1="10" x2="70" y2="50"/><line x1="85" y1="10" x2="85" y2="50"/><line x1="100" y1="10" x2="100" y2="50"/><line x1="115" y1="10" x2="115" y2="50"/><line x1="185" y1="10" x2="185" y2="50"/><line x1="200" y1="10" x2="200" y2="50"/><line x1="215" y1="10" x2="215" y2="50"/><line x1="230" y1="10" x2="230" y2="50"/><line x1="245" y1="10" x2="245" y2="50"/><line x1="260" y1="10" x2="260" y2="50"/></g><g opacity="0.55"><path d="M130,30 Q135,14 140,30 Q145,46 150,30 Q155,14 160,30 Q165,46 170,30" fill="none" stroke="#c8a86a" stroke-width="1.2"/><circle cx="130" cy="30" r="2" fill="#c8a86a" opacity="0.7"/><circle cx="170" cy="30" r="2" fill="#c8a86a" opacity="0.7"/></g><polygon points="150,22 154,30 150,38 146,30" fill="#c8a86a" opacity="0.6"/><g opacity="0.35"><rect x="62" y="20" width="6" height="20" rx="1" fill="#002395"/><rect x="73" y="19" width="7" height="22" rx="1" fill="#f0f0f0"/><rect x="85" y="20" width="5" height="20" rx="1" fill="#ed2939"/><rect x="210" y="20" width="6" height="20" rx="1" fill="#002395"/><rect x="221" y="19" width="7" height="22" rx="1" fill="#f0f0f0"/><rect x="233" y="20" width="5" height="20" rx="1" fill="#ed2939"/></g><path d="M20,10 Q20,8 22,8 L28,8 Q30,8 30,10" fill="none" stroke="#c8a86a" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.5"/><path d="M270,10 Q270,8 272,8 L278,8 Q280,8 280,10" fill="none" stroke="#c8a86a" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.5"/><path d="M20,50 Q20,52 22,52 L28,52 Q30,52 30,50" fill="none" stroke="#c8a86a" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.5"/><path d="M270,50 Q270,52 272,52 L278,52 Q280,52 280,50" fill="none" stroke="#c8a86a" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.5"/></svg> You catch the barman's eye. What'll it be? [[Beaujolais|Drinking at the French]] [[Claret|Drinking at the French]] [[Breton Cider|Drinking at the French]] <svg class="french-rule" viewBox="0 0 300 24" width="100%" height="24" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><linearGradient id="frC" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#c8a86a" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="45%" stop-color="#c8a86a" stop-opacity="0.55"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#c8a86a" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="frD" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#c8a86a" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="45%" stop-color="#c8a86a" stop-opacity="0.28"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#c8a86a" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient></defs><line x1="0" y1="7" x2="300" y2="7" stroke="url(#frD)" stroke-width="0.5"/><line x1="0" y1="12" x2="300" y2="12" stroke="url(#frC)" stroke-width="1.2"/><svg x="140" y="0" width="20" height="24" viewBox="-12 -2 24 26" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"><g fill="#c8a86a" opacity="0.75"><path d="M0,15 C-3,10 -4,2 0,-1 C4,2 3,10 0,15Z"/><path d="M-1,13 C-4,10 -8,5 -9,3 C-9,5 -8,6 -6,5 C-3,8 -1,11 0,13Z"/><path d="M1,13 C4,10 8,5 9,3 C9,5 8,6 6,5 C3,8 1,11 0,13Z"/><rect x="-8" y="14" width="16" height="2.5" rx="0.5"/><ellipse cx="0" cy="20" rx="2.5" ry="2"/></g></svg></svg> You've ballsed this right up. It's already getting late. Trisha's is close by and you can always try there. You're not a member these days, so who knows if you'll get in. [[They know me|Failure: Trisha's]] <span class="guided-link">[[I might as well give it a try|Success: Trisha's]]</span> (if: $hasCoin is true)[<script>if(window.coinGate)window.coinGate("They know me","I might as well give it a try");</script>] (set: $metRed to true)\ <!-- Ginger light --> <div class="ginger-lamp-wrap"> <svg width="60" height="110" viewBox="0 0 60 110"><ellipse cx="30" cy="33" rx="40" ry="30" fill="rgba(200,100,5,0.10)"/><ellipse cx="30" cy="31" rx="24" ry="18" fill="rgba(220,130,10,0.18)"/><ellipse cx="30" cy="29" rx="13" ry="10" fill="rgba(255,190,60,0.22)"/><polygon points="27,2 30,0 33,2 32,7 28,7" fill="rgba(60,38,4,0.96)"/><path d="M13,7 Q30,4 47,7 L44,13 L16,13 Z" fill="rgba(60,38,4,0.96)"/><path d="M16,13 L44,13 L40,44 L20,44 Z" fill="rgba(130,75,8,0.45)" stroke="rgba(90,52,4,0.65)" stroke-width="1"/><path d="M19,15 L41,15 L37,42 L23,42 Z" fill="rgba(255,165,35,0.42)"/><ellipse cx="30" cy="29" rx="7" ry="10" fill="rgba(255,232,130,0.55)"/><ellipse cx="30" cy="27" rx="3" ry="4" fill="rgba(255,250,210,0.68)"/><rect x="22" y="44" width="16" height="6" rx="2.5" fill="rgba(60,38,4,0.96)"/><rect x="27" y="50" width="6" height="60" rx="2" fill="rgba(45,28,3,0.90)"/></svg> </div> <div class="ginger-scene"> <div class="ginger-light"></div> 'Red!' you say. He looks up at first, then towards you without looking at you. 'I need to sell a book.' 'Sell yourself,' he says. 'Things turn up.' You understand. As you turn, you strike, in the cool and marbling air, a vein of his perfume, which you recognise, because you once loved a woman who wore that scent, as lily-of-the-valley. <div class="lily-window"> <span class="lily-thought">And with it, her risen face:</span> <div class="verse" style="color:#d4a8b4;margin:0.6em 0 0.6em 0;">That is not natural in an age like this,<br> Being high and solitary and most stern</div> <span class="lily-thought">A little earthquake in the heart upsets the world and you are twenty-one again, walking with her on your arm through the rain on St. Giles, past the funfair, before so very much went so far wrong.</span>(set: $confidence to $confidence - 12) </div> [[Walk on|LINE 1]] </div> (set: _hideStats to (a: "Black page", "Title", "Start", "Dawn", "PP Pong", "Fight starts", "Fight Round 1", "Fight Round 2", "Fight Round 3", "Fight R1 Back", "Fight R1 Block", "Fight R1 Duck", "Fight R2 Catch", "Fight R2 Counter", "Fight R2 Slip", "Fight R3 Clinch", "Fight R3 Headon", "Fight R3 Weave", "Fight Victory", "Fight Defeat")) (unless: _hideStats contains (passage:)'s name)[\ (if: $haunts is an array)[\ (if: $haunts's length >= 8)[(enchant: ?page, (css: "background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1a1e28 0%, #252a3a 50%, #1a1e28 100%); background-attachment: fixed"))]\ (else-if: $haunts's length >= 6)[(enchant: ?page, (css: "background: linear-gradient(180deg, #171a20 0%, #212430 50%, #171a20 100%); background-attachment: fixed"))]\ (else-if: $haunts's length >= 4)[(enchant: ?page, (css: "background: linear-gradient(180deg, #141418 0%, #1e1e28 50%, #141418 100%); background-attachment: fixed"))]\ (else-if: $haunts's length >= 2)[(enchant: ?page, (css: "background: linear-gradient(180deg, #171516 0%, #252224 50%, #171516 100%); background-attachment: fixed"))] ]\ (if: (passage:)'s name is "Dean Street")[(set: $notebookUnlocked to true)]\ (if: $notebookUnlocked is true)[<div class="stat-bars"> <div class="stat-group"> (set: _confClass to "")(set: _confGhost to "")(set: _confPct to "")(if: $prevConfidence is a number)[(if: $confidence > $prevConfidence)[(set: _confClass to " bar-flash-up")(set: _confGhost to "<span class='bar-ghost bar-ghost-gain' style='width:" + (text: $prevConfidence) + "%'></span>")(set: _confPct to " pct-gain")](else-if: $confidence < $prevConfidence)[(set: _confClass to " bar-flash-down")(set: _confGhost to "<span class='bar-ghost bar-ghost-loss' style='width:" + (text: $prevConfidence) + "%'></span>")(set: _confPct to " pct-loss")]] (set: _sobClass to "")(set: _sobGhost to "")(set: _sobPct to "")(if: $prevSobriety is a number)[(if: $sobriety > $prevSobriety)[(set: _sobClass to " bar-flash-up")(set: _sobGhost to "<span class='bar-ghost bar-ghost-gain' style='width:" + (text: $prevSobriety) + "%'></span>")(set: _sobPct to " pct-gain")](else-if: $sobriety < $prevSobriety)[(set: _sobClass to " bar-flash-down")(set: _sobGhost to "<span class='bar-ghost bar-ghost-loss' style='width:" + (text: $prevSobriety) + "%'></span>")(set: _sobPct to " pct-loss")]] <div class="stat-row"> <span class="stat-label">MORALE</span> <span class="stat-bar">(print: _sobGhost)(if: $sobriety >= 50)[(print: "<span class='bar-fill bar-good" + _sobClass + "' style='width:" + (text: $sobriety) + "%'></span>")](else-if: $sobriety >= 25)[(print: "<span class='bar-fill bar-warning" + _sobClass + "' style='width:" + (text: $sobriety) + "%'></span>")](else:)[(print: "<span class='bar-fill bar-danger" + _sobClass + "' style='width:" + (text: $sobriety) + "%'></span>")]</span> (print: "<span class='stat-pct" + _sobPct + "'>" + (text: $sobriety) + "%</span>") </div> <div class="stat-row"> <span class="stat-label">SOBRIETY</span> <span class="stat-bar">(print: _confGhost)(if: $confidence >= 50)[(print: "<span class='bar-fill bar-good" + _confClass + "' style='width:" + (text: $confidence) + "%'></span>")](else-if: $confidence >= 25)[(print: "<span class='bar-fill bar-warning" + _confClass + "' style='width:" + (text: $confidence) + "%'></span>")](else:)[(print: "<span class='bar-fill bar-danger" + _confClass + "' style='width:" + (text: $confidence) + "%'></span>")]</span> (print: "<span class='stat-pct" + _confPct + "'>" + (text: $confidence) + "%</span>") </div> </div> <div class="header-links"><div class="notebook-link">(link-repeat: "NOTEBOOK")[(display: "Build Notebook")]</div> </div> </div>] (set: $prevConfidence to $confidence)(set: $prevSobriety to $sobriety) (if: $afterMidnight is true)[<span id="dst-after-midnight" style="display:none"></span>] ] (set: _fHere to (passage:)'s tags contains "venue-french")(set: _fVisited to false)\ (if: $visited contains "French")[(if: $visited's French is true)[(set: _fVisited to true)]]\ (set: _pHere to (passage:)'s name contains "Pillars")(set: _pVisited to false)\ (if: $visited contains "Pillars")[(if: $visited's Pillars is true)[(set: _pVisited to true)]]\ (set: _cHere to (passage:)'s tags contains "venue-colony")(set: _cVisited to false)\ (if: $visited contains "Colony")[(if: $visited's Colony is true)[(set: _cVisited to true)]]\ (set: _rHere to (passage:)'s tags contains "venue-ronnies")(set: _rVisited to false)\ (if: $visited contains "Ronnies")[(if: $visited's Ronnies is true)[(set: _rVisited to true)]]\ (set: _tHere to (passage:)'s tags contains "venue-trishas")(set: _tVisited to false)\ (if: $visited contains "Trishas")[(if: $visited's Trishas is true)[(set: _tVisited to true)]]\ (set: _lHere to (passage:)'s name contains "Lackland")(set: _lVisited to $knowsLackland is true)\ (set: _eHere to (passage:)'s name contains "Cecil Court")(set: _eVisited to $knowsCecilCourt is true)\ (set: _hHere to (passage:)'s tags contains "venue-coach")(set: _hVisited to false)\ (if: $cowDone is true)[(set: _hVisited to true)]\ (set: _gHere to (passage:)'s name contains "Corner of Dean")(set: _gVisited to true)\ (set: _m to "<div class='soho-map'><svg viewBox='0 0 560 700' width='510' height='640'>")(set: _m to _m + "<defs><filter id='vg' x='-50%' y='-50%' width='200%' height='200%'><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation='4' result='b'/><feMerge><feMergeNode in='b'/><feMergeNode in='b'/><feMergeNode in='SourceGraphic'/></feMerge></filter><radialGradient id='lp'><stop offset='0%' stop-color='rgba(212,165,116,0.35)'/><stop offset='100%' stop-color='rgba(212,165,116,0)'/></radialGradient><linearGradient id='fg' x1='0' y1='0' x2='0' y2='1'><stop offset='0%' transform='translate(420,350)'><circle r='34' fill='rgba(212,165,116,0.07)'/><circle r='18' fill='rgba(212,165,116,0.13)'/><circle r='8' fill='#c89858' stroke='rgba(212,165,116,0.5)' stroke-width='1'/><text x='-18' y='6' text-anchor='end' fill='#c89858' font-family='Crimson Text,Georgia,serif' font-size='16'>The Ginger Light</text></g>")]\ (else:)[(set: _m to _m + "<g transform='translate(420,350)'><circle r='7' fill='rgba(160,140,105,0.45)'/><text x='-18' y='6' text-anchor='end' fill='rgba(180,160,125,0.55)' font-family='Crimson Text,Georgia,serif' font-size='15'>The Ginger Light</text></g>")]\ (set: _m to _m + "<rect width='560' height='700' fill='url(#fg)' pointer-events='none'/><rect width='560' height='700' fill='url(#fg2)' pointer-events='none'/><rect width='560' height='700' fill='none' stroke='rgba(10,9,8,0.85)' stroke-width='15' pointer-events='none'/>")(set: _m to _m + "</svg></div>")\ (set: _lo1 to (cond: $lilyCount >= 1, '0.82', '0.18'))\ (set: _lo2 to (cond: $lilyCount >= 2, '0.82', '0.18'))\ (set: _lo3 to (cond: $lilyCount >= 3, '0.82', '0.18'))\ (set: _lo4 to (cond: $lilyCount >= 4, '0.82', '0.18'))\ (set: _lo5 to (cond: $lilyCount >= 5, '0.82', '0.18'))\ (set: _nb to '<div class="nb-page">')\ (set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-tabs"><div class="nb-tab nb-tab-active" data-tab="notes" onclick="window.nbSwitchTab(this)">NOTES</div><div class="nb-tab" data-tab="lily" onclick="window.nbSwitchTab(this)">LILY</div><div class="nb-tab" data-tab="alba" onclick="window.nbSwitchTab(this)">ALBA</div><div class="nb-tab" data-tab="inventory" onclick="window.nbSwitchTab(this)">SPECIALS</div><div class="nb-tab" data-tab="map" onclick="window.nbSwitchTab(this)">MAP</div></div>')\ (set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-panel nb-panel-notes nb-panel-active">')\ (set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-section"><strong class="nb-heading">HAUNTS</strong>')\ (if: $haunts contains $haunt1)[(set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-item">⬖ ' + $haunt1 + '</div>')](else:)[(set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-grey">○ The Sketch</div>')]\ (if: $haunts contains $haunt3)[(set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-item">⬖ ' + $haunt3 + '</div>')](else:)[(set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-grey">○ The Beast</div>')]\ (if: $haunts contains $haunt4)[(set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-item">⬖ ' + $haunt4 + '</div>')](else:)[(set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-grey">○ The Debt</div>')]\ (if: $haunts contains $haunt7)[(set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-item">⬖ ' + $haunt7 + '</div>')](else:)[(set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-grey">○ The Head</div>')]\ (if: $haunts contains $haunt8)[(set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-item">⬖ ' + $haunt8 + '</div>')](else:)[(set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-grey">○ The Wound</div>')]\ (set: _nb to _nb + '</div>')\ (set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-section"><strong class="nb-heading">PASSWORDS</strong>')\ (if: $knowsCopperWord is true)[(set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-item">⚿ "I said hello" — for Copper</div>')](else:)[(set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-grey">○ A word for Copper</div>')]\ (if: $knowsCopperSecret is true)[(set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-item">⚿ "Valletta" — Lackland&#39;s back room</div>')](else:)[(set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-grey">○ A word for Lackland</div>')]\ (set: _nb to _nb + '</div>')\ (set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-section"><strong class="nb-heading">OBJECTS</strong>')\ (if: $hasTrishaMatchbook is true)[(set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-item">◈ Trisha&#39;s matchbook (an invitation)</div>')](else:)[(set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-grey">○ A matchbook</div>')]\ (if: $knowsCecilCourt is true)[(set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-item">◈ A beer mat — Cecil Court scrawled on the back</div>')](else:)[(set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-grey">○ A beer mat</div>')]\ (if: $hasMissingPage is true and $returnedPage is false)[(set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-item">◈ Page 47 (for O&#39;Flatterly)</div>')](else-if: $returnedPage is true)[(set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-grey">◈ Page 47 (returned)</div>')](else:)[(set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-grey">○ A missing page</div>')]\ (set: _nb to _nb + '</div>')\ (set: _nb to _nb + '</div>')\ (set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-panel nb-panel-lily">')\ (set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-section nb-lily-section">')\ (set: _nb to _nb + '<svg class="nb-lily-row" viewBox="0 0 280 140" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">')\ (set: _nb to _nb + '<g transform="translate(16,8) scale(1.6)" opacity="' + _lo1 + '"><path d="M14 0 Q12 12, 14 24" fill="none" stroke="#7a9a6a" stroke-width="1.2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.7"/><path stroke-width="0.9" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.5"/></g>')\ (set: _nb to _nb + '<g transform="translate(112,0) scale(1.6)" opacity="' + _lo3 + '"><path d="M16 0 Q14 16, 16 32" fill="none" scale(1.6)" opacity="' + _lo4 + '"><path d="M14 0 Q13 14, 15 28" fill="none" stroke="#7a9a6a" stroke-width="1.2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.7"/><path d="M15 28 Q9 34, 7 44 Q11 48, 15 46 Q19 48, 23 44 Q21 34, 15 28 Z" fill="#e8ddd0" opacity="0.7" stroke="#c8baa0" stroke-width="0.6"/><circle cx="15" cy="44" r="1.1" fill="#d4b8e0" opacity="0.5"/><path d="M14 8 Q22 4, 26 -2" fill="none" fill="none" stroke="#7a9a6a" stroke-width="1.2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.7"/><path d="M14 24 Q8 30, 6 40 Q10 44, 14 42 Q18 44, 22 40 Q20 30, 14 24 Z" fill="#e8ddd0" opacity="0.65" stroke="#c8baa0" stroke-width="0.6"/><circle cx="14" cy="40" r="1" fill="#d4b8e0" opacity="0.5"/><path d="M14 10 Q6 6, 2 0" fill="none" stroke="#7a9a6a" stroke-width="0.9" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.5"/></g>')\ (set: _nb to _nb + '</svg><div class="nb-lily-label">lily-of-the-valley</div></div>')\ (if: $lilyCallCount > 0 or $missedLilyCalls > 0 or $missedAoifeCalls > 0)[(set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-section nb-calls-section"><strong class="nb-heading">CALLS</strong>')\ (if: $hadLilyCall1 is true)[(set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-item nb-call-lily">☎ Lily — call 1</div>')](else-if: $missedLilyCalls >= 1)[(set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-grey nb-missed">☎ Lily — missed</div>')]\ (if: $hadLilyCall2 is true)[(set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-item nb-call-lily">☎ Lily — call 2</div>')](else-if: $missedLilyCalls >= 2)[(set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-grey nb-missed">☎ Lily — missed</div>')]\ (if: $hadLilyCall3 is true)[(set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-item nb-call-lily">☎ Lily — call 3</div>')]\ (if: $hadDualRing is true)[(set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-item nb-call-dual">☎☎ Both rang at once</div>')]\ (if: $missedAoifeCalls > 0)[(set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-grey nb-missed">☎ Aoife — missed (' + (text: $missedAoifeCalls) + ')</div>')]\ (set: _nb to _nb + '</div>')]\ (set: _nb to _nb + '</div>')\ (set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-panel nb-panel-alba">')\ (set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-section nb-alba-section"><strong class="nb-heading nb-alba-heading">THE ALBA</strong>')\ (if: $alba contains $alba1)[(set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-item nb-alba-line">✦ <em>' + (text: $alba1) + '</em></div>')](else:)[(set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-grey">○ · · ·</div>')]\ (if: $alba contains $alba2)[(set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-item nb-alba-line">✦ <em>' + (text: $alba2) + '</em></div>')](else:)[(set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-grey">○ · · ·</div>')]\ (if: $alba contains $alba3)[(set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-item nb-alba-line">✦ <em>' + (text: $alba3) + '</em></div>')](else:)[(set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-grey">○ · · ·</div>')]\ (set: _nb to _nb + '</div>')\ (set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-alba-note">Three lines of a dawn poem, gathered from the night.</div>')\ (set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-alba-kiss">Alas, I kiss you Jane</div>')\ (set: _nb to _nb + '</div>')\ (set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-panel nb-panel-inventory">')\ (set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-section nb-inv-section"><strong class="nb-heading nb-inv-heading">SPECIALS</strong>')\ (if: $hasCoin is true)[(set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-inv-item"><div class="nb-inv-name nb-item">◈ A &#39;Donkey&#39; Coin</div><div class="nb-coin-display"><img src="coin-heads.png" alt="The Donkey" class="nb-coin-img"/></div><div class="nb-inv-btn" onclick="window.flipCoinPopup()">Flip it</div></div>')](else:)[(set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-inv-item nb-inv-locked"><div class="nb-grey">○ A &#39;Donkey&#39; coin</div></div>')]\ (set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-inv-divider"></div>')\ (if: $returnedPage is true)[(set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-inv-item"><div class="nb-inv-name nb-item">◈ Shelley&#39;s Liver</div><div class="nb-inv-vial-wrap"><svg class="nb-inv-vial" viewBox="0 0 80 160" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="vialGlass" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="0"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="rgba(180,160,130,0.18)"/><stop offset="30%" stop-color="rgba(220,210,190,0.32)"/><stop offset="70%" stop-color="rgba(200,185,155,0.15)"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="rgba(150,135,110,0.22)"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="vialLiq" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="rgba(140,60,20,0.75)"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="rgba(90,28,8,0.88)"/></linearGradient></defs><rect x="26" y="10" width="28" height="10" rx="3" fill="rgba(160,140,110,0.4)" stroke="rgba(130,110,80,0.6)" stroke-width="1.2"/><rect x="29" y="8" width="22" height="5" rx="2" fill="rgba(200,180,150,0.5)" stroke="rgba(150,130,100,0.5)" stroke-width="1"/><path d="M24 20 L18 45 L18 140 Q18 148 25 150 L55 150 Q62 148 62 140 L62 45 L56 20 Z" fill="url(#vialGlass)" stroke="rgba(160,140,110,0.55)" stroke-width="1.5"/><path d="M20 90 L20 140 Q20 147 26 149 L54 149 Q60 147 60 140 L60 90 Z" fill="url(#vialLiq)" opacity="0.82"/><ellipse cx="40" cy="90" rx="20" ry="4" fill="rgba(160,70,25,0.35)"/><path d="M26 48 Q27 120 27 140" fill="none" stroke="rgba(230,220,200,0.28)" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M32 45 Q33 80 33 100" fill="none" stroke="rgba(230,220,200,0.15)" stroke-width="1.2" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg></div><div class="nb-inv-btn" onclick="window.liverPopup()">Inspect</div></div>')](else:)[(set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-inv-item nb-inv-locked"><div class="nb-grey">○ Shelley&#39;s liver</div></div>')]\ (set: _nb to _nb + '</div>')\ (set: _nb to _nb + '</div>')\ (set: _nb to _nb + '<div class="nb-panel nb-panel-map">' + _m + '</div>')\ (set: _nb to _nb + '</div>')\ (dialog: _nb, " ") }
